jobs.name: 1:1 Prep Reminder
jobs.description: Nudges you to prep talking points before a recurring 1:1 and shows your last notes. Use this if you've ever walked into a 1:1 with nothing prepared and just winged it.

jobs.name: 2FA Enrollment Audit
jobs.description: Checks which team members in your identity provider or GitHub org don't have two-factor auth enabled. Use this if you've ever assumed everyone had 2FA on until an incident review proved otherwise.

jobs.name: 340B Program Eligibility Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks a log of 340B-priced dispenses against patient eligibility criteria (associated with a covered entity, qualifying encounter on file) and flags any dispense missing the documentation a 340B audit would expect. Use this if a 340B-priced claim has ever been submitted without the backing eligibility record being confirmed first.

jobs.name: 3PL Performance Scorecard
jobs.description: Reviews a third-party logistics provider's recent performance across on-time delivery, damage rate, and cost against your service agreement targets. Use this if a 3PL relationship has ever drifted from "great at onboarding" to "quietly underperforming" without a regular scorecard catching it.

jobs.name: 401(k) Employer Match True-Up Check
jobs.description: Compares each employee's actual year-to-date employer 401(k) match against what full-year match they'd be entitled to under your plan formula, and flags anyone shorted — commonly employees who front-load contributions, hit the IRS deferral limit early in the year, and quietly stop getting per-paycheck match in later months. Use this if your plan doesn't run an automatic true-up and a fast-maxing employee has ever missed months of match they were otherwise entitled to.

jobs.name: Abandoned Cart Recovery Check
jobs.description: Reviews carts abandoned in the last day and drafts recovery emails for ones above a minimum value, instead of relying only on your platform's generic auto-recovery flow. Use this if you've ever suspected your default abandoned-cart email is too generic to convert high-value carts.

jobs.name: ABC Classification Drift Check
jobs.description: Recomputes each SKU's revenue or velocity share from recent sales and flags SKUs whose actual ranking no longer matches the ABC class (A/B/C) assigned to them in the system, which throws off count frequency and service-level priorities based on that class. Use this if a SKU has ever kept its old "C-item" label long after it quietly became a top mover, so it wasn't getting counted or prioritized like one.

jobs.name: ACA Full-Time-Equivalent Threshold Monitor
jobs.description: Estimates the company's total ACA full-time-equivalent count from a headcount/hours export and warns when it's approaching the Applicable Large Employer threshold. Use this if the company has ever crossed 50 FTEs without anyone noticing until a compliance filing requirement suddenly applied.

jobs.name: Accessorial Chargeback Dispute Tracker
jobs.description: Checks open disputes over accessorial fees (detention, liftgate, residential, reweigh/reclass) billed by a carrier and flags ones that have gone stale or are nearing the carrier's response deadline. Use this if a disputed accessorial charge has ever just sat open until the dispute window closed and you ended up paying it by default.

jobs.name: Accident/Incident Report Tracker
jobs.description: Flags open accident or incident reports that have gone too long without being closed out. Use this if a fender-bender report has ever sat unresolved for weeks because nobody was tracking it after the initial paperwork was filed.

jobs.name: Account-Team Staffing Ratio Check
jobs.description: Counts how many active client accounts each account lead is responsible for and flags anyone stretched past the agency's target accounts-per-lead ratio. Use this if an account lead has ever quietly ended up owning twice as many accounts as their peers because new clients kept getting assigned to whoever answered fastest, not whoever had capacity.

jobs.name: Accounts Payable Aging Check
jobs.description: Buckets bills you owe (not invoices you've sent) into aging ranges — current, 30, 60, 90+ days past due — so nothing quietly slips into a late-fee zone. Use this if you or your business pay vendors on terms and want a standing view of what's coming due versus already overdue.

jobs.name: Accrued Revenue Recognition Check
jobs.description: Compares revenue recognized on the books for the period against cash actually collected from customers, so you can see how big the gap between "earned" and "collected" has gotten. Use this if you recognize revenue before cash lands (subscriptions, milestone billing, long contracts) and want to catch an accrual-timing problem before it snowballs into a reconciliation headache at close.

jobs.name: Activities Calendar Participation Check
jobs.description: Reviews resident activity and engagement sign-in logs over a recent period and flags residents whose participation has been unusually low, a common early signal of social isolation or a broader decline in wellbeing. Use this if you want activities and care staff to notice a quietly withdrawing resident before it shows up as a bigger problem.

jobs.name: Ad Creative Fatigue Check
jobs.description: Checks an ad creative's frequency (average times seen per user) and click-through rate against thresholds, flagging fatigue before performance craters. Use this if a top-performing ad has ever kept running past its shelf life, burning budget on an audience that had already tuned it out.

jobs.name: Podcast Ad-Read Script Approval Overdue Check
jobs.description: Flags sponsor ad-read scripts still awaiting sponsor sign-off close to the recording date. Use this if you've ever had to delay recording, or read an unapproved script, because a sponsor sat on an approval too long.

jobs.name: Ad Spend Pacing Check
jobs.description: Checks a campaign's spend so far against where it should be by this point in the budget period, and flags over- or under-pacing. Use this if a campaign has ever blown through its monthly budget in the first two weeks because nobody was watching the burn rate.

jobs.name: ADA-Accessible Room Booking Compliance Check
jobs.description: Cross-checks reservations where a guest requested an ADA-accessible room against what was actually assigned, and flags any mismatch. Use this if a guest who requested a roll-in shower has ever arrived to find a standard room assigned instead, because the accessibility flag got dropped somewhere between booking and room assignment.

jobs.name: ADA Accommodation Request Tracker
jobs.description: Checks open workplace accommodation requests against a target response window and flags any request that's gone stale with no documented next step. Use this if an accommodation request has ever stalled in someone's inbox past a reasonable response time because it wasn't visible outside the requester and one HR contact.

jobs.name: ADA Accessibility Complaint Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks open ADA/accessibility grievances against your target resolution window and flags anything sitting open too long. Use this if an accessibility complaint has ever aged past your grievance procedure's timeline because it wasn't visibly tracked outside one person's inbox.

jobs.name: Adjuster Caseload Balance Check
jobs.description: Counts open claims assigned per adjuster and flags anyone carrying a caseload well above the team average, so work can be redistributed before it hurts claim cycle time. Use this if one adjuster has ever quietly ended up with double the caseload of everyone else on the team.

jobs.name: ADR and RevPAR Tracker
jobs.description: Calculates yesterday's average daily rate (ADR) and revenue per available room (RevPAR) from your rooms-sold export and flags a drop against your target. Use this if a soft revenue night has ever gone unnoticed for a week because nobody was watching the daily numbers, only the monthly total.

jobs.name: Advance Directive Documentation Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks a panel of eligible patients (e.g. age threshold or a chronic/ serious-illness flag) for a missing or expired advance directive/POLST form on file. Use this if a care conversation has ever been delayed or complicated in an urgent moment because nobody had confirmed ahead of time whether the patient's advance directive was on file, current, and actually in the chart.

jobs.name: Affiliate Commission Payout Check
jobs.description: Checks commissions owed to affiliates who drive sales to your store against your payout schedule and flags anything overdue and still unpaid. Use this if an affiliate has ever had to chase you for a commission payment because nobody was tracking payout due dates on your side.

jobs.name: Affiliate Link Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks affiliate links and discount codes in your published content against their expiry date and flags anything expiring soon. Use this if a viewer has ever hit a dead discount code in an old video description because nobody remembered to pull or update it before it lapsed.

jobs.name: Affiliate/Partner Performance Check
jobs.description: Compares each affiliate or partner's referred conversions and revenue against their target for the period and flags underperformers. Use this if a partner program has ever kept paying placement fees to partners who quietly stopped actually driving conversions.

jobs.name: After-Hours Emergency Triage Callback Check
jobs.description: Checks the after-hours emergency line/triage log for calls that were logged as needing a callback and haven't gotten one within a set response window. Use this if a worried pet owner has ever called the after-hours line, gotten triage advice, and then never received the promised morning follow-up call because it fell through the cracks overnight.

jobs.name: After-Hours Ticket Response Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks tickets submitted outside business hours and flags any that sat completely untouched well past your next-business-day start time. Use this if a weekend or overnight ticket has ever waited far longer than your normal SLA implies, because "next business day" quietly became "whenever someone gets to it."

jobs.name: Client Contract Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Looks ahead at client contracts and retainer agreements and flags the ones approaching their expiration or renewal date, well before they lapse. Use this if a retainer has ever auto-expired or gone month-to-month by accident because nobody started the renewal conversation early enough.

jobs.name: Client Invoice Aging Check
jobs.description: Buckets outstanding client invoices by how many days overdue they are (30, 60, 90+ days) and flags the accounts that need a collections follow-up. Use this if unpaid client invoices have ever quietly aged past 90 days before anyone on the team noticed and picked up the phone.

jobs.name: Client Satisfaction Survey Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Looks through recent client satisfaction survey responses for scores below a set threshold and lists which accounts got them, so someone can reach out before a quiet complaint turns into a lost client. Use this if your agency runs periodic client happiness surveys but nobody has a standing habit of checking the low scores until a client is already upset in a status call.

jobs.name: Agency E&O Policy Renewal Tracker
jobs.description: Warns before your own insurance agency's errors & omissions (E&O) professional liability policy comes up for renewal, separate from any client-facing policy tracking. Use this if the agency's own malpractice coverage has ever gotten close to lapsing because everyone was focused on client renewals instead of the agency's own.

jobs.name: Agency Retainer Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds account leads when it's time to start the renewal or renegotiation conversation with a client, based on a lead time set before the retainer contract's actual expiration date. Use this if your agency has ever let a retainer lapse or gotten stuck renegotiating terms at the last minute because nobody flagged that the conversation needed to start weeks before the contract itself expired — this is deliberately earlier and separate from a plain contract-expiration-date reminder; it's the "open the conversation now" trigger, not the "the contract ends today" alert.

jobs.name: Agent/Broker License Expiry Tracker
jobs.description: Checks producer (agent/broker) license and appointment expiration dates across every state they're licensed in and flags anything expiring soon. Use this if an agent has ever kept writing business in a state after their license quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Support Agent Ramp Time Check
jobs.description: Compares each newly hired agent's ticket volume and resolution quality against the tenured-agent baseline for their first weeks on the job. Use this if a new hire has ever stayed quietly underwater for months because nobody was tracking ramp progress against a baseline, only raw ticket counts alongside everyone else.

jobs.name: Support Agent Workload Balance Check
jobs.description: Checks how open tickets are distributed across agents and flags a real imbalance. Use this if one agent has ever quietly ended up carrying double the ticket load of a teammate because assignment was manual and nobody was watching the split.

jobs.name: Aggressive Behavior Flag Review Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds staff to periodically re-review pets flagged for aggressive or reactive behavior during boarding or daycare, and drafts a summary of each flagged pet's incident history so the review is quick. Use this if a behavior flag has ever sat unreviewed for months, leaving staff unsure whether it's still accurate or handling instructions have changed.

jobs.name: Airdrop Claim Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Checks whether a wallet is eligible for a tracked project's airdrop and warns before the claim window closes. Use this if you've ever found out about an airdrop you qualified for only after the claim deadline had already passed.

jobs.name: Album Design Approval Follow-Up
jobs.description: Flags clients who were sent an album design proof but haven't approved it or responded within a target number of days, and drafts a gentle follow-up message. Use this if an album proof has ever sat unopened in a client's inbox for weeks, delaying printing and the final invoice.

jobs.name: Algorithm Update Impact Correlation Check
jobs.description: Checks whether a recent drop in your reach or engagement lines up in time with a platform algorithm or recommendation-system change. Use this if your numbers have ever dipped and you spent weeks guessing whether it was the algorithm, your content, or nothing at all, with no way to actually check.

jobs.name: Allergy Action Plan Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each child's allergy action plan against its annual renewal date and warns before it lapses. Use this if a plan has ever gone stale without anyone noticing until an incident made it obvious.

jobs.name: Amenity Reservation No-Show Check
jobs.description: Looks at bookable amenity slots such as phone booths, podcast rooms, or event space, and finds members with a repeat pattern of marking reservations as no-shows over a recent window. Use this if you want to catch members who keep tying up limited bookable space without showing up, so staff can follow up on your no-show policy before it gets worse.

jobs.name: Anesthesia Monitoring Log Completeness Check
jobs.description: Checks yesterday's anesthetic procedure logs for missing required vitals entries (heart rate, respiration, temperature, blood pressure) at the expected monitoring intervals. Use this if an anesthesia record has ever come up incomplete during a case review or malpractice inquiry because vitals were being watched in the room but not actually written down every interval.

jobs.name: Annual Independent Audit Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you as the deadline approaches for your organization's independent financial statement audit or review, separate from the Form 990 tax filing. Use this if a state grant, a major funder's contract, or your own bylaws has ever required an independent audit by a certain date and it nearly got missed because everyone's attention was on the 990 instead.

jobs.name: Annual Physical Checkup Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you when it has been about a year since your last annual physical or wellness checkup so it doesn't quietly fall off the calendar. Use this if preventive checkups tend to slip a year or two because there's no urgent symptom forcing the appointment.

jobs.name: API Deprecation Sunset Watch
jobs.description: Checks a list of third-party APIs your service depends on against their publicly announced deprecation or sunset dates, and flags any that are coming up soon enough that you need to start migrating. Use this if you've ever been blindsided by a vendor API shutting down a version you were still relying on, with no time left to react.

jobs.name: API Rate Limit Check
jobs.description: Checks how many API requests you have left before hitting a rate limit. Use this if you've ever gotten a 429 in production because nobody was watching the remaining quota.

jobs.name: Appliance Recall Check
jobs.description: Checks the CPSC recall database for a keyword matching one of your home appliances or products, and flags anything found. Use this if you've ever kept using a recalled appliance for months because the recall notice never reached you.

jobs.name: Application First-Response SLA Check
jobs.description: Flags new applicants who haven't gotten any recruiter action — a screen scheduled, a rejection, anything — within your target response window. Use this if candidates have ever applied and heard nothing for weeks simply because their application sat unopened in a queue.

jobs.name: Appointment No-Show Follow-Up
jobs.description: Reviews yesterday's no-show appointments and drafts a follow-up message offering to rebook. Use this if you've ever let a missed appointment go quiet and lost the patient/client entirely instead of just rebooking them.

jobs.name: Appointment No-Show Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Calculates the weekly no-show rate from a logged appointment history and flags when it crosses a threshold. Use this if the clinic has ever kept eating empty exam-room slots without noticing the no-show rate had crept up until the schedule was visibly hurting revenue — this tracks the aggregate trend, distinct from a per-appointment outreach job.

jobs.name: Appointment No-Show & Late-Cancel Tracker
jobs.description: Flags clients who no-showed or cancelled late in the past window so front desk can follow up or apply a policy. Use this if a chair or treatment room has ever sat empty because a client skipped without warning and nobody noticed the pattern until it kept happening.

jobs.name: Appointment Slot Utilization and Schedule Gap Check
jobs.description: Computes daily/weekly appointment slot utilization from the schedule and flags days running well under capacity, then suggests what to do about the gaps. Use this if provider schedules have ever had large unbooked gaps that nobody noticed until the day arrived nearly empty, wasting billable capacity that a recall push or same-day-opening alert could have filled.

jobs.name: ARC Review Copy Followup
jobs.description: Flags reviewers, bloggers, or media contacts who received an advance review copy (ARC) but haven't posted or filed a review within a set window, so a nudge can go out before the publication date. Use this if ARCs have ever been sent out and quietly forgotten with no review to show for them.

jobs.name: Artifact Registry Storage Quota Check
jobs.description: Checks how much storage your container or artifact registry is using against its quota and flags it when usage is getting close to the limit. Use this if you've ever had a build or push suddenly start failing because the registry silently filled up with old images nobody had cleaned out.

jobs.name: ASE Certification Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks technician ASE (or equivalent manufacturer) certifications against their expiration date and flags any expiring soon. Use this if a tech has ever kept working on certified-only repair categories after their certification quietly lapsed, putting warranty reimbursement at risk.

jobs.name: Assignment End-Date Approaching Redeployment Check
jobs.description: Looks ahead at active placements whose assignment end date is approaching and drafts a redeployment plan so workers can move to a new order instead of going idle. Use this if a good worker has ever finished an assignment and gone quiet (or taken a job elsewhere) because nobody lined up their next placement in time.

jobs.name: Assignment Grading Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks how many submitted assignments are still ungraded and flags it if the backlog is growing. Use this if grading has ever piled up for weeks until students started asking where their grades were.

jobs.name: At-Risk Student Grade Watch
jobs.description: Flags students whose current grade has dropped below a passing threshold partway through the term, instead of everyone finding out at report-card time. Use this if a student has ever gone from passing to failing without anyone reaching out until it was too late to recover.

jobs.name: Athletics/Extracurricular Academic Eligibility Check
jobs.description: Cross-checks the athletics or extracurricular activity roster against current grades and flags any student who has fallen below the GPA or passing-course threshold required to stay eligible. Use this if a student has ever kept playing or performing for weeks after falling below the eligibility bar because nobody cross-checked the roster against grades until an opposing team or judge's office questioned it.

jobs.name: Attendance Anomaly Check
jobs.description: Flags students whose attendance has dropped sharply, before it becomes a pattern nobody caught early. Use this if a student's attendance has ever quietly fallen off and only got noticed at report-card time.

jobs.name: Attendee Check-In Rate Watch
jobs.description: Checks the day-of check-in rate against registered headcount and flags it if turnout is running well below expectations while there's still time to adjust (catering, seating, staffing). Use this if you've ever found out an event was under-attended only after it ended, instead of two hours into it.

jobs.name: Marketing Attribution Discrepancy Check
jobs.description: Compares conversions or revenue attributed to a channel across two systems — the ad platform's own reporting and your analytics/CRM — and flags when they diverge significantly. Use this if you've ever reported two different numbers for the same campaign's results in the same meeting because the ad platform and the analytics tool didn't agree.

jobs.name: Auction Item Procurement Deadline Check
jobs.description: Tracks procured items for a fundraising auction against your item-count goal as the event date approaches. Use this if a gala auction has ever gone to print with a thin catalog because item solicitation stalled and nobody checked the count until it was too late to ask for more.

jobs.name: Audience Retention Drop-off Check
jobs.description: Checks the audience retention curve on recent videos for a sharp drop-off point and flags where viewers are bailing. Use this if you've ever found out weeks later that most viewers were leaving 30 seconds in and you kept the same intro anyway.

jobs.name: Podcast Audio Loudness (LUFS) Spot Check
jobs.description: Measures the integrated loudness of a newly exported episode file and flags it if it's outside your target LUFS range. Use this if you've ever published an episode that came out noticeably quieter or louder than your other episodes because a mastering step got skipped.

jobs.name: Audiobook Royalty Rate Tier Check
jobs.description: Checks audiobook sales-to-date against the unit thresholds in a contract's royalty rate tiers and flags titles that have just crossed into a higher payout tier, so the next statement uses the right rate. Use this if a title has ever been paid out at the wrong royalty rate because nobody was watching for it crossing a tier threshold mid-period.

jobs.name: Audit Finding Corrective Action Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews open findings from your agency's annual financial or compliance audit and drafts a status summary of which corrective action plans are on track, stalled, or past their committed date. Use this if a prior-year audit finding has ever reappeared as a "repeat finding" in the next audit because nobody was checking on the corrective action plan in between.

jobs.name: Audit Trail Segregation of Duties Check
jobs.description: Scans financial transaction logs for cases where the same person both created and approved a payment or journal entry, a classic internal controls red flag since no second set of eyes ever saw it. Use this if you need to be able to show an auditor that no one person can move money or post entries entirely on their own.

jobs.name: Author Byline Missing Check
jobs.description: Scans published content pages for a visible author byline (name and, where expected, an author bio link) and flags pages where one is missing. Use this if you publish articles or guides and want to catch missing author attribution, since named authorship is a trust signal search engines and readers both look for.

jobs.name: Autoclave Spore Test Log Check
jobs.description: Checks your sterilizer spore test log for a failed result or a gap longer than your required testing interval. Use this if a health inspector has ever asked for spore test records and you weren't sure the last one was actually run on schedule.

jobs.name: Autopay Failed Payment Check
jobs.description: Looks at recurring rent autopay charges for storage units and flags tenants whose most recent charge failed. Use this if you want to catch and resolve a declined card or failed bank draft while there's still time for a retry or a quick call, before the account slides into late fees or an overlock for nonpayment.

jobs.name: AV/Equipment Rental Return Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before rented AV gear, tables, tents, or other equipment is due back, so it doesn't rack up late fees sitting in a storage room after the event. Use this if a rental company has ever charged you extra days because nobody remembered to schedule the pickup.

jobs.name: Available-to-Promise Oversell Check
jobs.description: Compares each SKU's on-hand quantity against everything already reserved or committed against it and flags any SKU where promises exceed physical stock. Use this if a customer order has ever failed to ship because the system let it be promised on top of stock that was already spoken for.

jobs.name: Podcast Back-Catalog Re-Promotion Finder
jobs.description: Reviews your episode catalog for evergreen episodes that haven't been re-shared in a while and are newly relevant again. Use this if you've ever realized months later that a news event or trending topic made an old episode timely again, right when you could've been driving new listens to it.

jobs.name: Back-in-Stock Notification Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks products that customers asked to be notified about against current stock levels, and flags any that are back in stock with a waiting list that never got notified. Use this if an item has ever restocked while a list of interested customers sat unnotified until the item sold out again, missing the sale entirely.

jobs.name: Back Issue Archive Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks a magazine or journal's back-issue archive listing for missing issue numbers in the sequence, so gaps get filled or explained before a reader (or a librarian doing an intake) notices first. Use this if your archive has ever had a silently missing issue because a file didn't get uploaded or an issue number got skipped in the listing.

jobs.name: Backflow Prevention Test Due Reminder
jobs.description: Looks at commercial and industrial accounts with a backflow-prevention device on file and flags the ones whose required annual test is coming up or already overdue. Use this if your utility is responsible for tracking backflow-test compliance and missed tests have ever turned into a regulatory finding or a scramble to catch up before an audit.

jobs.name: Background Check Renewal Tracker
jobs.description: Checks each cleaner's background-check expiration date and flags anyone whose renewal is coming up or already overdue. Use this if a cleaner has ever shown up to an in-home or office job on an expired background check, which is the kind of thing that ends client contracts and insurance coverage fast.

jobs.name: Background Check Status Check
jobs.description: Checks pending background/reference checks for offered candidates and flags anything stalling close to their planned start date. Use this if a start date has ever slipped because a background check was still pending and nobody noticed until the week before.

jobs.name: Background Check Vendor Turnaround SLA Check
jobs.description: Tracks how long the third-party background-check vendor is taking on in-progress checks for candidates about to be placed, and flags any past the vendor's promised SLA. Use this if a placement start date has ever been at risk because the background-check vendor was quietly running slow and nobody escalated it.

jobs.name: Backup Freshness Check
jobs.description: Checks that your backup file actually got updated recently, and warns you if it's missing or stale. Use this if you have a backup process running somewhere and want to catch it silently failing before you need it.

jobs.name: Badge Access Terminated Employee Check
jobs.description: Compares your physical badge/door access export against your terminated employee roster and flags any badge still marked active for someone who has already left. Use this if a departed employee's badge has ever kept working on the front door for weeks after their last day because offboarding cleaned up their laptop and SSO but nobody told building security.

jobs.name: Badge/Registration Printing Prep Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before the cutoff to send the final attendee list to badge printing or your registration desk, so nobody's stuck hand-writing name tags the morning of the event. Use this if a badge printer has ever needed the list "by end of day" and you found out that morning.

jobs.name: Bank Fee Anomaly Check
jobs.description: Compares this period's bank account fee line items against a rolling historical baseline and flags fees that are new or unusually high. Use this if your bank statements tend to accumulate small "wire fee" or "maintenance fee" charges that quietly creep up and are worth disputing before they become normal.

jobs.name: Bank Statement Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares your internal ledger against a bank/card statement export and flags transactions present in one but not the other, plus any balance mismatch. Use this if your books have ever quietly drifted from what the bank actually shows and you only found out at tax time.

jobs.name: Bank Travel Notification & Foreign Fee Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to set travel notices on your cards and check foreign transaction fees before an international trip. Use this if a card has ever been frozen for "suspicious activity" the moment you tried to pay for dinner in another country.

jobs.name: Banquet Event Order (BEO) Change Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews banquet event orders revised close to their event date and flags changes that may not have reached the kitchen, banquet, or AV teams in time. Use this if a last-minute headcount or menu change on a BEO has ever reached the kitchen after prep was already done, because the revision only got emailed to one person.

jobs.name: Bed Hold Billing Reminder
jobs.description: Checks active bed-hold records for residents who are temporarily away (for example, on a hospital stay) and flags any hold that's missing a billing entry or is getting close to the maximum allowed bed-hold days. Use this if a room has ever been released too early, or a bed-hold stretch went unbilled, because nobody was watching the clock on it.

jobs.name: Beneficiary Designation Review Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to review beneficiary designations on your insurance policies and retirement accounts once they haven't been checked in a while. Use this if a beneficiary has ever gone unchanged for years through a marriage, divorce, or new child without anyone catching it.

jobs.name: Benefits Open Enrollment Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Counts down to the open-enrollment deadline and flags employees who haven't submitted elections yet. Use this if open enrollment has ever closed with people accidentally defaulting to no coverage or last year's plan.

jobs.name: BGP Route Leak / Hijack Detection
jobs.description: Compares your currently observed BGP origin AS for each monitored prefix against the expected AS and flags mismatches. Use this if one of your IP blocks has ever been hijacked or leaked by another network and the first anyone heard about it was a customer reachability complaint, not a routing alert.

jobs.name: Bill Due Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you a few days before a recurring monthly bill is due. Use this if you've ever paid a late fee just because you forgot the date.

jobs.name: Bill Rate vs Pay Rate Margin Drift Check
jobs.description: Recomputes the markup margin between what each client is billed and what each worker is paid on active placements, and flags any that have drifted below a minimum threshold. Use this if a payroll burden or tax rate change has ever quietly eroded margin on placements nobody re-priced.

jobs.name: Billable Utilization Rate Check
jobs.description: Calculates each staff member's billable-hours utilization rate (billable hours divided by available hours) for the current period and flags anyone trending below the agency's target percentage. Use this if you want an early warning that a team member is under-booked before it shows up as a revenue shortfall at month end.

jobs.name: Billed Rate Card Deviation Check
jobs.description: Compares the hourly rate actually billed to clients for each staff member's logged time against that role's standard rate card and flags entries billed below the card rate without an approved discount on file. Use this if a project manager has ever quietly billed a senior strategist's hours at a junior rate to keep a client happy, and the margin leak only showed up months later at the profitability review.

jobs.name: Bin Capacity Overflow Check
jobs.description: Compares units stored in each bin against that bin's rated capacity and flags any bin holding more than it's supposed to. Use this if a bin has ever been packed past what it can safely or physically hold because nobody was checking stored quantity against the bin's own rating, only against the SKU's stock level.

jobs.name: Bin Location Mismatch Check
jobs.description: Compares the bin/shelf location recorded in the inventory system against the location from the most recent scan for each SKU and flags mismatches, which usually mean stock was put away in the wrong spot. Use this if a picker has ever gone to the recorded location for a SKU and found nothing there, even though the system said plenty was in stock.

jobs.name: Binder-to-Policy Conversion Tracker
jobs.description: Checks outstanding insurance binders (temporary proof-of-coverage issued before a carrier formally issues the policy) and flags any binder approaching its expiration date without a matching policy number on file. Use this if coverage has ever quietly gone unconfirmed because a client kept operating on a 30- or 60-day binder that expired before the carrier ever issued the actual policy.

jobs.name: Binding Estimate Follow-Up Drafts
jobs.description: Reviews binding and non-binding moving estimates sent to prospects and drafts a friendly follow-up message for anyone who hasn't booked their move within a set number of days. Use this if an estimate has ever gone out to a prospect and then quietly disappeared because nobody remembered to check back in before they booked with a competitor.

jobs.name: Birthday Gift Planning Reminder
jobs.description: Checks a tracked list of upcoming birthdays and reminds you far enough ahead to plan or order a gift before the date arrives. Use this if you've ever realized a birthday was two days away with no gift lined up and had to scramble.

jobs.name: Board Action Item Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Checks action items from recent board meeting minutes and flags any that are overdue with no update. Use this if a board commitment has ever quietly died between meetings because nobody tracked it after the minutes were filed away.

jobs.name: Board/Commission Vacancy Check
jobs.description: Checks a roster of appointed board and commission seats for anything currently vacant or with a term ending soon, so a replacement can be found before there's a quorum problem. Use this if a board has ever missed a meeting for lack of quorum because two members' terms lapsed at once and nobody had started the appointment process.

jobs.name: Board Meeting Quorum Check
jobs.description: Checks confirmed attendance for an upcoming board meeting against your bylaws' quorum requirement and flags it if you're short. Use this if a board meeting has ever had its votes questioned — or been called off outright — because not enough members had confirmed until it was too late to reschedule.

jobs.name: Board Member Term Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks board roster term-end dates and flags members approaching the end of their term with no renewal or replacement decided yet. Use this if a board seat has ever gone stale — someone stayed on past their term by default, or a seat sat empty — because nobody was tracking term dates.

jobs.name: Board Term Limit Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks how many consecutive terms each board member has served against your bylaws' maximum, and flags anyone at or past the limit regardless of when their current term happens to end. Use this if a board member has ever been renewed on autopilot past the number of consecutive terms your bylaws actually allow, because the renewal decision only looked at "is this person still willing to serve," not "are they still eligible."

jobs.name: Boarding/Kennel Checkout Reminder
jobs.description: Lists pets scheduled to check out of boarding today or tomorrow, plus anyone past their scheduled checkout with no extension logged. Use this if a boarded pet has ever stayed an extra unplanned day because nobody cross-checked the boarding calendar against who was actually still there.

jobs.name: Boarding Closure Notification Check
jobs.description: Cross-checks upcoming boarding reservations against planned facility closure dates (holidays the business itself is closed, a scheduled renovation) and drafts a heads-up message for any affected client who hasn't been notified yet. Use this if a client has ever shown up for a drop-off only to find out on arrival that the facility would be closed or running limited hours during part of their pet's stay.

jobs.name: Boarding Reservation Deposit Collection Check
jobs.description: Lists upcoming boarding reservations that don't yet have a deposit recorded as collected, so the front desk can follow up before drop-off. Use this if you've ever had a client cancel a booked stay last-minute with no deposit on file to cover the lost slot.

jobs.name: Boarding Facility Temperature/HVAC Log Check
jobs.description: Reads a logged temperature reading for your boarding or daycare space and alerts if it's outside a safe range for the animals kenneled there. Use this if an HVAC failure has ever gone unnoticed overnight and left boarded pets in an uncomfortable or unsafe kennel area.

jobs.name: Boarding Daily Feeding Log Completeness Check
jobs.description: Compares today's list of pets currently boarding against the feeding log and flags any pet with no feeding entry recorded for today. Use this if a boarded pet's feeding has ever been missed or skipped during a busy shift because nobody double-checked the log against who was actually still on site.

jobs.name: Boarding/Kennel Capacity Utilization Check
jobs.description: Compares today's occupied boarding runs/kennels against total capacity and warns when utilization crosses a threshold. Use this if the front desk has ever accepted a boarding reservation only to discover at drop-off that every run was already full — this tracks overall occupancy, distinct from boarding-checkout-reminder.yaml which tracks individual checkout dates.

jobs.name: Boarding Run Turnover Cleaning Check
jobs.description: Checks kennel/run turnover records for runs with a new pet checking in soon and flags any where no cleaning has been logged since the previous occupant checked out. Use this if a run has ever been assigned to a new boarder before anyone confirmed it was actually cleaned after the last guest left.

jobs.name: Bill of Lading Freight Class Accuracy Audit
jobs.description: Reviews recent bills of lading for freight class or NMFC codes that look mismatched against the described commodity, which is a common cause of reclassification fees. Use this if a shipment has ever come back with a surprise reclass charge because the BOL freight class didn't match what was actually shipped.

jobs.name: Bond & CD Maturity Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a bond or certificate of deposit reaches its maturity date. Use this if a CD has ever auto-renewed into a worse rate because the maturity date crept up unnoticed.

jobs.name: Book Club Reading Schedule Check
jobs.description: Compares today's date against your book club's reading schedule and tells you how many pages/chapters you should have finished by now. Use this if you've ever shown up to book club having read nothing because you lost track of the pace.

jobs.name: High-Value Booking Deposit Collection Check
jobs.description: Flags upcoming appointments above a price threshold that don't have a deposit recorded yet. Use this if a client has ever no-showed a $300 package because no deposit was collected and there was nothing on the line for them to lose.

jobs.name: Booking Retainer Collection Check
jobs.description: Checks confirmed photography bookings for retainers (deposits) that haven't been collected within the required window before the session, and flags them. Use this if a client date has ever gone uncollected on the retainer and then the client canceled last-minute, leaving that date unbookable by anyone else and unpaid for.

jobs.name: BOPIS Order Fulfillment Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks buy-online-pickup-in-store orders for how long it took staff to mark them ready for pickup after the order was placed, and flags any that took longer than the promised pickup window. Use this if you advertise a "ready in an hour" (or similar) pickup promise and want to know when the store is falling behind before a customer shows up to an order that isn't ready.

jobs.name: Brand Deal Deliverable Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares what you actually posted for a brand deal against the quantity and type negotiated in the contract, not just whether a due date passed. Use this if a sponsor has ever quietly gotten fewer posts than they paid for because each individual deliverable technically "went out eventually" and nobody ever added them up against the deal.

jobs.name: Brand Deal Payment Followup Check
jobs.description: Checks sponsor invoices against their agreed payment due date and flags anything overdue and unpaid. Use this if a sponsor has ever gone quiet on an invoice and you only noticed the payment never showed up weeks later.

jobs.name: Brand Guideline Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks recently submitted client deliverables for a "brand-reviewed" sign-off or checklist item, and flags any that are missing it before they go out to the client. Use this if a deliverable has ever shipped to a client without a proper brand-compliance check because it slipped through in the rush to hit a deadline.

jobs.name: Brand Guideline Violation External Watch
jobs.description: Reviews external sites where your brand shows up — partner pages, reseller listings, press mentions, directory profiles — for outdated logos, wrong colors, or misused brand names that violate your current brand guidelines. Use this if you've ever discovered months later that a partner was still using your old logo or a mangled version of your name on their public site.

jobs.name: Brand Share of Voice Check
jobs.description: Compares how often your brand is mentioned online versus a list of named competitors over a recent window, flagging a real shift in share of voice. Use this if a competitor has ever quietly out-marketed you and the first sign was a sales rep mentioning it in a deal review instead of a share-of-voice report catching the trend.

jobs.name: Breeder/Kennel Bulk-Client Vaccination Compliance Check
jobs.description: Reviews commercial breeder and kennel accounts with multiple animals on file and checks whether every animal in the litter or kennel group is current on core vaccines, not just the ones brought in individually. Use this if a breeder's litter has ever had some puppies vaccinated and others quietly missed because tracking happened per-visit instead of per-account — distinct from puppy-kitten-vaccine-series-compliance-check.yaml, which tracks one individual patient's multi-dose series rather than compliance across an entire bulk-client group.

jobs.name: Bridge Transaction Stuck/Failed Monitor
jobs.description: Checks whether a cross-chain bridge transfer has completed on the destination chain within an expected time window, and flags it if it's stuck or failed. Use this if you've ever bridged funds and had no idea whether to keep waiting or start troubleshooting.

jobs.name: Broken Campaign Link Check
jobs.description: Requests each active campaign's landing page URL and flags any that return an error instead of loading. Use this if paid traffic has ever kept flowing to a campaign whose landing page was quietly down or redirecting to a 404.

jobs.name: Broken Link Check
jobs.description: Checks a list of URLs and reports any that are dead. Use this if your site or docs have outbound/internal links that quietly rot over time.

jobs.name: Broken Link Check Across Published Articles
jobs.description: Curls every outbound link listed in a file of published-article links and flags any that no longer return a working response. Use this if a published piece has ever quietly rotted with dead citation or source links because nobody rechecked them after the article went live.

jobs.name: Budget Appropriation Submission Deadline Check
jobs.description: Warns you before an agency's budget appropriation submission is due. Use this if a department has ever missed its window to request funding for the next cycle because the internal deadline snuck up during budget season chaos.

jobs.name: Budget Overspend Check
jobs.description: Compares this month's spend in a budget category against your limit and warns if you're over. Use this if you set budgets once and then never actually check them until the month's already blown.

jobs.name: Budget vs. Actual Variance Report
jobs.description: Compares budgeted vs. actual spend across every category or department in one pass and reports the percentage variance for each, not just a single category's pass/fail. Use this if you need a monthly variance report across a whole budget (department, project, or household), which is different from budget-overspend-check watching one category's limit.

jobs.name: Bundle Component Stock Mismatch Check
jobs.description: Checks each product bundle/kit against the stock of its individual components and flags any bundle still marked in-stock while one of its components is actually out. Use this if a bundle has ever sold through checkout only for fulfillment to discover one piece of it was unavailable, because the bundle's own stock flag wasn't tied to its components.

jobs.name: Bundle Margin Erosion Check
jobs.description: Recomputes each product bundle's actual margin from its current component costs and flags any bundle that has fallen below its target margin. Use this if a supplier cost increase on one bundle component has ever quietly eaten a bundle's profit for a whole quarter before anyone recalculated it.

jobs.name: Bus Driver Certification Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks school bus driver certifications and CDL endorsements (distinct from classroom teacher certifications) for ones expiring soon, and flags them. Use this if you want advance warning before a bus driver's certification lapses and routes have to be reshuffled last-minute.

jobs.name: Business License Renewal Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a specific business license or permit (liquor, contractor, professional, health department, etc.) reaches its renewal deadline. Use this if a license has ever lapsed because its renewal date lived only in someone's memory instead of a calendar.

jobs.name: CACFP Meal Claim Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks whether this month's USDA Child and Adult Care Food Program (CACFP) meal counts are complete and flags the claim submission deadline as it approaches. Use this if a meal-count gap or a missed claim window has ever cost the center reimbursement money it was otherwise entitled to.

jobs.name: Calendar Buffer Time Check
jobs.description: Checks your calendar export for back-to-back meetings with zero buffer time between them, and flags days that are packed too tight. Use this if you routinely walk out of one call straight into another with no time to think, take notes, or just breathe.

jobs.name: Calendar Double-Booking Check
jobs.description: Checks today's calendar for overlapping meetings and flags them. Use this if you've ever accepted two invites for the same slot and only noticed when both started ringing.

jobs.name: Campaign Asset Approval Turnaround Check
jobs.description: Checks how long submitted creative assets (ads, graphics, videos) have been sitting in "pending client approval" status and flags the ones that have gone past a normal turnaround window. Use this if finished creative work regularly stalls waiting on a client's yes/no and the account team only finds out when the campaign launch date is already at risk.

jobs.name: Campaign ROAS/CPA Anomaly Check
jobs.description: Checks a campaign's return-on-ad-spend against a minimum threshold and flags a real collapse. Use this if a campaign has ever kept spending its normal daily budget while ROAS quietly cratered because a bid strategy or targeting change nobody caught broke conversion efficiency.

jobs.name: Campaign UTM Tracking Check
jobs.description: Checks a list of campaign links for missing or malformed UTM parameters before (or after) launch. Use this if a campaign has ever run for a week with broken tracking, making every attribution report for that period useless.

jobs.name: Cancellation Rate Spike Check
jobs.description: Checks yesterday's reservation cancellation rate against your trailing baseline and flags a spike. Use this if a booking-engine glitch, a rate error, or bad local news has ever driven a wave of cancellations that wasn't caught until the week's occupancy numbers came in soft.

jobs.name: Cancellation Waitlist Fill Check
jobs.description: Flags newly opened appointment slots from cancellations that haven't been offered to anyone on the waitlist yet. Use this if a slot has ever opened up from a cancellation and just sat empty because nobody thought to check the waitlist before the day ended.

jobs.name: Candidate Availability Roster Staleness Check
jobs.description: Flags candidates in the available-for-work pool whose availability status hasn't been confirmed in a while, so recruiters don't submit someone who's actually already taken another job. Use this if you've ever pitched a "bench-ready" candidate to a client only to find out they started elsewhere two weeks ago.

jobs.name: Candidate Certification/Skills-Test Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks bench candidates' job-specific certifications and skills-test results (e.g. forklift license, typing test, ServSafe) against their expiry dates and flags anyone whose credential has lapsed before they get submitted to a client. Use this if a candidate has ever been submitted for a role on the strength of a certification that had actually already expired.

jobs.name: Candidate Data Retention Purge Check
jobs.description: Flags rejected or withdrawn candidates whose records have sat past your data retention policy window and are due for a purge review. Use this if candidate application data has ever piled up indefinitely in your ATS because nobody was checking it against how long your own retention policy actually says you can keep it.

jobs.name: Candidate Experience Survey Follow-up
jobs.description: Reviews post-interview candidate experience survey responses and flags low scores or negative comments for a recruiter to look at. Use this if a candidate has ever left a rough interview experience unaddressed because nobody was reading the survey results.

jobs.name: Candidate Follow-up Nudge
jobs.description: Flags interviewed candidates who haven't heard back in a while. Use this if candidates have ever gone quiet after a final interview simply because nobody circled back with a decision.

jobs.name: Candidate No-Show/Attendance Pattern Check
jobs.description: Scans recent assignment attendance records for workers with repeated no-shows or late arrivals and flags the pattern before it becomes a client complaint. Use this if a client has ever called to complain about a worker's attendance before the agency's own records had caught the same pattern.

jobs.name: Candidate Timesheet Submission Overdue Check
jobs.description: Scans active placements for timesheets that haven't been submitted after the pay period closed and flags who's overdue. Use this if payroll has ever been delayed because a temp worker's timesheet didn't come in and nobody caught it until the run was already late.

jobs.name: Candidate Withdrawal Reason Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews candidates who withdrew themselves from the process (not rejected by you) and looks for recurring themes in why, like comp expectations, timeline, or a competing offer. Use this if candidates have ever quietly dropped out of your pipeline one at a time, each looking like an isolated case, while the same underlying reason kept costing you good candidates.

jobs.name: Canned Response Content Quality Check
jobs.description: Scans your saved macros/canned responses for mechanical problems (broken links, leftover placeholder tokens) and, on top of that, has an agent read them for tone and accuracy. Use this if a macro has ever gone out to a customer with an unfilled {{customer_name}} token or a link to a page that no longer exists, because nobody proofreads macros after they're written.

jobs.name: Canonical Tag Check
jobs.description: Checks a list of pages for missing or self-conflicting canonical tags. Use this if a templating bug has ever pointed every page's canonical at the homepage (or nowhere at all) without anyone noticing.

jobs.name: Capital Gains Distribution Watch
jobs.description: Checks a log of upcoming mutual fund/ETF capital gains distribution dates and flags any within your lookahead window. Use this if a fund's year-end capital gains distribution has ever surprised you with a tax bill you could have planned around, or avoided by not buying in right before it.

jobs.name: Capital Project Budget Variance Check
jobs.description: Checks utility infrastructure capital projects, like substation upgrades or water main replacements, for spending that has drifted past their approved budget by more than an allowed margin. Use this if you manage capital works and want to catch a project running over budget before it shows up as a surprise at the quarterly review.

jobs.name: Capital Improvement Project Milestone Check
jobs.description: Checks your agency's capital improvement plan (CIP) tracker for project milestones (design complete, bid award, groundbreaking, substantial completion) due soon or already past due and still marked incomplete, then summarizes which projects are at risk of slipping. Use this if a capital project has ever quietly fallen behind schedule for months before it showed up as a surprise in a budget or council update.

jobs.name: Capital Reserve Fund Threshold Check
jobs.description: Compares each property's or HOA's capital reserve fund balance against its target minimum and flags any that have dropped below threshold. Use this if a roof or elevator replacement has ever turned into a surprise special assessment because nobody was watching the reserve balance drift down over time.

jobs.name: Car Insurance Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you of an upcoming personal auto insurance renewal date with enough lead time to shop rates before it auto-renews. Use this if you've ever let a policy renew at a higher rate simply because you forgot to compare quotes in time.

jobs.name: Car Maintenance Due Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you when a car maintenance task (oil change, registration, etc.) is coming due by date. Use this if you've ever found out your registration expired because a sticker in the mail got ignored.

jobs.name: Care Plan Review Due Reminder
jobs.description: Checks each resident's individualized care plan against its required periodic review interval and flags any resident whose review is due or overdue. Use this if you want to catch care plans that are about to lapse before they become an overdue-review finding during a state survey.

jobs.name: Careers Page Link Check
jobs.description: Checks that every "Apply" link on your careers page actually loads instead of 404ing or redirecting to a dead posting. Use this if a job ad has ever driven traffic to an apply link that silently broke after an ATS migration or a posting got taken down.

jobs.name: Cargo Insurance Claim Status Check
jobs.description: Checks open cargo loss/damage insurance claims for ones that have gone quiet and need a follow-up push. Use this if a damaged-freight claim has ever sat untouched with the insurer for months because nobody was tracking it against the filing deadline or a status update.

jobs.name: Carrier Appointment Renewal Tracker (Per State)
jobs.description: Checks each carrier appointment your agency holds — the carrier's authorization for the agency to sell and service its products in a given state — against its renewal or termination date and flags any expiring soon. Use this if the agency has ever kept quoting a carrier's product in a state after that carrier-agency appointment quietly lapsed, putting every bound policy at risk of being unwound.

jobs.name: Carrier Certificate of Insurance Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each carrier's certificate of insurance on file against its expiry date and warns before it lapses. Use this if a load has ever moved on a carrier whose cargo or auto liability coverage had already quietly expired, leaving you uninsured if something went wrong.

jobs.name: Carrier Load Tender Acceptance Check
jobs.description: Checks recently tendered loads for carriers that haven't accepted or rejected within the expected window. Use this if a tendered load has ever sat unconfirmed until the ship date was already at risk.

jobs.name: Carrier On-Time Delivery Performance Scorecard
jobs.description: Tracks each carrier's on-time delivery rate over recent shipments and flags any carrier that's dropped below your target. Use this if a carrier's reliability has ever quietly slipped for months before a customer complaint made it obvious.

jobs.name: Carrier Rate Contract Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks tracked carrier rate agreements against their expiry date and warns before they lapse. Use this if a freight contract has ever quietly expired and shipments kept moving on it anyway, until a rate dispute surfaced with no valid agreement backing it.

jobs.name: Carrier Tender Rejection Rate Watch
jobs.description: Aggregates how often each carrier has rejected load tenders over a recent period and flags carriers rejecting more than your threshold. Use this if a "reliable" core carrier has ever quietly started rejecting a growing share of your loads, forcing you onto the spot market at a worse rate, before a scorecard caught the trend.

jobs.name: Cart Abandonment Follow-up
jobs.description: Finds abandoned shopping carts old enough to follow up on, and can draft the follow-up email for you. Use this if abandoned-cart recovery is something you know you should do but never get to.

jobs.name: Cart Tax Calculation Error Check
jobs.description: Recomputes expected sales tax for recent orders from the subtotal and rate that should have applied, and flags any order where what was actually charged doesn't match. Use this if a stale tax rate table or a rounding bug has ever quietly over- or under-charged customers for weeks before anyone reconciled it.

jobs.name: Cash Flow Forecast Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares actual cash inflows and outflows for the period against what the cash-flow forecast projected, and flags the categories where the gap is bigger than expected. Use this if your cash forecast has ever quietly drifted from reality for weeks before anyone checked, leaving no early warning of a coming cash crunch or windfall.

jobs.name: Cash Office Deposit Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares the bank deposit slip amount against the store's total reported cash sales for the day and flags a mismatch. Use this if a bank deposit has ever come up short of what the registers reported for days before anyone in accounting reconciled it back to a specific store.

jobs.name: Cashier Drawer Overage/Shortage Pattern Check
jobs.description: Looks at each cashier's till over/short amounts across their last several shifts to spot a recurring pattern of consistently coming up short or consistently over, rather than one-off counting mistakes. Use this if you want to catch a slow drip of cash loss or a training gap tied to one specific employee, instead of only reviewing a single day's totals.

jobs.name: Catastrophe Event Exposure Monitor
jobs.description: Cross-references active policies against a catastrophe (hurricane, wildfire, earthquake, flood) event footprint and estimates policy-count and total insured value exposure inside the impact zone. Use this if a CAT event has ever hit before anyone had a fast answer to "how many policies do we have in that area, and what's our exposure."

jobs.name: Catering Headcount Finalization Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before the caterer's final-guaranteed-headcount deadline passes, since most caterers lock in (and bill for) that number and won't take changes after. Use this if you've ever paid for meals nobody ate, or run short, because the final count deadline slipped by unnoticed.

jobs.name: CDN Cache Purge Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to purge the CDN cache after a deploy, based on a marker file your deploy script leaves behind. Use this if you've ever shipped a fix and then spent an hour confused why users still saw the old version.

jobs.name: Professional CE Credit Hour Tally Check
jobs.description: Adds up logged continuing-education credit hours against what's required by your licensing period deadline and warns if you're pacing behind. Use this if your professional license requires a set number of CE hours per renewal cycle and you've ever scrambled to cram them in during the last month.

jobs.name: Professional Certification Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a professional certification expires or its renewal window opens. Use this if you've ever let a cert lapse and had to retake an exam that a renewal course would've avoided.

jobs.name: Certificate of Insurance Request Check
jobs.description: Checks for incoming certificate-of-insurance (COI) requests from vendors, clients, or landlords that haven't been fulfilled yet. Use this if a COI request has ever sat unanswered long enough to hold up a contract or a lease signing.

jobs.name: Certificate Transparency Watch
jobs.description: Checks public Certificate Transparency logs for new TLS certs issued for your domain and flags any you didn't expect. Use this if you want an early warning for someone issuing a cert for your domain without your knowledge (a common precursor to phishing/MITM setups).

jobs.name: Booth/Chair Rental Payment Tracker
jobs.description: Flags independent contractors renting a booth or chair whose weekly or monthly rent payment hasn't been logged as received by the due date. Use this if a chair renter has ever fallen a month behind on booth rent before anyone at the front desk noticed.

jobs.name: Champion Departure Watch
jobs.description: Checks whether your champion or economic-buyer contact at open or recently-closed accounts has left the company, using bounce signals or a job-change lookup, and drafts a plan to find the new point of contact. Use this if a deal has ever gone quiet for weeks before you found out your one internal advocate had already left the company.

jobs.name: Change Order Approval Reminder
jobs.description: Flags change orders that have been waiting on client sign-off too long. Use this if work has ever stalled, or gone ahead unapproved, because a change order sat in someone's inbox for weeks.

jobs.name: Changelog Digest
jobs.description: Rolls up recent commits into a draft changelog entry your users could actually read. Use this if you ship regularly but always write the changelog as an afterthought (or skip it).

jobs.name: Changeover Time Tracker
jobs.description: Compares logged changeover/setup durations against a target and flags the ones that ran long. Use this if a slow product changeover has ever eaten into a shift's output without anyone tracing the lost hours back to the setup itself.

jobs.name: Podcast Chapter Marker Completeness Check
jobs.description: Checks that a newly published episode's audio file has chapter markers embedded before flagging it as missing. Use this if you've ever promised tappable chapters in the show notes but forgot the embedding step and shipped a flat, unchaptered file.

jobs.name: Chargeback Dispute Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Checks open credit-card chargeback disputes against their bank- or processor-set response deadline and flags the ones coming due soon. Use this if you've ever missed a chargeback response window and lost a dispute you could have won simply because nobody was tracking the clock.

jobs.name: Chargeback Fraud Risk Order Review
jobs.description: Scores new orders against common fraud signals — billing/shipping country mismatch, high order value from a first-time customer, and rush shipping on an unverified address — and flags the risky ones before they ship. Use this if a chargeback has ever landed on an order that, in hindsight, had obvious red flags nobody checked before fulfillment.

jobs.name: Charitable Solicitation Registration Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks your state-by-state charitable solicitation registrations against each one's renewal deadline and flags any about to lapse. Use this if your organization has ever fundraised in a state where its registration had quietly expired, risking fines or a forced pause on soliciting donors there, because each state runs on its own renewal calendar and nobody was tracking all of them in one place.

jobs.name: Live Chat Abandonment Rate Check
jobs.description: Checks what percentage of live chat sessions get abandoned by the customer before an agent ever replies. Use this if a customer has ever given up and left a chat queue silently, which never shows up in response-time metrics because a chat that got no reply also never got a response time recorded against it.

jobs.name: Chat Channel Sprawl Audit
jobs.description: Scans a chat/Slack channel activity export and flags channels whose message volume has dropped below a threshold, so quiet channels get noticed for archiving instead of piling up forever. Use this if your workspace has ever grown to hundreds of channels and nobody could tell which ones were actually still in use versus abandoned relics from a project that ended a year ago.

jobs.name: Cheat/Exploit Report Triage
jobs.description: Reviews the backlog of player-submitted cheat and exploit reports and groups them by likely severity so your trust & safety team knows what to look at first. Use this if a cheating wave has ever gone unchecked for days because reports piled up in a queue nobody triaged.

jobs.name: Checkout Conversion Drop Watch
jobs.description: Compares today's checkout completion rate against your recent baseline and flags a real drop. Use this if a checkout bug has ever silently cut conversion for a day or two before anyone noticed sales looked soft.

jobs.name: Chimney Inspection Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to get your chimney and flue inspected/swept based on how long it's been since the last inspection. Use this if you burn wood regularly and don't want creosote buildup to turn into a chimney fire.

jobs.name: Chronic Absenteeism Tracker
jobs.description: Calculates each student's missed-day percentage for the term and flags anyone crossing the chronic-absenteeism threshold. Use this if a student has ever quietly racked up enough missed days to count as chronically absent before anyone outside the attendance office noticed.

jobs.name: Churn Risk Watch
jobs.description: Flags accounts whose usage has dropped off sharply, before they actually cancel. Use this if you only ever find out someone churned after the cancellation email arrives.

jobs.name: CI Build Time Regression Watch
jobs.description: Compares recent CI build durations to a baseline and flags a real slowdown. Use this if build times have ever crept up gradually until a 30-second CI run became a 15-minute one.

jobs.name: Circuit Outage Detection
jobs.description: Pings each monitored circuit endpoint and flags any that are down. Use this if a customer circuit has ever gone dark and nobody on your team noticed until the customer called in.

jobs.name: Circuit Provisioning Order Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags circuit orders that were placed but never activated within a target number of days. Use this if a provisioning order has ever sat in limbo for weeks because the install date fell through the cracks between sales, the carrier, and the field tech.

jobs.name: Open Claim Status Check
jobs.description: Checks the status of any open insurance claims and flags ones that haven't moved in a while. Use this if a claim has ever gone quiet for weeks because nobody was following up with the adjuster.

jobs.name: Claims Aging & Backlog Tracker
jobs.description: Buckets open claims by how long they've been open (0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ days) and flags any bucket that's grown past target so a claims manager can rebalance the queue. Use this if a backlog of aging claims has ever crept up gradually until a regulator or auditor asked why so many were still open past 90 days.

jobs.name: Claims Denial Resubmission Check
jobs.description: Checks denied insurance claims against their payer resubmission or appeal deadline and flags anything still open as the deadline approaches or has already passed. Use this if a denied claim has ever quietly aged past the window to resubmit or appeal it, turning recoverable revenue into a write-off nobody meant to take.

jobs.name: Claims Insurance Valuation Mismatch Check
jobs.description: Cross-checks filed damaged-goods claims against the coverage level the customer actually declared on file (released value vs. full-value protection) and flags any claim whose requested payout doesn't match what their coverage supports. Use this if a payout dispute has ever blown up after the fact because a claim was processed against the wrong valuation tier nobody double-checked first.

jobs.name: Claims Reserve Adequacy Review
jobs.description: Reviews open claims where the current reserve looks out of step with claim severity indicators (medical treatment still ongoing, litigation filed, total loss, etc.) and flags candidates for a reserve adjustment. Use this if a reserve has ever sat unchanged for months while the actual claim facts moved on, throwing off loss-ratio and reinsurance numbers until an audit caught the gap.

jobs.name: Class Attendance Trend Report
jobs.description: Pulls week-over-week attendance per class and drafts a short summary of which classes are trending up, flat, or declining. Use this if you've ever made a gut-feel call to cut or promote a class without actually looking at whether attendance was trending down for a month or just had one off week.

jobs.name: Class Utilization Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming class signups against capacity and flags classes running well under-booked. Use this if a class has ever quietly run half-empty for months before anyone pulled the numbers and considered cutting or rescheduling it.

jobs.name: Class Waitlist Overflow Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming classes for waitlists that have grown past a threshold, a sign there's enough demand to justify adding another session. Use this if a popular class has ever kept a long waitlist for months without anyone noticing there was room to add a second time slot.

jobs.name: Classroom Lesson Plan Submission Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks whether each classroom's weekly curriculum/lesson plan has been submitted for the current week and flags any classroom still missing one. Use this if a classroom has ever gone into a new week without a posted lesson plan because it fell through the cracks during a busy Friday — something licensing inspectors and accreditation reviewers routinely check for.

jobs.name: Classroom Sanitation Log Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks each classroom's daily toy, table, and surface cleaning log against the required number of logged cleanings and flags any classroom that's short today. Use this if a classroom has ever gone a full day without toys or high-touch surfaces actually getting sanitized because a busy shift meant the log — and the task — got skipped.

jobs.name: Classroom Supply Low Stock Check
jobs.description: Checks consumable classroom supplies like diapers, wipes, and formula against a reorder threshold per item and flags anything running low. Use this if a classroom has ever run out of diapers or wipes mid-day because nobody noticed the shelf was nearly empty.

jobs.name: Client Churn Risk Check
jobs.description: Scans recurring clients' cleaning history for a dropped frequency (their gap since the last completed clean has grown well past their expected interval) or repeated recent cancellations, and flags them as an early churn-risk signal. Use this if a recurring client has ever quietly stopped booking and nobody noticed until they'd already switched to a competitor.

jobs.name: Unpaid Invoice Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks invoices issued to cleaning clients against your standard aging buckets (30/60/90 days) and flags any that are still unpaid past the threshold you set. Use this if recurring or one-off cleaning jobs have ever gone unpaid for weeks because nobody was tracking which invoices had quietly slipped past due.

jobs.name: Client Appointment Reminder Drafts
jobs.description: Reads tomorrow's scheduled cleanings and drafts a short reminder message for each client confirming the date, time window, and crew name, so someone just has to review and send. Use this if a client has ever forgotten they had a cleaning booked, leaving the crew locked out or the home/office not ready.

jobs.name: Client Birthday Reward Reminder
jobs.description: Finds clients with a birthday coming up in the next window and drafts a personal birthday message with their reward or discount. Use this if a client has ever mentioned "you sent a birthday text last year, my old salon never did that" — this keeps that habit from depending on someone remembering to do it.

jobs.name: Client Churn-Risk Check
jobs.description: Reviews recent missed or skipped visits and open complaints per client and flags accounts crossing your churn-risk thresholds, then drafts a short outreach note for each one. Use this if a long-time client has ever cancelled without warning, and you later realized they'd had two missed visits and an unresolved complaint in the month before they left.

jobs.name: Client Staffing Contract Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Flags client service agreements approaching their renewal or expiry date so account managers can start the renewal conversation early. Use this if a client contract has ever lapsed silently and put an active placement's billing in a gray area.

jobs.name: Client Credit-Limit Exposure Check
jobs.description: Compares each client's outstanding accounts-receivable balance against their approved credit limit and flags anyone over or close to the limit before more workers get placed with them. Use this if the agency has ever kept staffing a client whose unpaid balance had already blown past their credit limit.

jobs.name: Client Emergency Contact Staleness Check
jobs.description: Flags clients whose emergency contact and authorized-decision-maker information hasn't been confirmed in a while. Use this if you've ever needed to reach someone about a boarded or daycare pet and found the phone number on file was disconnected or years out of date.

jobs.name: Client Gallery Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Flags client online photo galleries approaching their auto-expiry or take-down date so a reminder can go out in time to download images or order prints. Use this if a client has ever emailed asking for their photos after the gallery link already stopped working.

jobs.name: Client Invoice Payment-Terms Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks outstanding client invoices against their agreed payment terms and flags anything past due, since a staffing agency has to pay workers every week regardless of when clients pay. Use this if slow-paying clients have ever squeezed cash flow before anyone noticed how far past terms an invoice had gone.

jobs.name: Client Onboarding Checklist Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks recently signed clients against the standard onboarding checklist (kickoff call scheduled, contracts countersigned, brand assets received, billing contact confirmed, platform/account access granted) and flags anyone still missing a step past the target window. Use this if a new client has ever reached their first deliverable deadline before the team realized nobody ever got ad-account access or a signed brand style guide.

jobs.name: Client Payment Plan Delinquency Check
jobs.description: Checks active client payment plans (e.g. for a large surgery or emergency bill) against their installment schedule and flags anyone who's missed a payment. Use this if a payment plan has ever quietly gone delinquent for months because nobody was cross-checking installment due dates against what actually came in.

jobs.name: Client Quote Follow-Up Drafts
jobs.description: Reviews cleaning quotes sent to prospects and drafts a friendly follow-up message for anyone who hasn't accepted, declined, or replied within a set number of days.
