jobs.name: IAM Key Rotation Reminder
jobs.description: Checks how old your IAM access keys are and flags any past your rotation age. Use this if you've ever found a years-old access key still active because nobody was tracking key age.

jobs.name: Idle Cash Sweep Check
jobs.description: Flags brokerage cash that's sat uninvested longer than your target window, so it doesn't quietly miss out on being invested or swept into a money market/high-yield option. Use this if cash from a sold position or a deposit has ever sat earning nothing for months because moving it was never anyone's job.

jobs.name: IEP/504 Review Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Checks upcoming IEP and 504 plan review deadlines and flags any that are close or already past due. Use this if a required review has ever slipped past its compliance deadline because it wasn't on anyone's calendar until a parent or auditor asked about it.

jobs.name: IEP Related-Service Minutes Delivery Tracker
jobs.description: Compares the special education related-service minutes (speech, OT, PT, counseling, etc.) actually delivered against what each student's IEP requires and flags shortfalls. Use this if a student has ever gone weeks under their mandated service minutes because a provider absence or scheduling gap never got tracked against the IEP requirement.

jobs.name: IFTA Quarterly Fuel Tax Report Deadline Check
jobs.description: Warns as the next IFTA (International Fuel Tax Agreement) quarterly filing deadline approaches, based on the standard fixed due dates. Use this if a quarterly fuel tax report has ever been filed late — with the late-filing penalty that comes with it — because the deadline snuck up during a busy month.

jobs.name: Image Alt Text Audit
jobs.description: Checks a page for images missing alt text. Use this if images have ever shipped without alt text because nobody double-checked before merging.

jobs.name: Imaging Equipment Service Interval Check
jobs.description: Tracks manufacturer-recommended preventive maintenance service visits (not accuracy calibration) for x-ray, ultrasound, and CT/MRI units and warns before a scheduled service lapses. Use this if imaging equipment has ever broken down mid-week because a routine service visit was never booked — distinct from diagnostic-equipment-calibration-check.yaml, which tracks accuracy/calibration verification rather than the physical preventive-maintenance service contract interval.

jobs.name: Imaging Order Result Loop-Closure Check
jobs.description: Checks ordered imaging studies (X-ray, CT, MRI, ultrasound) sent to an outside radiology facility for ones where the exam was completed but no report has come back yet. Use this if an imaging order has ever gone out to an outside facility and the report just never made it back to the ordering chart, leaving a finding — sometimes an urgent one — sitting unseen at the radiology end.

jobs.name: Immigration Case Renewal Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks sponsored employees' visa/immigration case status (H-1B, TN, OPT/STEM extension, green card stage, etc.) against upcoming expiration dates and warns with enough lead time to start filing an extension. Use this if a visa extension has ever gotten uncomfortably close to the expiration date because nobody outside the employee and the immigration attorney was watching the calendar.

jobs.name: Pharmacy Immunization Inventory Check
jobs.description: Checks the pharmacy counter's vaccine stock (flu, COVID, and other pharmacist-administered immunizations) against a minimum on-hand level and expiry dates. Use this if you've ever had to turn a walk-in vaccination patient away because the freezer was low or the remaining doses were about to expire.

jobs.name: Immunization Record Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks enrolled children's immunization records against your state's required schedule and flags anyone missing required documentation. Use this if a compliance gap has ever gone unnoticed until a state licensing inspection found it first.

jobs.name: Impermanent Loss Threshold Watch
jobs.description: Estimates the current impermanent loss on a liquidity-pool position by comparing pooled-asset value against simply holding the original assets, and flags it once the loss crosses a threshold you set. Use this if you've ever pulled liquidity out of a pool and only then realized how far behind "just holding" you'd fallen.

jobs.name: In-Kind Donation Acknowledgment Check
jobs.description: Flags in-kind (non-cash) gifts — equipment, supplies, professional services — that haven't received their fair-market-value acknowledgment letter. Use this if an in-kind donor has ever been missed because your cash-donation thank-you workflow doesn't cover gifts that aren't a dollar amount.

jobs.name: In-Kind Donation Valuation Documentation Check
jobs.description: Flags high-value in-kind (non-cash) gifts that are missing the independent appraisal or valuation documentation required to support the fair-market-value stated on the donor's tax records. Use this if a donor has ever claimed a large non-cash deduction backed only by your organization's own estimate, with no appraisal on file to support it if the IRS ever asks.

jobs.name: Inbox Triage
jobs.description: Sorts your unread messages into "needs a reply today" vs. "just FYI" vs. "spam," and drafts quick replies for the easy ones — it never sends anything without you approving it first. Use this if your inbox piles up and you want a head start each morning.

jobs.name: Incident Report Follow-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews open incident reports (a scuffle in daycare, a minor scratch, a gate left open) and drafts a status summary of which ones still need a follow-up action — an owner call, a policy note, a facility fix — before they're closed out. Use this if incident reports have ever piled up without anyone confirming the follow-up actually happened. This is business/administrative tracking, not a medical assessment of any injury.

jobs.name: Incident Report Follow-Up Tracking
jobs.description: Reviews recent incident/injury reports and flags any that are missing a parent notification, a corrective action note, or a required licensing notification. Use this if an incident report has ever sat "filed" with nobody confirming the parent was actually told or that a hazard got fixed, not just written up.

jobs.name: Incident Response Escalation Contact Check
jobs.description: Reviews the incident-response escalation contact list and flags any primary or backup contact who has left the company, changed teams, or whose listed phone/paging info no longer matches the directory. Use this if you've ever pulled up the on-call escalation doc during a real incident and found the first two names on it no longer work here.

jobs.name: Infection Control Outbreak Line-Listing Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews recently logged resident illness symptoms (respiratory, GI, or other infection-control-tracked symptoms) by unit and time window, and flags clusters that look like they could meet an outbreak threshold so infection-control staff can review sooner. Use this if a handful of residents on the same unit have ever come down with similar symptoms within a few days of each other and nobody connected the dots until it had spread further.

jobs.name: Influencer Campaign Deliverable Tracker
jobs.description: Checks influencer and creator partnership contracts for deliverables (posts, stories, mentions) that are past their agreed due date and not yet marked fulfilled. Use this if you've ever paid an influencer up front and then had to chase them down weeks later because nobody was tracking whether the agreed content actually went out.

jobs.name: Infrastructure Asset Inspection Due Tracker
jobs.description: Checks your inventory of bridges, dams, water towers, and other structural public assets against each one's required periodic inspection interval and flags any that are due or overdue. Use this if a required structural inspection has ever slipped past its interval because it was tracked in an inspector's personal notebook instead of a shared schedule.

jobs.name: Injury/Incident Report Follow-up Check
jobs.description: Checks logged injury or incident reports for ones still open past a follow-up window, whether that's a member wellness check-in, an insurance filing, or a facility fix. Use this if an incident has ever been logged the day it happened and then never actually closed out or followed up on.

jobs.name: Inspection Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a scheduled inspection date, so the site is actually ready. Use this if an inspector has ever shown up to a site that wasn't prepped because the date snuck up on the crew.

jobs.name: Insurance Coverage Lapse Check
jobs.description: Looks at every active storage unit rental and flags tenants whose required goods-protection or insurance policy has expired, been canceled, or was never set up in the first place. Use this if your facility requires tenants to carry coverage on their stored belongings as a condition of the lease and you want to catch gaps before a claim (or an audit) exposes them.

jobs.name: Insurance Eligibility Verification Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming appointments for patients whose insurance eligibility hasn't been verified yet, so it gets confirmed before the visit instead of at checkout. Use this if a patient has ever been surprised with a denied claim because eligibility was never checked ahead of time.

jobs.name: Property Insurance Policy Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Flags property insurance policies that are coming up for renewal within a set window. Use this if a policy has ever lapsed because the renewal notice got buried in an inbox and nobody caught it in time.

jobs.name: Inter-Location Transfer Receiving Discrepancy Check
jobs.description: Compares the quantity shipped on an internal stock transfer against the quantity actually logged as received at the destination and flags shortages or overages past a threshold. Use this if a transfer between two of your own locations has ever arrived short or over and nobody noticed until the next count came up wrong at both ends.

jobs.name: Intercompany Balance Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares the intercompany receivable/payable balance one legal entity's books show for a related entity against what the counterparty entity's books show is owed, and flags any pair where the two numbers don't match. Use this if your company has more than one legal entity and closes have ever been delayed because intercompany balances didn't tie out.

jobs.name: Internal Mobility Application Tracker
jobs.description: Flags internal employees who applied to an open req but whose current manager still hasn't been notified within your policy window, the step most internal-transfer processes require before the candidate can move forward. Use this if an internal transfer has ever stalled — or blown up a manager relationship — because the manager found out about the application late, or not from the right person.

jobs.name: International Driving Permit Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before your International Driving Permit (IDP) expires or before an upcoming trip where you'll need one but haven't gotten it yet. Use this if you've ever shown up at a rental counter abroad without the permit and gotten turned away.

jobs.name: International Shipment Documentation Completeness Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming international shipments for missing export/import paperwork before they're due to ship. Use this if a shipment has ever reached the port only to get held up because the commercial invoice or certificate of origin was never finalized.

jobs.name: Interpreter Service Utilization Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks visits for patients with a documented non-English language preference against whether a qualified interpreter (in-person, phone, or video) was logged for that encounter. Use this if a language-access requirement has ever been missed — a patient with limited English proficiency seen without an interpreter logged — a compliance and quality-of-care gap that's easy to lose track of visit by visit.

jobs.name: Interstate Tariff Rate Update Check
jobs.description: Checks how long it's been since your published interstate moving tariff/rate sheet was last updated against a review interval, and flags it as stale if federal or state rate rules may have changed since then. Use this if your tariff has ever sat unreviewed for so long that a quote went out based on rules or rates that were no longer current.

jobs.name: Interview Feedback Overdue Check
jobs.description: Flags interviews that happened but still have no feedback submitted, so the decision doesn't stall waiting on one interviewer. Use this if a candidate has ever been left hanging because feedback from one interviewer never showed up and nobody chased it down.

jobs.name: Interview Feedback Score Divergence Check
jobs.description: Flags candidates whose interview panel submitted wildly different scores, so someone schedules a debrief instead of the decision quietly defaulting to whoever spoke loudest. Use this if a hiring decision has ever moved forward despite one interviewer strongly disagreeing and no one actually discussing it.

jobs.name: Interview Loop Feedback Nag
jobs.description: Checks which interviewers on a hiring loop haven't submitted their scorecard within a set window after the interview. Use this if a hiring decision has ever stalled because one interviewer's feedback never showed up and nobody chased it down.

jobs.name: Candidate No-Show Pattern Check
jobs.description: Counts scheduled-interview no-shows per candidate and flags repeat offenders or a rising overall no-show rate. Use this if a candidate has ever missed more than one scheduled interview without anyone noticing it was a pattern instead of a one-off scheduling mix-up.

jobs.name: Interview Panel Diversity Check
jobs.description: Reviews upcoming interview panel assignments against your panel-diversity guideline and flags panels that don't meet it, in time to add a substitute panelist before the interview happens. Use this if an interview panel has ever gone out the door with every seat filled by the same small rotation of interviewers, undermining a stated commitment to varied panel composition.

jobs.name: Interviewer Certification Check
jobs.description: Cross-checks who's been scheduled to conduct interviews against your list of trained/certified interviewers and flags anyone booked who hasn't completed interviewer training. Use this if someone has ever ended up on an interview panel without having done the structured interviewing or bias-awareness training your process requires.

jobs.name: Interviewer Load Balance Check
jobs.description: Counts how many interviews each interviewer is booked for this week and flags anyone stacked well above the team average. Use this if the same few people always seem to be doing most of the interviewing while others rarely get asked.

jobs.name: Inventory Audit Trail Gap Check
jobs.description: Scans your inventory adjustment log for missing transaction IDs in an otherwise sequential run, and for adjustments logged without a reason code, both signs that a change was made outside the normal audit process. Use this if an inventory adjustment has ever gone through with no record of who did it or why, and nobody noticed until an auditor asked.

jobs.name: Inventory Count Discrepancy Check
jobs.description: Compares a physical inventory count against system records and flags mismatches worth investigating. Use this if shrinkage or data entry errors have ever gone unnoticed until a full audit months later.

jobs.name: Inventory Shrinkage Watch
jobs.description: Tracks the gap between expected and actual inventory over time and flags when shrinkage (theft, damage, data-entry error) crosses a threshold. Use this if shrinkage has ever only gotten noticed at the annual physical count instead of trending visibly for months first.

jobs.name: Inventory Valuation Method Audit Reminder
jobs.description: Ahead of each period close, reminds someone to review inventory valuation assumptions (FIFO, LIFO, or weighted-average costing) for anomalies like a unit cost that jumped sharply or a SKU that quietly switched costing method. Use this if a valuation error has ever only surfaced when the accountant closed the books, instead of getting caught while it could still be fixed.

jobs.name: Inventory Waste Log Review
jobs.description: Reviews the kitchen's waste log for the week and flags which items are being tossed most, in case it's an over-ordering or portioning problem. Use this if food cost keeps creeping up and nobody's sure why.

jobs.name: Invoice Overdue Check
jobs.description: Flags invoices that are past due and still unpaid. Use this if you freelance or run a small business and invoices have ever slipped through the cracks.

jobs.name: IP Address Block Utilization Check
jobs.description: Checks how full each of your allocated IP address blocks is and warns when a block is running low on free addresses. Use this if you've ever had to scramble for a new allocation, or delay a provisioning order, because a subnet quietly filled up and nobody was watching utilization.

jobs.name: Commercial Irrigation System Inspection Scheduling Check
jobs.description: Checks your commercial client list for irrigation systems whose last inspection date has passed the required inspection interval, and flags them so a visit can be scheduled. Use this if a commercial property's sprinkler system has ever run for weeks with a broken head or stuck valve because inspections weren't on anyone's calendar.

jobs.name: Irrigation Need Check
jobs.description: Checks recent rainfall and forecast against a soil-moisture threshold to tell you whether irrigation is actually needed today. Use this if you've ever watered on a fixed schedule and either wasted water after rain or under-watered during a dry stretch.

jobs.name: ISBN Registration Tracker
jobs.description: Flags upcoming titles that don't yet have an ISBN assigned and registered with the relevant agency, checked against their planned publication date. Use this if a title has ever hit its pub date without an ISBN because registration wasn't started early enough.

jobs.name: Job Backlog Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks jobs still sitting unscheduled and flags any that have been waiting longer than your target turnaround. Use this if a customer request has ever gotten stuck in an unscheduled queue for days because it fell below newer, easier-to-book jobs and nobody was watching the backlog's age, only its size.

jobs.name: Job Completion Photo Documentation Check
jobs.description: Checks recently completed jobs for missing before/after photos, the documentation most warranty claims, insurance disputes, and "the tech never showed" complaints hinge on. Use this if a warranty claim or a customer dispute has ever gone badly because nobody could prove what the job site looked like before or after the work.

jobs.name: Job Cost Overrun Alert
jobs.description: Compares each completed job's actual cost against what was quoted or estimated and flags any that ran over by more than your tolerance. Use this if a job has ever quietly bled margin — extra parts, extra labor hours, a misjudged estimate — and nobody noticed until the month's numbers came in low.

jobs.name: Job Posting Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks open job postings against their planned expiry or repost date and flags any that have gone stale on a job board. Use this if a posting has ever sat expired for weeks before anyone noticed applications had quietly stopped coming in.

jobs.name: Jobsite Safety Incident & Near-Miss Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews recently logged safety incidents and near-misses across active sites for repeat causes, escalating severity, or a site racking up more reports than its peers. Use this if a serious incident has ever happened after a string of smaller near-misses that, in hindsight, pointed right at it.

jobs.name: Kubernetes Pod Restart Watch
jobs.description: Checks for pods with a high restart count and flags them. Use this if a crash-looping pod has ever burned through hours before anyone noticed it wasn't actually staying up.

jobs.name: Knowledge Base Localization Lag Check
jobs.description: Compares each translated help center article's last-updated date against its source-language version and flags translations that have fallen behind. Use this if a non-English customer has ever followed translated instructions that were quietly out of date for months after the English article got fixed, because only the source article's staleness was ever tracked.

jobs.name: Kennel Headcount Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares the expected number of pets on site today (based on checked-in reservations) against the end-of-day physical headcount staff logged, and flags a mismatch. Use this if the numbers on the reservation calendar have ever quietly drifted from who's actually in the building, a gap that matters most in an evacuation or a lost-pet scare.

jobs.name: Key & Access Log Audit
jobs.description: Cross-checks the log of client keys, access codes, and fobs held by the business against the active client list and flags anything still held for a client who is no longer active. Use this if a former client's key or door code has ever stayed in a drawer (or worked) long after their service ended, which is a security and liability gap.

jobs.name: Key Card Access Anomaly Check
jobs.description: Scans the room key card access log for guest-card entries logged after that room's checkout date and flags them. Use this if a guest key card has ever still opened a room door after checkout because it was never deactivated, which is both a security gap and a lost-revenue risk if the room was already resold.

jobs.name: Key Fob Access Deactivation Check
jobs.description: Compares the list of currently active key-fob or access-badge records against the current membership roster, and flags any fob that is still active for a member who has already cancelled or left. Use this if you want to catch a security gap where someone who no longer pays for membership can still badge into the space.

jobs.name: Kitchen Ticket Time Watch
jobs.description: Reviews kitchen display system ticket times (fire to plate-up) and flags stations or dayparts running consistently slower than target. Use this if slow ticket times have ever driven complaints or comps before anyone traced it back to a specific station falling behind.

jobs.name: Knowledge Base Article Staleness Check
jobs.description: Flags published help center articles that haven't been reviewed or updated in a long time. Use this if a stale article has ever kept giving customers outdated instructions because nobody was tracking when it was last touched.

jobs.name: Kubernetes RBAC Overprivileged Binding Check
jobs.description: Scans a Kubernetes cluster's RoleBindings and ClusterRoleBindings for subjects bound to cluster-admin or other high-privilege roles and lists them. Use this if a ClusterRoleBinding has ever been created "temporarily" during a debugging session and quietly stayed in place for months.

jobs.name: Kubernetes Resource Quota Check
jobs.description: Compares a Kubernetes namespace's actual CPU and memory requests against its configured ResourceQuota and flags when usage is getting close to the limit. Use this if a team has ever been blocked mid-deploy by a "exceeded quota" error they didn't see coming.

jobs.name: L2 Sequencer Halt Watch
jobs.description: Checks whether a layer-2 chain's block number is still advancing by comparing it against the last check, and flags it if it looks stalled — an early signal the sequencer may be down. Use this if an L2 you have funds or open positions on has ever gone quiet and you had no idea whether it was just slow or actually halted.

jobs.name: Lab Result Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Checks for lab results that came back a while ago but haven't been reviewed by a provider or communicated to the patient yet. Use this if a result has ever sat in a queue for days because nobody was tracking turnaround from result-received to patient-notified.

jobs.name: Lab Result Turnaround Check
jobs.description: Checks which submitted lab orders still have no result logged past their expected turnaround time. Use this if a sample has ever sat at an outside lab for a week with nobody following up because no one was tracking orders against their expected turnaround.

jobs.name: Labor Cost Percentage Watch
jobs.description: Checks labor cost as a percentage of sales against your target and flags it when it runs high. Use this if overstaffing on a slow shift has ever quietly eaten a week's margin before anyone pulled the labor numbers and noticed.

jobs.name: Warehouse Labor Productivity Rate Check
jobs.description: Compares units processed per labor hour against a target rate, by shift or work area. Use this if a shift's productivity has ever quietly drifted below what staffing was planned around, without anyone noticing until the labor budget was already blown for the month.

jobs.name: Farmland Lease Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Checks each farmland lease's end date and required notice period, and warns when it's time to start renewal or renegotiation conversations. Use this if you've ever lost a rented parcel to another farmer simply because you didn't reach out to the landowner before the notice deadline passed.

jobs.name: Landing Page Conversion Drop Check
jobs.description: Reviews a landing page's conversion rate over a recent window against its baseline and flags a real drop. Use this if a landing page has ever quietly stopped converting — a broken form, a slow load, a redesign that hurt clarity — while traffic and ad spend kept flowing in as if nothing changed.

jobs.name: Landlord Insurance Claim Status Check
jobs.description: Tracks open property insurance claims and flags any that haven't had a status update within a set number of days. Use this if a claim has ever gone quiet for weeks with the adjuster because nobody was following up on where it stood.

jobs.name: Language Learning App Streak Check
jobs.description: Checks a log file where you record your language-app streak count and warns if it's dropped or gone stale. Use this if you've ever opened Duolingo (or similar) two weeks late to find your streak quietly died.

jobs.name: Lapsed Donor Check
jobs.description: Flags donors who gave before but haven't in a while, before they're fully lost. Use this if lapsed-donor outreach only happens during the annual campaign instead of catching people while it's still recoverable.

jobs.name: Last-Mile Delivery Exception Check
jobs.description: Checks recent deliveries for exceptions — failed attempts, refused packages, address issues — and flags them for follow-up. Use this if a failed delivery has ever sat unresolved until an annoyed customer emailed asking where their order was.

jobs.name: Late Fee & Interest Accrual Risk Check
jobs.description: Estimates the dollar cost of leaving an overdue bill unpaid by projecting late fees and accrued interest against its grace period. Use this if you want to know what an overdue balance is actually costing you, not just that it's overdue (see accounts-payable-aging-check for the plain aging list).

jobs.name: Late Pickup Fee Billing Accuracy Check
jobs.description: Compares each late pickup's actual time against the grace period and fee schedule, and flags any record where the fee charged doesn't match what the policy says it should be. Use this if a late pickup has ever gone unbilled, or been billed the wrong amount, because nobody cross-checked the sign-out log against the fee schedule — distinct from tuition-payment-late-check, which tracks overdue recurring tuition rather than a per-incident late-pickup fee.

jobs.name: Layaway & Special Order Pickup Tracker
jobs.description: Flags layaway and special-order items that have been ready for pickup past a set number of days. Use this if a paid-for special order has ever sat in the back room for weeks because nobody was tracking pickup age, only whether the item had arrived.

jobs.name: Lead Magnet Conversion Rate Check
jobs.description: Compares how many visitors to a gated content offer's landing page (an ebook, whitepaper, or template) actually submit the form to download it, against a baseline conversion rate, and flags a meaningful drop. Use this if a lead magnet that used to convert well has quietly stopped pulling its weight and nobody would notice until the pipeline dried up.

jobs.name: Lead Response Time Check
jobs.description: Flags new inbound leads that haven't gotten a first response within your target window. Use this if you've ever lost a hot lead simply because nobody replied fast enough.

jobs.name: Leaderboard Anomaly Check
jobs.description: Scans recent leaderboard climbers for score jumps that look physically implausible and flags them for anti-cheat review. Use this if a cheater has ever sat at the top of your leaderboard for a season before anyone questioned how they got there.

jobs.name: Leak Detection Survey Due Reminder
jobs.description: Checks each gas or water distribution main segment's scheduled leak-detection survey date against the utility's required regulatory survey cycle and lists which segments are coming due within a lookahead window. Use this if your utility must periodically survey distribution mains for leaks under state or federal pipeline-safety rules and wants advance notice before a segment's survey lapses past its required cycle.

jobs.name: Learning Budget Spend-vs-Allowance Check
jobs.description: Tracks how much of your personal or employer learning/education allowance you've spent this period against the total, and flags if you're at risk of leaving money unused. Use this if your company gives you an annual learning stipend that resets and doesn't roll over, and you tend to forget to spend it.

jobs.name: Lease Expansion Opportunity Check
jobs.description: Checks members and teams whose current desk usage is at or near the capacity of their contracted plan, so the ones outgrowing their space show up as candidates for a bigger plan before they go looking at a competitor. Use this if you want a regular list of upsell conversations to have with members who are close to maxing out their seats.

jobs.name: Lease Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a lease ends so there's time to renew, renegotiate, or start looking. Use this if a lease has ever gone month-to-month, or ended, without anyone noticing the date was coming.

jobs.name: Lease Renewal Offer Window Check
jobs.description: Flags leases approaching expiry where no renewal offer has been sent yet, so tenants get a decision window before they start apartment hunting elsewhere. Use this if a good tenant has ever given notice to leave simply because nobody proactively offered them a renewal in time.

jobs.name: End-of-Lease Vehicle Return Condition Check
jobs.description: Reviews vehicles approaching lease-end and flags condition issues (excess mileage, damage, missing equipment) that could trigger return fees, giving time to fix them before turn-in. Use this if a leased vehicle has ever come back with a surprise excess-wear bill because nobody inspected it until the leasing company did.

jobs.name: Leave of Absence Return Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks employees on FMLA, parental, medical, or other formal leave and flags upcoming or overdue return dates. Use this if a return-to-work date has ever been missed — either the team wasn't ready for someone coming back, or nobody noticed an expected return date came and went with no check-in.

jobs.name: Legal Document Retention Purge Review
jobs.description: Checks contracts and legal documents against their retention schedule and flags anything past its retention period as eligible for archival or destruction review. Use this if signed contracts and legal files have ever piled up indefinitely because nobody was checking them against how long the business's own retention policy actually requires keeping them.

jobs.name: Dependency License Compliance Check
jobs.description: Scans your dependencies for licenses you've flagged as risky (like GPL or AGPL). Use this if you've ever shipped something and only later found out a dependency's license doesn't play well with your product.

jobs.name: Staff License/Credential Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks a tracked list of staff licenses, certifications, or credentials (e.g. nursing license, CPR cert, DEA registration) and warns before any expire. Use this if you've ever had a provider accidentally see patients on a lapsed license or certification.

jobs.name: Esthetician/Cosmetologist License Renewal Tracker
jobs.description: Warns before a staff member's state license, certification, or continuing-education deadline lapses. Use this if a technician has ever shown up ready to work a shift, only to discover their license expired last month and they can't legally touch a client.

jobs.name: Licensed Nurse Coverage Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks the published shift schedule for any shift where no state-required licensed nurse is scheduled to be on-site, and flags those gap shifts. Use this if a staffing gap has ever slipped through because the schedule was built around general staffing levels without separately confirming licensed-nurse coverage on every shift.

jobs.name: Lien Sale Proceeds Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: After a delinquent unit's contents have been sold at a lien auction, compares the recorded sale proceeds against the amount that was actually owed on the account, and flags any case where the sale brought in more than what was owed. Use this if your facility runs lien sales on delinquent units and needs to catch cases where a leftover "surplus" amount is owed back to the former tenant, since most states require that surplus to be refunded.

jobs.name: Lien Waiver Collection Tracker
jobs.description: Checks that a signed lien waiver was collected from each subcontractor before their next payment goes out, so payments never run ahead of the paperwork that protects against a mechanic's lien. Use this if a subcontractor has ever been paid without a waiver on file, leaving the project exposed to a lien claim on money that was already paid out.

jobs.name: Line Crew Safety Training Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks the safety certifications held by line crew and other field workers, like arc-flash, confined-space entry, or CDL, and flags anyone whose certification is expiring soon. Use this if you manage field crews and want to know ahead of time who would be out of compliance to work a job, instead of finding out the morning of a dispatch.

jobs.name: Linehaul Transit Time Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares actual transit times against the scheduled transit time per lane and flags lanes running consistently slow. Use this if a lane's transit times have ever crept up gradually until service levels quietly missed the mark for a whole quarter.

jobs.name: Linen and Laundry Inventory Turnover Check
jobs.description: Checks par levels for linens (sheets, towels, robes) against current counted stock and flags anything below par or showing an unusually high loss/shrink rate versus rooms serviced. Use this if a linen shortage has ever forced housekeeping to hold rooms because nobody reordered before the closet ran low.

jobs.name: Linen & Disposable Supply Low-Stock Check
jobs.description: Checks towel, robe, and disposable supply (wax strips, table paper, gloves) counts against par levels and flags what's running low. Use this if a treatment room has ever run out of clean towels or wax strips mid-shift because nobody was watching the linen closet.

jobs.name: Link Capacity Threshold Alert
jobs.description: Checks a link's current bandwidth utilization against a warning threshold so you can upgrade capacity before customers notice congestion. Use this if a trunk or uplink has ever saturated during peak hours and the first sign anyone saw was a flood of slow-speed complaints.

jobs.name: Liquor Pour Cost Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares each bottle's theoretical usage (from drinks sold) against actual bottle depletion from inventory counts, and flags bottles showing a variance that points to over-pouring, spillage, or theft. Use this if the bar's overall liquor cost percentage looks fine but you suspect a specific bottle is walking off faster than it's rung up.

jobs.name: Podcast Listener Review Response Lag Check
jobs.description: Flags reviews or listener comments on your podcast that haven't gotten a reply after a grace period. Use this if you've ever wanted to reply to listener feedback but let so much time pass that a response would feel awkward or pointless.

jobs.name: Litigation Hold Acknowledgment Tracker
jobs.description: Checks active litigation hold notices against the custodian list and flags anyone who hasn't acknowledged receipt yet. Use this if a litigation hold has ever gone out and nobody could later prove every custodian actually got and confirmed it, which is exactly what gets picked apart in a spoliation motion.

jobs.name: Live-Ops Event Launch Checklist Reminder
jobs.description: Counts down to your next scheduled live-ops event (a seasonal update, a limited-time mode, a battle pass launch) and reminds you while there's still time to finish prep. Use this if an event has ever gone live with an unfinished storefront banner or a config flag nobody flipped because the countdown snuck up on the team.

jobs.name: Livestock Feed Stock Check
jobs.description: Checks how many days of feed are left based on current stock and daily consumption, and warns before you run out. Use this if feed has ever run low over a weekend or holiday when the supplier wasn't reachable.

jobs.name: Livestock Vaccination Schedule Reminder
jobs.description: Checks each animal group's next vaccination or booster due date and flags anything coming up soon, so herd health protocols don't slip. Use this if you've ever realized a booster was overdue only after an animal got sick.

jobs.name: Livestream Technical Incident Post-mortem Check
jobs.description: Checks your log of livestream technical issues (dropped feed, audio failure, overlay glitch, platform outage) and flags any that still don't have a post-mortem or fix marked done. Use this if the same stream hiccup has ever happened three streams in a row because nobody ever circled back after the first one to actually fix it.

jobs.name: Livestream Schedule Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you (and can prep a going-live announcement) ahead of your regular streaming slot so a scheduled stream never just quietly doesn't happen. Use this if you've ever promised viewers a regular stream time and then missed it because the day snuck up on you.

jobs.name: Load Balancer Health Check Failure Watch
jobs.description: Checks how many backend targets behind your load balancer are currently failing their health checks and flags it when the unhealthy count rises above a threshold. Use this if you've ever found out about a bad backend only after users started reporting errors, instead of when the load balancer first started routing around it.

jobs.name: Load-In/Load-Out Schedule Reminder
jobs.description: Sends a reminder of that day's load-in or load-out schedule so vendors and crew show up in the right order instead of everyone's truck trying to use the same loading dock at once. Use this if a load-in has ever turned into a parking-lot standoff because nobody circulated the schedule the day before.

jobs.name: Loan Covenant Compliance Check
jobs.description: Computes financial ratios required by a loan agreement (e.g. debt service coverage, current ratio) from your latest financials and flags any that breach the covenant threshold. Use this if a lender requires you to maintain certain ratios and a breach could trigger default or a call on the loan.

jobs.name: Loaner Fleet Availability Check
jobs.description: Checks how many loaner vehicles are currently available against tomorrow's scheduled service appointments that requested one, and flags a shortfall before it becomes a counter argument. Use this if a customer has ever shown up for a scheduled loaner only to be told the fleet was already fully checked out.

jobs.name: Loaner Vehicle Return Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a loaner vehicle is due back, and flags anything already overdue. Use this if a loaner has ever gone weeks without coming back because nobody was tracking who had which car out.

jobs.name: Lobbyist Registration Renewal Tracker
jobs.description: Checks registered lobbyists and their sponsoring clients against your jurisdiction's registration/renewal deadline and flags any that are about to lapse or are already expired. Use this if a lobbyist has ever kept contacting officials on an expired registration because nobody in the ethics or clerk's office was tracking renewal dates.

jobs.name: Locker Rental Expiration Check
jobs.description: Checks member locker rentals for ones expiring soon or already expired without a renewal on file, so staff can plan to clear out contents and reassign the locker instead of finding an abandoned one months later. Use this if you want a standing list of lockers that need a renewal reminder or a clear-out.

jobs.name: Locker Rental Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks rented lockers against their expiry date and flags the ones coming due soon. Use this if a member's belongings have ever been cleared out of a locker without warning because the rental quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Old Log File Cleanup
jobs.description: Deletes old log files so they don't quietly fill up your disk. Use this if your app or server writes logs to a folder and nobody's manually clearing them out.

jobs.name: Log Forwarding Health Check
jobs.description: Checks that logs are still actually arriving at your log aggregator. Use this if a log shipper has ever silently died and nobody found out until they needed logs that were never collected.

jobs.name: Long-Distance Delivery Window At-Risk Check
jobs.description: Checks long-distance/interstate shipments still in transit against their contracted delivery window (spread dates) and flags any at risk of missing the end of that window. Use this if a long-distance customer has ever found out their shipment would be late only when it didn't show up on the last day of the window, instead of hearing from you first.

jobs.name: Loss Prevention Camera Coverage Gap Check
jobs.description: Reviews the store's security camera layout together with recent theft or loss incident locations to judge whether any area is a recurring blind spot that the current camera placement doesn't cover well. Use this if incidents keep happening in the same aisle or corner and you want a reasoned second opinion on whether the camera coverage map needs updating, not just a raw list of camera positions.

jobs.name: Loss Ratio by Line of Business Monitor
jobs.description: Calculates the incurred loss ratio for each line of business and flags any line running hotter than target, so underwriting or pricing can react before a bad quarter turns into a bad year. Use this if a line's loss ratio has ever drifted well past target for months before anyone noticed in the numbers.

jobs.name: Lost and Found Item Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks logged lost-and-found items against your retention policy and flags any that are old enough to donate, discard, or ship back to a guest. Use this if a lost-and-found closet has ever turned into a pile nobody knows what to do with because items just sat there indefinitely.

jobs.name: Lost-Pet Protocol Drill Tracking Check
jobs.description: Scans your staff roster for who last ran through the facility's lost-pet-during-walk-or-play escape response drill and flags anyone overdue for a refresher. Use this if a gate has ever been left open or a leash has ever slipped and staff hesitated because the escape response protocol hadn't actually been drilled in months.

jobs.name: Lot Traceability Audit
jobs.description: Spot-checks that finished-goods lots have complete genealogy back to their raw material lots and process records. Use this if a recall has ever turned into a scramble because a lot's traceability records had gaps nobody caught until they were needed under pressure.

jobs.name: Low Stock Alert
jobs.description: Checks a general-purpose inventory database (warehouse, retail backroom, restaurant supplies — anything with a quantity and a set reorder point) against that fixed threshold and flags what's running low. Use this for physical stock tracked in a database, not tied to online sales; if you specifically need SKU reorder timing driven by e-commerce sales velocity and supplier lead time, see `low-stock-reorder-alert` instead.

jobs.name: Low Stock Reorder Alert
jobs.description: Checks inventory levels against a reorder threshold per SKU and flags anything that needs restocking before it actually sells out. Use this if a bestseller has ever gone out of stock because nobody was watching the count.

jobs.name: Loyalty Enrollment & Redemption Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks new loyalty program enrollments and reward redemptions against targets, not just whether individual points are about to expire. Use this if enrollment has ever quietly stalled, or redemption has ever dropped off a cliff, for months before anyone looked at the trend.

jobs.name: Loyalty Points Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Finds customers whose loyalty/reward points are about to expire unused. Use this if points have ever quietly expired on customers who would have redeemed them if someone had just reminded them in time.

jobs.name: Loyalty Program Points Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares points earned per stay against your program's accrual rate and flags stays where the posted points don't match, plus any member who crossed a tier threshold but hasn't been re-tiered yet. Use this if a loyalty member has ever been shorted points from a PMS integration glitch, or hit Gold status and kept getting Silver-level perks for months.

jobs.name: Loyalty Status Requalification Pace Check
jobs.description: Tracks whether you're on pace to hit the miles/nights/segments needed to requalify for elite status before your program year ends. Use this if you've ever realized in November you were 3,000 miles short of keeping status for the next year.

jobs.name: Macro/Canned Response Staleness Check
jobs.description: Flags saved canned responses (macros) that haven't been used in a long time so someone can check whether they're still accurate. Use this if a stale macro has ever gone out with outdated pricing, a dead link, or a policy that changed months ago.

jobs.name: Mail and Package Pickup Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks the mail and package log for member mail or deliveries that have been sitting uncollected at the front desk past a set number of days. Use this if you want a simple reminder list so staff can nudge members before the mail room shelf turns into permanent overflow.

jobs.name: Maintenance Contract Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks recurring service/maintenance contracts (annual HVAC tune-ups, quarterly plumbing inspections) against their renewal date and flags any coming up so the customer can be rebooked before the contract lapses. Use this if a maintenance customer has ever silently churned because nobody called to renew before the term ran out.

jobs.name: Maintenance Request SLA Check
jobs.description: Scans open tenant maintenance requests and flags any that have blown past your response or resolution SLA. Use this if a leaky faucet or broken heater has ever sat unaddressed for weeks because the request got logged and then forgotten.

jobs.name: Maintenance Window Customer Notification Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming planned network maintenance windows and flags any that are inside your required customer-notice lead time but haven't been marked as notified yet. Use this if a maintenance window has ever gone out with too little warning and customers found out only when their service dropped.

jobs.name: Major Donor Proposal Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Tracks major-gift proposals that have been sent and flags any with no recorded response after a set number of days, drafting a follow-up. Use this if a major donor proposal has ever gone quiet for months because nobody had a system for chasing a response.

jobs.name: Manufacturer Recall Notice Check
jobs.description: Cross-references newly issued manufacturer recall notices against vehicles in service history and current inventory, flagging any match that hasn't been contacted or scheduled yet. Use this if a customer has ever found out about a safety recall on their own before the shop that services their car did.

jobs.name: Manuscript Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Flags manuscript milestones (first draft, revisions, final delivery) coming due from authors or editors. Use this if a book has ever slipped its production schedule because a manuscript deadline only lived in an email thread nobody rechecked.

jobs.name: MAP Violation Watch
jobs.description: Fetches each tracked reseller's product page and checks whether they're listing your product below your minimum advertised price (MAP), then drafts a factual notice for any violation found. Use this if an authorized reseller has ever quietly undercut your MAP policy for months before a competitor or another reseller complained about it.

jobs.name: Markdown Aging Inventory Check
jobs.description: Flags SKUs that have sat unsold past a set number of days so they can be marked down before they become dead stock. Use this if slow-moving inventory has ever tied up cash for months because nobody was tracking how long items had actually been sitting on the shelf.

jobs.name: Markdown Execution Audit Check
jobs.description: Confirms that approved markdowns were actually applied at the register, not just flagged as candidates. Use this if a markdown has ever been approved on paper but never keyed into the POS, so the item kept ringing at full price for weeks while it sat on the clearance rack.

jobs.name: Marketing Automation Workflow Error Check
jobs.description: Checks the marketing automation platform's workflow and journey execution logs for failed steps and stuck contacts, then flags any workflow whose error rate is rising. Use this if an automated nurture or onboarding journey has ever silently broken and stopped moving contacts along because nobody was watching the execution logs.

jobs.name: Marketing Qualified Account Engagement Check
jobs.description: Checks the engagement scores of target accounts in an account-based marketing (ABM) program and flags any account whose score is trending down over the recent window. Use this if you run ABM and want to catch a target account going quiet before it goes fully cold, instead of finding out at the next quarterly business review.

jobs.name: Marketplace Account Health & Policy Risk Watch
jobs.description: Checks your marketplace seller account's health metrics and any open policy or IP complaints against that marketplace's suspension thresholds, and flags what's actually at risk this week. Use this if a seller account has ever gotten suspended and the warning signs — a climbing defect rate, an unanswered complaint — had been sitting in the account health dashboard for weeks first.

jobs.name: Marketplace Listing Sync Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares price and stock on your source-of-truth catalog against what's actually live on a marketplace (Amazon, eBay, Etsy) and flags any SKU that's drifted out of sync. Use this if a marketplace listing has ever shown a stale price or "in stock" on an item you'd already sold out of on your own store, because the sync job silently failed.

jobs.name: Podcast Master Audio Backup Verification Check
jobs.description: Confirms every episode's master audio file has a matching, checksum-equal backup copy. Use this if you've ever lost (or nearly lost) an unreleased or unedited master file because the only copy lived on one laptop and nobody had verified the backup was actually current.

jobs.name: Matching Gift Claim Backlog Check
jobs.description: Reports the total number and dollar value of employer matching-gift claims that still haven't been submitted, bucketed by how long they've sat unfiled, regardless of any single company's deadline. Use this if your matching-gift pipeline has ever quietly grown into a pile of unfiled paperwork because everyone was watching individual deadlines and nobody stepped back to see the backlog as a whole.

jobs.name: Matching Gift Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Checks pledged employer matching gifts against each company's own submission deadline and flags ones about to expire unclaimed. Use this if a donor's employer match has ever gone unclaimed because nobody tracked the separate deadline for submitting the match request.

jobs.name: Matchmaking Queue Health Check
jobs.description: Pings your game's matchmaking service health endpoint and flags it if it's down or responding too slowly. Use this if players have ever sat in a matchmaking queue for minutes before anyone on the team noticed a region's matchmaker had quietly stalled.

jobs.name: Material Delivery Delay Check
jobs.description: Checks ordered construction materials against their expected delivery date and flags anything overdue from the supplier. Use this if a crew has ever stood idle on site because a material delivery was quietly late and nobody chased it up.

jobs.name: Meal Benefit New Application Processing Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks newly submitted free/reduced meal benefit applications against how long they've been waiting for a determination and flags any past your target processing window. Use this if a family has ever gone weeks without a meal-benefit decision because new applications piled up behind other cafeteria-office work.

jobs.name: Weekly Meal Plan Reminder
jobs.description: Nudges you to plan the week's meals, and can draft a simple 7-day plan plus grocery list for you. Use this if you dread the "what's for dinner" question every night and want to decide once a week instead.

jobs.name: Media Buy Pacing Check
jobs.description: For each active media flight, compares the percentage of the flight's calendar duration that has elapsed against the percentage of the client's approved budget spent so far, and flags any campaign pacing meaningfully ahead or behind plan mid-flight. Use this if a campaign has ever blown through half its budget in the first week, or sat barely spending with ten days left, and nobody caught it until the flight was already over. Distinct from media-buy-reconciliation-check, which compares planned spend against what the platform actually billed after the fact — this one watches an in-flight campaign's pace against the calendar, not the final invoice.

jobs.name: Media Buy Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares the media spend an agency planned for a client against what the ad platform or vendor actually billed, and flags any campaign where the two don't line up. Use this if you've ever sent a client an invoice based on the media plan and only later found out the platform charged a different amount.

jobs.name: Medicaid Recertification Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks residents whose care is covered by Medicaid for eligibility recertification deadlines coming up soon. Use this if you want to make sure the recertification paperwork gets filed in time so a resident's coverage never lapses because a deadline was missed.

jobs.name: Medical Equipment Calibration Check
jobs.description: Checks a tracked list of medical equipment (blood pressure cuffs, glucometers, defibrillators, scales) against calibration due dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if a piece of equipment has ever been found overdue for calibration only when an inspector or auditor flagged it.

jobs.name: Medication Administration Log Check
jobs.description: Checks today's list of children with a scheduled medication (daily prescriptions, inhalers, etc.) against the administration log and flags any dose that's due but not yet logged as given. Use this if a scheduled dose has ever been missed simply because it slipped everyone's mind during a busy stretch of the day.

jobs.name: Medication Administration Record Gap Check
jobs.description: Scans the medication administration record (MAR) log for scheduled doses that have no matching administration entry logged, which usually means a dose was missed or a caregiver forgot to document giving it. Use this if you want a daily heads-up on gaps before they turn into a missed-dose incident or a compliance finding during survey.

jobs.name: Medication Inventory Expiry Check
jobs.description: Scans the clinic's drug and vaccine inventory log for items expiring soon so they can be used, returned, or discarded before they go bad. Use this if expired medication has ever turned up still on the shelf during an audit.

jobs.name: Medication Refill Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to refill a medication before you run out, based on how many days of supply you have left. Use this if you've ever run out of a prescription over a weekend when the pharmacy's closed.

jobs.name: Medication Therapy Management Outreach Drafter
jobs.description: Reads the list of patients due for a Medication Therapy Management (MTM) review this month and drafts a short, plain-language outreach message for each, explaining why a review is being offered. Use this if MTM-eligible patients have ever gone un-contacted because drafting individual outreach took longer than anyone had time for.

jobs.name: Meeting-Free Day Protection Check
jobs.description: Scans a designated no-meeting day (like "no-meeting Wednesdays") on your calendar export for any meetings that got booked on it anyway and flags the violation. Use this if you've set a protected focus day but keep finding it quietly filled with meetings nobody double-checked against the rule.

jobs.name: Meeting Minutes Publication Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks how long it's been since a public meeting happened and flags it if the minutes still haven't been published past your sunshine-law window. Use this if approved minutes have ever gone up online weeks late because drafting and posting them fell to the bottom of someone's list after the meeting itself was handled.

jobs.name: Meeting Prep Doc Missing Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming meetings on your calendar export for ones lacking a linked agenda or prep doc, and flags them so organizers can add one. Use this if meetings routinely start without anyone having written down what they're actually for.

jobs.name: Meeting Room Double-Booking Check
jobs.description: Scans meeting and conference room reservations for two bookings on the same room with overlapping times. Use this if a team has ever walked into a meeting room mid-call because someone else's booking overlapped theirs and nobody caught it beforehand.

jobs.name: Member Attendance Drop-off Check
jobs.description: Compares each active member's visit count over a recent window against their prior baseline and flags anyone whose attendance has quietly fallen off a cliff. Use this if a member has ever cancelled out of the blue when a steep drop in check-ins weeks earlier would've been the moment to reach out.

jobs.name: Member Churn Notice Followup Check
jobs.description: Checks membership cancellation notices logged in the last period for ones that haven't had a retention or exit-interview conversation yet, so a member who's already decided to leave doesn't also leave without anyone finding out why. Use this if you want to make sure every cancellation gets a follow-up call or email before the notice period runs out.

jobs.name: Member Invoice Failed Payment Check
jobs.description: Checks recurring membership dues and autopay charges for ones that failed to go through, so a lapsed card or expired payment method doesn't silently turn into a member losing access. Use this if you want a daily heads-up on who needs a payment retry or a manual follow-up before their membership status is affected.

jobs.name: Membership Freeze/Hold Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks paused or frozen memberships against their scheduled resume date and flags the ones ending soon, so billing and access resume as expected instead of surprising the member. Use this if a member has ever been charged full price the moment their freeze ended with zero warning, or kept frozen past when they meant to come back.

jobs.name: Membership Plan Downgrade Risk Check
jobs.description: Looks at how often members are checking in and how many desk hours they're actually using compared to what their membership plan tier includes, then flags anyone using well below what they're paying for. Use this if a member has ever cancelled out of nowhere when a steady drop in check-ins for weeks beforehand would have been the moment to reach out.

jobs.name: Membership Tier Fulfillment Check
jobs.description: Checks that each paid membership tier's promised perk (exclusive post, Discord shoutout, mailed reward, etc.) actually went out this cycle. Use this if a Patreon or channel-membership tier has ever quietly not delivered its perk for a month before a member called it out.

jobs.name: Membership/Package Unused-Session Expiry Check
jobs.description: Flags members or package holders whose prepaid sessions or membership credits are about to expire unused. Use this if a client has ever paid for a monthly facial membership, banked three unused visits, and let them evaporate because nobody reminded them to book.

jobs.name: Memory Care Wander Alarm Test Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds memory-care unit staff that the required periodic functional test of the wander-management door alarm system is due, based on the last recorded test date. Use this if you've ever discovered during an actual exit-seeking event that the door alarm wasn't actually working because routine testing quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Mentor 1:1 Follow-up Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to follow up on action items from your last mentor or mentee 1:1 if too much time has passed since the meeting. Use this if you've ever left a mentoring conversation with good advice and then never actually acted on it.

jobs.name: Mentor/Mentee Check-in Cadence Tracker
jobs.description: Checks every active mentorship pairing's last check-in date against a shared cadence and flags pairs that have gone quiet. Use this if your mentorship program has ever had pairs "matched" at kickoff and then never actually met again, because nobody but the two people involved would have any way of knowing.

jobs.name: Menu Item 86 Frequency Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews how often each menu item gets 86'd (marked sold out) mid- service and flags items that run out repeatedly, which usually points to a par-level or ordering problem rather than one bad night. Use this if the same dish has ever been 86'd three Fridays in a row before anyone connected the dots.

jobs.name: Menu Item Profitability Check
jobs.description: Compares each menu item's plate cost against its menu price and flags items whose contribution margin has dropped below target. Use this if an ingredient cost has ever crept up on a specific dish until it was quietly losing money on every order, unlike the overall food-cost percentage which only shows the average.

jobs.name: Merch Inventory Sync Check
jobs.description: Checks merch stock levels against recent sales pace and flags anything about to sell out or that's been dead stock for months. Use this if a best-selling shirt has ever gone out of stock mid-launch because nobody was watching the count, or slow movers have quietly tied up cash.

jobs.name: Meter Reading Route Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks whether today's scheduled meter-reading routes were actually completed by field crews or automated meter-reading equipment, versus falling back to an estimated read. Use this if estimated bills (and the customer complaints that follow) keep slipping through because a route quietly went unfinished.

jobs.name: Material Handling Equipment Preventive Maintenance Check
jobs.description: Checks scheduled preventive maintenance due dates for material handling equipment other than forklifts — pallet jacks, order pickers, conveyor drive units — and flags anything overdue. Use this if a piece of MHE has ever broken down mid-shift for a service item that was actually due weeks earlier and nobody was tracking anything but the forklifts.

jobs.name: Microchip Registration Verification Check
jobs.description: Reviews recently implanted microchips and checks whether the chip was actually registered with the manufacturer's database under the owner's current contact info. Use this if a lost pet has ever been scanned at a shelter, chip found, but the registry came back with no owner info or an outdated phone number — the chip is only useful if the registration behind it is current.

jobs.name: Mid-Term Endorsement Premium Audit
jobs.description: Checks processed mid-term policy endorsements (a driver added, a limit raised, a location removed) against the premium adjustment the carrier actually charged or refunded, and flags any that look off relative to the change requested. Use this if an endorsement has ever come back processed with a premium change that didn't match what the change itself should have cost, and nobody double-checked before invoicing the client.

jobs.name: Minibar Charge Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares housekeeping's logged minibar restocks against folio charges posted for the same room and flags mismatches. Use this if a restocked minibar has ever gone uncharged, or a guest was charged for an item housekeeping never actually replaced.

jobs.name: Missed Clean Reschedule Tracker
jobs.description: Checks recently skipped or cancelled cleaning appointments and flags any that still haven't been rebooked within your target window. Use this if a missed clean has ever quietly fallen through the cracks and turned into a client complaint or a cancelled contract instead of a quick reschedule.

jobs.name: Mobile/House-Call Vet Route Scheduling Conflict Check
jobs.description: Scans tomorrow's house-call schedule for any veterinarian booked onto two visits that overlap, or booked back-to-back with too little drive time between addresses. Use this if a mobile vet has ever shown up late to a house call (or had to rush an exam) because the schedule quietly double-booked them or left no travel buffer between stops.

jobs.name: Community Moderator Shift Coverage Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks your upcoming moderator shift schedule for streams or peak posting hours against the minimum mods you need on duty, and flags any shift that's short-staffed. Use this if a stream has ever gone live with only one mod on duty during a raid or a comment brigade because nobody double-checked the sign-up sheet beforehand.

jobs.name: Mod/Workshop Submission Review Queue Check
jobs.description: Checks how long mod or user-generated-content submissions have been sitting unreviewed in your workshop/marketplace queue and flags the oldest ones. Use this if a modder has ever given up on your platform because their submission sat in review limbo for weeks with no response.

jobs.name: Model Release Missing Check
jobs.description: Checks completed shoots against signed model or property release records and flags any shoot that's missing a release on file. Use this if you've ever wanted to use a photo commercially (portfolio, ads, stock, a website redesign) and then realized nobody ever got the subject or property owner to sign off on that use.

jobs.name: Monetization Conversion Rate Watch
jobs.description: Checks the conversion rate from free player to paying player (or store visit to purchase) and flags a meaningful drop. Use this if a store UI change or a pricing tweak has ever quietly tanked purchases for a week before anyone checked the revenue dashboard.

jobs.name: Month-End Close Checklist Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks a list of month-end financial close tasks (reconcile bank, post accruals, review AR/AP, close subledgers, etc.) and flags incomplete items as the close deadline approaches. Use this if your monthly close has ever slipped a step because nobody had a single place tracking whether every task actually got done.

jobs.name: MOOC Assignment Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Checks a list of upcoming online-course assignment/quiz deadlines and flags any coming up soon. Use this if you're taking a Coursera/edX/ Udacity-style course with graded deadlines and have missed one because the platform's own email reminder got buried.

jobs.name: Morning Briefing Digest
jobs.description: Pulls together overnight email, today's calendar, and any connected analytics/monitoring dashboards into one short digest waiting for you at the start of the day. Use this if you start your morning tab-hopping across five dashboards before you've even had coffee.

jobs.name: Move-In/Move-Out Inspection Checklist Tracker
jobs.description: Flags move-ins and move-outs where the condition inspection checklist hasn't been completed within a set number of days of the move date. Use this if a deposit dispute has ever fallen apart because there was no signed move-in or move-out condition report to point to.

jobs.name: Move-Out Inspection Backlog Check
jobs.description: Looks at units tenants have recently reported as moved out of and flags the ones still waiting on a final walkthrough to confirm the unit's condition and settle any deposit. Use this if you want to catch a growing backlog of unfinished move-out inspections before it turns into disputed deposit refunds or a unit re-rented without anyone checking it was actually empty and undamaged.

jobs.name: Moving Crew Certification Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each moving crew member's required certifications, like specialty piano/antique-handling certs or warehouse forklift cards, against their expiry dates and flags anyone lapsing soon. Use this if a crew has ever been assigned to a specialty-item move or a warehouse shift only to find out on-site that the certification covering that job had already expired.

jobs.name: Moving Crew Overtime Hours Check
jobs.description: Totals each moving crew member's logged hours for the week and flags anyone approaching or over your overtime threshold. Use this if payroll surprises or crew burnout have ever snuck up on you because overtime only got noticed once the payroll run came back higher than expected, especially during a heavy moving season.

jobs.name: Moving Customer Satisfaction Follow-Up Drafts
jobs.description: Reviews post-move customer satisfaction survey responses, flags any score below your quality bar, and drafts a personal follow-up message for each unhappy customer. Use this if a bad move (broken item, late crew, surprise charge) has ever gone unaddressed until the customer left a public review instead of giving you a chance to make it right.

jobs.name: Completed Move Invoice Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks invoices for completed moves against an aging threshold and flags any that are still unpaid past the number of days you set. Use this if a move has ever wrapped up fine but the final invoice quietly went unpaid for weeks because nobody was tracking it after the truck left.

jobs.name: Moving Off-Season Promo Reminder
jobs.description: Flags past customers who haven't moved again or referred anyone in over a set number of months and drafts a promo outreach message offering an off-peak discount during the slow season. Use this if trucks and crews have ever sat underbooked in the off-season because past customers were never reminded you're still around and offering a deal.

jobs.name: Moving Referral Partner Commission Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks commissions owed to referral partners, like realtors and relocation companies, for each completed move and flags any that are still unpaid past the agreed payment terms. Use this if a referral partner has ever had to chase you to find out why a commission from a move weeks ago still hadn't shown up.

jobs.name: Mower/Trimmer Equipment Maintenance Due Check
jobs.description: Checks your equipment log for mowers, trimmers, and blowers whose hours or days since last service have passed the maintenance interval, and flags them before they break down mid-route. Use this if a mower has ever died on a job site because nobody tracked when the blades or oil were last serviced.

jobs.name: Mowing Frequency Contract vs. Actual Visits Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares each client's contracted mowing frequency (e.g. weekly, biweekly) against the actual number of visits logged in the trailing window, and flags clients who are under- or over-serviced relative to their contract. Use this if you've ever gotten a call asking why a "weekly" client only got mowed twice in a month, or realized you were giving a biweekly client weekly service for free.

jobs.name: MQL-to-SQL Handoff SLA Check
jobs.description: Checks how long marketing-qualified leads have been sitting since becoming an MQL without sales accepting them as sales-qualified, and flags leads stuck past the handoff SLA. Use this if a hot lead has ever gone cold sitting in the queue between marketing handing it off and sales actually picking it up.

jobs.name: MQL Volume Pace Check
jobs.description: Compares marketing-qualified-lead (MQL) volume so far this period against the target pace and flags under-delivery early. Use this if a quarter has ever ended short on MQLs and sales only found out during the pipeline review, instead of marketing catching it mid-quarter with enough runway to fix it.

jobs.name: Mulch/Material Inventory Low-Stock Check
jobs.description: Checks your bulk material inventory (mulch, topsoil, rock, gravel) against a reorder threshold and flags anything running low. Use this if a crew has ever shown up to a mulch job and found the yard was already out of the material they needed.

jobs.name: Multi-Account Cash Position Rollup
jobs.description: Sums balances across multiple bank/cash accounts into one total position and flags if the total or any single account drops below a minimum threshold. Use this if cash is spread across several accounts or entities and you want a single low-balance tripwire instead of checking each account separately.

jobs.name: Multi-Channel Response Time Parity Check
jobs.description: Compares response times across your support channels (email, chat, phone callback, social) and flags one that's lagging well behind the others. Use this if a channel like social or SMS has ever been treated as an afterthought and quietly built up much slower response times than email or chat, without a single combined metric ever catching it.

jobs.name: Multi-Location Stock Imbalance Check
jobs.description: Compares stock of the same SKU across multiple locations and flags cases where one location is critically low while another is sitting on a large surplus of the same item. Use this if you've ever placed a new purchase order for a SKU that was actually out of stock at one store or warehouse but overflowing at another one nearby, when a transfer would have solved it for free.

jobs.name: Multi-Stop Route Sequence Deviation Check
jobs.description: Compares the planned stop order for a multi-stop route against the order stops were actually completed and flags routes that ran out of sequence. Use this if a driver has ever gone off the planned stop order on a multi-drop route and it quietly added miles and blew a delivery window without anyone reviewing it after the fact.

jobs.name: Multi-Year Renewal Escalation Tracker
jobs.description: Flags multi-year contracts approaching their next contract-year anniversary, where a pre-agreed price escalation kicks in, so the customer gets notice before the higher invoice arrives. Use this if a customer has ever been surprised by a built-in price increase on a multi-year deal because nobody sent the required notice ahead of the anniversary date.

jobs.name: Multisig Pending Transaction Watch
jobs.description: Checks a multisig wallet (e.g. Gnosis Safe) for transactions awaiting additional signatures and flags ones that have been pending too long. Use this if you've ever had a transaction stuck for days because a co-signer forgot it was waiting on them.

jobs.name: Multisig Signer Availability Watch
jobs.description: Checks a locally maintained roster of your multisig's signers against when each was last confirmed reachable, and flags it if too few signers are currently available to reach quorum. Use this if a multisig transaction has ever stalled because a co-signer turned out to be on vacation or had gone quiet, and nobody knew that before it mattered.

jobs.name: Municipal Bond Covenant Compliance Check
jobs.description: Calculates a revenue bond's debt service coverage ratio and reserve fund balance from your latest financials and flags a breach of the bond covenant's minimum requirements. Use this if a covenant breach has ever gone unnoticed until the trustee or bondholders raised it, instead of finance catching it the same month the numbers came in.

jobs.name: NDA Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a signed NDA reaches its expiration or renewal date. Use this if an NDA has ever lapsed mid-relationship and nobody noticed the confidentiality coverage had run out.

jobs.name: Negative Inventory Check
jobs.description: Scans inventory records for SKUs showing a negative quantity on hand, a sign that sales, receiving, or adjustment transactions were recorded out of order or a count was never corrected. Use this if a "negative stock" bug has ever quietly thrown off reorder math or fulfillment promises because nobody was checking for impossible numbers.

jobs.name: Negative Review Alert
jobs.description: Checks for new low-star product reviews and flags them same-day instead of letting them sit in a dashboard nobody checks. Use this if a bad review has ever sat live for a week before anyone on the team noticed and responded.

jobs.name: Net Worth Snapshot Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to log your net worth each month and shows the trend from your last two entries. Use this if you want to track your finances over time but keep forgetting to actually sit down and do it.

jobs.name: New Business Policy Issuance Backlog Tracker
jobs.description: Checks bound new-business submissions against how long they've waited for the carrier to actually issue the formal policy and flags anything stuck past the target turnaround. Use this if a client has ever paid their first premium and waited months for policy documents that never showed up because nobody was watching the issuance queue after bind.

jobs.name: New-Business Pipeline Stale Check
jobs.description: Scans the agency's new-business/pitch pipeline for opportunities that haven't had any logged activity in a set number of days and flags them as stale. Use this if pitches quietly go cold because nobody circles back to follow up before a prospect loses interest.

jobs.name: New-Client Conflict of Interest Check
