Use this if a resident-reported hazard has ever sat open for weeks with nobody tracking total queue size or how old the oldest ticket really is.

jobs.name: Punch List Completion Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks open punch list items against the project's target closeout date and flags projects falling behind on completion rate. Use this if a closeout has ever dragged on for months because punch items trickled in one at a time with nobody watching the overall burn-down.

jobs.name: Puppy/Kitten Vaccine Series Compliance Check
jobs.description: Tracks young patients partway through their initial multi-dose vaccine series and flags anyone who missed the next dose window. Use this if a puppy or kitten has ever fallen off after the first shot in a series, leaving them under-protected because nobody tracked series progress separately from routine adult booster due dates — distinct from pet-vaccine-due-reminder.yaml, which tracks single due-date reminders rather than a multi-dose series with its own interval rules.

jobs.name: Purchase Order Overdue Check
jobs.description: Checks open purchase orders to suppliers against their expected delivery date and flags anything that hasn't arrived on time. Use this if a supplier has ever gone quiet on a PO and you only found out stock wasn't coming when you were already out of the item.

jobs.name: Purchase Order Receiving Delay Check
jobs.description: Checks open purchase orders against their expected delivery date and flags any that are overdue and not yet marked received. Use this if stock has ever run out because a purchase order was quietly late and nobody chased the supplier until shelves were already empty.

jobs.name: Quality Defect Rate Check
jobs.description: Pulls today's defect rate from your quality inspection records so the number is ready without anyone running the query by hand. Use this if a quality problem has ever run for a full shift before anyone pulled the numbers and noticed.

jobs.name: Quality Hold Stock Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags inventory sitting on a quality/QA hold, quarantine, or recall-pending status for longer than a set number of days without a disposition decision (release, return to supplier, or scrap). Use this if stock has ever sat untouched on "hold" for weeks because nobody owned deciding what to do with it, tying up space and value in the meantime.

jobs.name: Clinical Quality Measure Care Gap Tracking
jobs.description: Checks a panel of patients against HEDIS-style clinical quality measures (A1c screening, colorectal cancer screening, blood pressure control, and similar) and lists who's still an open gap as the measurement period winds down. Use this if a quality measure's performance rate has ever come in lower than expected at year-end only because nobody was tracking open gaps until the reporting deadline forced a scramble.

jobs.name: Quarterly Estimated Tax Calculator
jobs.description: Calculates a suggested quarterly estimated tax payment from your logged year-to-date income and a target tax rate, and warns as the next IRS-style quarterly due date approaches. Use this if you're self-employed or have untaxed income and want the actual dollar amount worked out, not just a bare date reminder (see tax-deadline-reminder for a generic multi-jurisdiction deadline list).

jobs.name: Queue Depth Check
jobs.description: Checks how backed up a job queue is and warns if it crosses a threshold. Use this if a stuck worker has ever let a queue silently balloon until someone noticed customers weren't getting emails.

jobs.name: Quota Attainment Check
jobs.description: Compares a rep's closed-won revenue this period against their quota pace and flags whether they're on track. Use this if a rep has ever found out they missed quota only at the end of the quarter, instead of with enough runway left to fix it.

jobs.name: Sales Quote Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Flags outstanding price quotes that are about to expire before the customer has accepted them. Use this if a quote has ever lapsed and forced a re-negotiation because nobody followed up before the locked-in pricing ran out.

jobs.name: Quote-to-Bind Conversion Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Calculates the quote-to-bind conversion rate over the trailing period and flags it when it drops below target, so sales/underwriting leaders catch a pricing or process problem while it's still small. Use this if a falling close rate has ever gone unnoticed for a full quarter because nobody was watching quotes lost, only policies written.

jobs.name: Quote-to-Invoice Conversion Follow-Up
jobs.description: Flags quotes/estimates that were sent to a customer but never approved or converted into a scheduled job after a set number of days, and drafts a follow-up nudge for each. Use this if quotes have ever gone quiet after being sent — no yes, no no, just silence — and nobody circled back to close the sale.

jobs.name: Rabies Certificate/Tag Issuance Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks patients who received a rabies vaccine and flags any where the signed rabies certificate and tag haven't actually been issued to the owner within a reasonable window. Use this if a rabies vaccine has ever been given and logged, but the client left without the paper certificate or tag that's legally required for licensing — distinct from pet-vaccine-due-reminder.yaml, which tracks upcoming/overdue vaccine due dates rather than post-administration paperwork issuance.

jobs.name: Rate Case Filing Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Checks the active rate case's docket calendar for upcoming deadlines — testimony, discovery responses, briefs, filing dates — and reminds regulatory and finance staff which ones are due soon. Use this if a rate case filing has ever slipped or a discovery response nearly missed its deadline because it was tracked only in someone's inbox.

jobs.name: Rate Increase Notice Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming tenant rate increases against the required advance-notice period from the tenant's state and lease, and flags any increase where the notice hasn't gone out with enough lead time. Use this if you want an early warning before a rate increase becomes legally unenforceable, or triggers a complaint, because the required notice period wasn't met.

jobs.name: Raw Material Shortage Risk Check
jobs.description: Compares raw material stock against what the production schedule needs over the next planning window, and flags anything that'll run short. Use this if a production run has ever stalled mid-shift because a component ran out and nobody had cross-checked stock against the schedule beforehand.

jobs.name: Read Replica Lag Check
jobs.description: Checks how far behind a database read replica has fallen relative to its primary and flags it when the lag exceeds an acceptable threshold. Use this if anything reads from the replica (dashboards, reports, read-only API traffic) and stale data would be confusing or wrong.

jobs.name: Reading Inbox Processing Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to process your "read later" or saved-articles queue before it piles up into an unmanageable backlog. Use this if you save articles with good intentions but the list only ever grows and never shrinks.

jobs.name: Reading List Nudge
jobs.description: Reminds you what's next on your reading list. Use this if you save articles/books to "read later" and later never comes.

jobs.name: Public Records Fee Waiver Decision Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks pending public-records fee waiver requests against the statutory deadline for deciding on the waiver itself (separate from, and often shorter than, the overall records response deadline) and flags the ones close to due. Use this if a fee waiver request has ever sat undecided long enough to blow past its own decision clock, even though the underlying records request was still being tracked fine.

jobs.name: Recruiter Req Load Check
jobs.description: Counts how many open requisitions each recruiter is currently carrying and flags anyone stacked well above the team average. Use this if one recruiter has ever quietly ended up owning twice as many open reqs as a teammate because req assignment was ad hoc and nobody was watching the split.

jobs.name: Recurring Service Contract Invoice Aging Check
jobs.description: Scans open invoices for recurring maintenance clients and flags any invoice past its due date, grouped by how many days overdue. Use this if a recurring client has ever quietly gone three billing cycles past due while crews kept servicing the property anyway.

jobs.name: Recurring Donor Payment Failure Check
jobs.description: Scans recurring monthly-donation records for failed charges and flags donors whose card needs updating. Use this if a monthly donor has ever quietly stopped giving because their card expired and nobody noticed until the annual report showed the drop.

jobs.name: Recurring Invoice Generation Check
jobs.description: Checks which recurring cleaning clients are due for their next invoice based on their billing frequency and last invoice date, and flags anyone who hasn't been invoiced on schedule. Use this if a recurring client has ever gone a billing cycle (or two) without getting invoiced because nobody was tracking who was due and when.

jobs.name: Recurring Payment Failure Check
jobs.description: Flags subscription charges that failed and haven't successfully retried yet. Use this if a failed card has ever silently churned a customer because nobody noticed the retry never succeeded.

jobs.name: Recurring Task Queue Reset
jobs.description: Clears out last week's completed recurring-task checklist and creates a fresh one from your template, so every cycle starts with the same predefined owners and checklist instead of a copy-pasted mess. Use this if your recurring weekly checklist has ever quietly drifted because someone edited last week's copy instead of starting clean.

jobs.name: Reefer Temperature Excursion Watch
jobs.description: Scans logged temperature readings for a refrigerated (reefer) shipment and flags any reading outside the required range for that load. Use this if a temperature-sensitive shipment has ever arrived spoiled because a reefer unit drifted out of range for hours before anyone looked at the data logger.

jobs.name: Reference Check Overdue Reminder
jobs.description: Checks candidates whose reference checks were requested but never came back within a set window and flags them so recruiters can chase them down. Use this if an offer has ever stalled because a reference check quietly sat unanswered for weeks.

jobs.name: Referral Bonus Payout Reminder
jobs.description: Tracks employee-referred hires against their bonus payout milestone (e.g. 90 days employed) and flags anyone due so payroll can be told. Use this if a referral bonus has ever gone unpaid for months because nobody tracked the milestone date after the hire started.

jobs.name: Referral Consult Note Loop-Closure Check
jobs.description: Checks referrals where the specialist visit already happened but no consult note or report has come back to close the loop. Use this if a patient has ever been referred out, actually seen the specialist, and the referring practice never got the note back — leaving the primary chart without follow-up findings and nobody noticing until the next visit.

jobs.name: Referral Program Follow-up Reminder
jobs.description: Flags member referrals that haven't been followed up on within a set number of days, whether that's contacting the referred lead or crediting the referring member. Use this if a member has ever referred a friend, never heard anything back, and quietly stopped bothering to refer anyone else again.

jobs.name: Referral Follow-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Flags customer referrals that were asked for or given, and haven't had a logged follow-up after a set number of days. Use this if a happy customer has ever offered a referral introduction and it fell through the cracks because nobody owned the follow-up.

jobs.name: Pending Referral Follow-up Check
jobs.description: Checks outbound specialist referrals that haven't been scheduled or completed within a set window and flags them for follow-up. Use this if a patient has ever fallen through the cracks after being referred out, with nobody confirming they actually got the appointment.

jobs.name: Referral Program Follow-Up Drafts
jobs.description: Flags clients who referred a new customer but haven't yet been thanked or rewarded under the referral program, and drafts the thank-you or reward message. Use this if a referral has ever gone unacknowledged long enough that the client stopped bothering to send more.

jobs.name: Referral Program Performance Tracker
jobs.description: Computes referral-to-signup and referral-to-paid conversion rates from a referral log and flags when the program's performance drops. Use this if a referral program launched with fanfare and nobody has checked its numbers since.

jobs.name: Medication Refill Sync Program Check
jobs.description: Checks patients enrolled in your refill-synchronization program (all their maintenance meds filled on one shared date each month) for medications that have drifted off that shared date. Use this if a synced patient has ever ended up back on separate pickup dates without anyone noticing the drift.

jobs.name: Refrigerated Medication Temperature Log Check
jobs.description: Checks the pharmacy fridge/freezer temperature log for readings outside the safe range for refrigerated medications and vaccines. Use this if a temperature excursion has ever gone unnoticed for hours because no one was actively watching the log between scheduled checks.

jobs.name: Refund/Credit Issuance Anomaly Check
jobs.description: Checks refunds and account credits issued by support agents over a recent window and flags any agent issuing far more than the team average. Use this if a support-issued refund or credit has ever gone out at an unusual rate before anyone reviewed whether it reflected a real product problem or a policy being applied too loosely.

jobs.name: Reinsurance Treaty Renewal Tracker
jobs.description: Warns before a reinsurance treaty's renewal or non-renewal notice date so terms can be renegotiated or the market re-shopped in time. Use this if a treaty has ever auto-renewed on unfavorable terms because the notice window quietly passed.

jobs.name: Renewable Portfolio Standard Compliance Check
jobs.description: Compares this year's renewable energy procured or generated so far against the pace needed to hit the utility's annual Renewable Portfolio Standard (RPS) requirement, and flags whether the utility is on track or falling behind. Use this if your utility has a regulatory renewable-energy target to hit each year and wants an early warning before it's too late in the year to buy more renewable energy credits or contract more generation.

jobs.name: Rent Increase Notice Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming lease anniversaries against the legally required notice period for a rent increase, and drafts the increase notice once one is due. Use this if you've ever missed the window to raise rent at renewal because the required notice lead time (30/60/90 days, depending on jurisdiction) quietly passed.

jobs.name: Rent Payment Late Check
jobs.description: Flags tenants whose rent is overdue past the grace period. Use this if a late payment has ever gone unnoticed for weeks because nobody was cross-checking the rent roll against the bank deposits.

jobs.name: Rent Roll Vacancy Loss Report
jobs.description: Rolls up the whole portfolio's rent ledger to calculate total dollar vacancy loss (market rent for every vacant unit, summed) for the period. Use this if you've ever known "a few units are empty" without knowing what that's actually costing you in dollars this month.

jobs.name: Rental Car Reservation Confirmation Check
jobs.description: Reminds you to double-check a rental car reservation's confirmation status ahead of pickup. Use this if you've ever shown up to a rental counter and found your reservation wasn't actually in the system.

jobs.name: Rental Gear Return Reminder
jobs.description: Flags rented cameras, lenses, and lighting gear that are due back soon, and separately flags any rental still needed for another shoot before its return date. Use this if a late fee has ever snuck up on a rental camera body or light kit, or gear got returned only to be needed again for a shoot the next day.

jobs.name: Rental License / Registration Renewal Check
jobs.description: Warns before a municipal rental license, landlord registration, or certificate of occupancy for rental use is due to expire. Use this if a city has ever fined you, or blocked a new lease, because a rental registration lapsed and nobody was tracking its renewal cycle.

jobs.name: Rental Vacancy Check
jobs.description: Flags a rental listing that's been vacant longer than expected. Use this if a unit has ever sat empty for months while everyone assumed someone else was handling the listing.

jobs.name: Reorder Point Staleness Check
jobs.description: Flags SKUs whose reorder point hasn't been recalculated in a long time while their sales velocity has meaningfully changed, so the trigger for reordering no longer matches how fast the item actually sells. Use this if a reorder point has ever gone stale after a product got slower or faster, leading to either a stockout or a pile of unneeded stock.

jobs.name: Repair Order Cycle Time Trend Monitor
jobs.description: Reviews closed repair orders from the past week and compares the average check-in-to-checkout cycle time against your rolling baseline, flagging a trend drift even when no single order looks late. Use this if turnaround has ever quietly crept up week over week without any one repair order tripping an aging alert.

jobs.name: Repair Order Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks open repair orders and flags any vehicle that's been sitting in the shop past your target turnaround with no status update. Use this if a car has ever sat on a lift for days with no visible progress because it fell out of the technician's mental queue.

jobs.name: Repeat Contact Same Issue Watch
jobs.description: Reads recent tickets from the same customers and flags cases where someone has opened multiple separate tickets about what looks like the same underlying issue. Use this if a customer has ever had to file a third ticket on the same problem because each prior one got closed without anyone noticing it was a repeat, not a new complaint.

jobs.name: Git Repo Health Check
jobs.description: Checks a git repo for branches nobody's touched in a while, uncommitted changes sitting around, and pull requests waiting on review, then reports a short digest. Use this if you want a daily nudge on repo hygiene without checking everything by hand.

jobs.name: Report Card Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before the grade submission deadline for report cards. Use this if grades have ever gone in late because the cutoff snuck up during the last busy week of the term.

jobs.name: Requisition Approval Pending Check
jobs.description: Flags job requisitions that are still waiting on hiring-manager or finance sign-off and haven't been posted yet. Use this if a req has ever sat in someone's approval queue for weeks before anyone realized it was never actually posted.

jobs.name: Reservation No-show Check
jobs.description: Checks yesterday's no-show rate against your normal baseline and flags a spike. Use this if a run of no-shows has ever quietly hurt revenue for days before anyone connected the pattern.

jobs.name: Reservation No-Show Pattern Check
jobs.description: Reviews recent reservation no-shows and flags parties/times where no-shows cluster, so you know whether a deposit or confirmation-call policy would help. Use this if a certain night or party size keeps costing you empty tables.

jobs.name: Resident Care Conference Scheduling Reminder
jobs.description: Checks resident records for anyone whose next required care-conference meeting with their family or responsible party is coming due soon or is already overdue, based on the last conference date on file. Use this if care conferences have ever slipped past their required review window because nobody was tracking the date across every resident.

jobs.name: Resident Council Grievance Follow-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Scans the logged resident/family grievances filed through resident council meetings or the facility's grievance process and flags any that don't have a documented resolution or response within your required turnaround window. Use this if a grievance raised at a resident council meeting has ever quietly gone unanswered because it only lived in someone's meeting notes instead of a tracked log.

jobs.name: Resident Elopement Risk Reassessment Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds staff when a resident's elopement or wandering-risk assessment is coming due for its required periodic reassessment. Use this if you want to make sure no resident's wandering-risk status goes stale between scheduled reviews, especially after a change in condition.

jobs.name: Resident Immunization Consent Tracking Check
jobs.description: Checks the seasonal influenza and other offered-vaccine consent log for residents who are missing a recorded consent decision (accept or decline) as the vaccination clinic date approaches. Use this if a resident has ever been skipped during a vaccination clinic, or given a vaccine without one, simply because their consent form was never logged either way.

jobs.name: Resident Leave-of-Absence Return Check
jobs.description: Checks the resident sign-out log for day passes and overnight leaves-of-absence and flags anyone whose expected return time has passed with no logged return. Use this if a resident has ever been off-site on an approved outing or family visit and the facility didn't notice they were overdue to come back until someone asked where they were.

jobs.name: Resident Move-In Assessment Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks newly admitted residents against the regulatory deadline for completing their initial intake and care-needs assessment, and flags anyone approaching or past that deadline. Use this if a resident has ever gone days into their stay without a completed care plan because the admissions paperwork clock wasn't being watched.

jobs.name: Resident Trust Fund Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares each resident's personal-funds/trust account ledger balance against the facility's reconciled bank balance for that account and flags any mismatch. Use this if you want an early warning when a resident trust fund ledger has drifted from the actual bank balance, before it turns into a resident-funds compliance finding.

jobs.name: Resident Weight Loss Trend Check
jobs.description: Compares each resident's earliest and latest logged weight within a recent time window and flags anyone whose unintended weight loss crosses a set percentage, a common early clinical warning sign in this population. Use this if you want a standing check that a slow, easy-to-miss weight decline gets surfaced before it becomes a bigger health issue.

jobs.name: Resort Amenity Utilization Check
jobs.description: Checks bookable non-spa amenities — pool cabanas, golf tee times, bike rentals, tennis courts — against available slots for the week and flags amenities running well under target utilization. Use this if a resort fee has ever been hard to justify to guests because half the amenities it supposedly covers were sitting empty and nobody had the numbers to know it.

jobs.name: Pro-Shop/Supplement Inventory Reorder Alert
jobs.description: Checks pro-shop and supplement stock levels against a reorder point per item and flags what needs restocking. Use this if a best-selling protein powder or pair of gloves has ever sat out of stock for weeks because nobody was watching shelf counts until a member asked for it.

jobs.name: Retail Product Low-Stock Check
jobs.description: Scans your retail/backbar inventory log and flags skincare, haircare, or nail products at or below reorder point. Use this if a stylist or esthetician has ever reached for a product mid-service and found the shelf empty because nobody was watching the count.

jobs.name: Retainage / Holdback Release Tracker
jobs.description: Flags subcontractor retainage (holdback) that's eligible for release based on project completion percentage or elapsed lien period, so it doesn't sit uncollected for months after it was earned. Use this if a sub has ever had to chase a general contractor for retainage that was technically releasable but nobody flagged it.

jobs.name: Retainer Hours Overage Check
jobs.description: Compares each client's hours logged this month against the hours their retainer contract allows, and flags any client who is close to or already over that cap. Use this if you've ever billed a client for a flat monthly fee and only discovered afterward that your team quietly worked far more hours than the contract covers.

jobs.name: Retirement Contribution Pace Check
jobs.description: Checks whether your 401(k)/IRA contributions so far this year are on pace to hit the annual limit before it resets, based on a log you keep updated. Use this if you've ever realized in November that you're nowhere near maxing out and there's no way to catch up in time.

jobs.name: Retirement Plan Enrollment Deadline Check
jobs.description: Flags employees who are eligible for the 401(k)/retirement plan but haven't enrolled or waived as their enrollment deadline approaches. Use this if someone has ever missed the window to make an active election and got dropped into a default auto-enrollment deferral rate they didn't actually want.

jobs.name: Return Fraud Pattern Check
jobs.description: Checks recent returns for patterns that look like abuse — the same customer returning unusually often, or a spike in receiptless returns — instead of treating every return as an isolated, no-questions-asked event. Use this if return fraud has ever quietly eaten margin for months because nobody was looking at returns in aggregate.

jobs.name: Return Rate Quality Signal Watch
jobs.description: Compares each SKU's return rate for the period against a threshold and flags any product returning far more than normal, a signal worth investigating as a quality, sizing, or listing-accuracy problem. Use this if a defective batch or a misleading size chart has ever kept selling for months because nobody looked at returns broken out by product.

jobs.name: Return/Refund Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks how many return/refund requests are sitting unprocessed and flags any past your stated turnaround time. Use this if refund complaints have ever shown up in reviews before anyone internally noticed the backlog.

jobs.name: Return-to-Vendor Authorization Tracker
jobs.description: Checks return-to-vendor requests for defective or excess stock against each vendor's promised authorization turnaround time, and flags any request still waiting on a return authorization number past that window. Use this if vendors are slow to approve returns and you want to know which requests to chase down before the stock sits in a back room indefinitely.

jobs.name: Returns Processing Backlog Check
jobs.description: Scans the returns log for items that have sat unprocessed longer than your target turnaround time. Use this if returned inventory has ever piled up because nobody was tracking how long items had been waiting to be inspected and restocked or disposed of.

jobs.name: Reverse Distribution Return Credit Tracker
jobs.description: Checks expired/unsaleable medication sent to a reverse distributor for destruction against the credit memos received back, and flags any shipment that's gone past a reasonable turnaround with no credit posted. Use this if a box of expired stock has ever gone out for destruction and the manufacturer credit that was supposed to come back for it just never got tracked down.

jobs.name: Review Request Nudge
jobs.description: Flags customers who bought a while ago and haven't been asked for a review yet. Use this if review requests only happen when someone remembers to send them.

jobs.name: Review Response Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks all product reviews, not just negative ones, for any that have gone past your response SLA without a public reply. Use this if a perfectly fine 3-star review has ever sat unanswered for months because your team only ever triages the 1-star ones.

jobs.name: RFI Response Time Tracker
jobs.description: Flags open Requests for Information (RFIs) that have gone unanswered longer than the agreed response window. Use this if a crew has ever stalled on a detail because an RFI sent to the architect or engineer sat unanswered for weeks with nobody chasing it.

jobs.name: RFP Submission Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Looks ahead at upcoming RFP (request for proposal) and pitch submission deadlines and lists the ones due within a set number of days. Use this if your new-business team has ever scrambled at the last minute, or missed a submission window, because a deadline wasn't on anyone's radar.

jobs.name: Rights and License Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a granted or acquired rights/licensing deal (foreign rights, film/TV options, audio, translation) expires or comes up for renewal. Use this if a rights deal has ever lapsed silently because the expiry date only lived in the signed contract's PDF.

jobs.name: RMD Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns as your Required Minimum Distribution (RMD) deadline for the year approaches, based on a date you keep updated. Use this if you or someone in your household is subject to RMDs and an early reminder beats a last-minute scramble (and the IRS penalty for missing it).

jobs.name: Roaming Partner Agreement Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks wireless roaming partner agreements for upcoming renewal or rate-review deadlines and warns with enough lead time to renegotiate. Use this if a roaming agreement has ever rolled over at stale rates because nobody flagged the renewal window before it closed.

jobs.name: Robots.txt Blanket-Block Check
jobs.description: Checks that your robots.txt hasn't accidentally blocked every crawler from your entire site. Use this if a robots.txt edit has ever accidentally tanked your search traffic.

jobs.name: Preventive Maintenance Work Order Tracker
jobs.description: Checks scheduled preventive maintenance work orders (HVAC service, fire safety checks, deep cleans) against their due dates and flags any overdue or rooms that have gone too long without a PM cycle. Use this if a room has ever gone a full year without its scheduled HVAC or safety check because it only got attention when something broke.

jobs.name: Route/Crew Scheduling Gap Check
jobs.description: Scans tomorrow's mowing/maintenance route list and flags any stop that has no crew assigned, or a crew assigned with zero members. Use this if a crew has ever shown up to the yard in the morning and found out a route had nobody on it.

jobs.name: Route Load Optimization Check
jobs.description: Checks planned truckload trailer fill rates and flags loads shipping significantly under capacity. Use this if a half-empty trailer has ever gone out the door because nobody checked fill rate before dispatch, paying full linehaul cost for a fraction of the freight.

jobs.name: Royalty Statement Due Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a royalty statement and payment is due to an author or co-author. Use this if a royalty statement has ever gone out late (or didn't go out at all) because the payout schedule wasn't tracked anywhere.

jobs.name: Podcast RSS Feed Health Check
jobs.description: Checks that your podcast's RSS feed is reachable and still valid XML with the required podcast tags. Use this if a feed has ever silently broken (bad edit, hosting hiccup, malformed enclosure) and stopped new episodes from reaching Apple Podcasts or Spotify for days before anyone noticed.

jobs.name: RSS Feed Validation
jobs.description: Checks your RSS/Atom feed is valid XML and shows the most recent item's publish date. Use this if you've ever shipped a broken feed and only found out when a reader's app stopped updating.

jobs.name: RSS-to-Social Repurpose Draft
jobs.description: Checks your blog/RSS feed for new posts and drafts a set of social posts repurposing each one, instead of publishing and moving on without ever promoting it. Use this if you've ever shipped a blog post and then simply forgot to tell anyone it existed.

jobs.name: RSU Vesting Schedule Reminder
jobs.description: Checks your equity compensation vesting schedule and flags any vest date coming up within your lookahead window. Use this if RSU or option vesting events have ever caught you off guard for tax withholding or sell-to-cover planning.

jobs.name: RSVP Follow-up Reminder
jobs.description: Flags invitees who haven't RSVP'd as the event date gets close. Use this if you've ever had to guess headcount because half the guest list never replied and nobody chased them.

jobs.name: S3 Public Bucket Check
jobs.description: Checks your S3 buckets for public access and flags any that are exposed. Use this if a misconfigured bucket policy has ever quietly made private data public.

jobs.name: Team SaaS Seat Audit
jobs.description: Flags team SaaS seats (Slack, Notion, GitHub, etc.) nobody's actually used in a while. Use this if you suspect you're paying for seats of people who left or tools nobody opens anymore.

jobs.name: Safe Sleep Checklist Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks the infant room's daily safe-sleep checklist (crib checks logged at required intervals) for any missing entries. Use this if a required sleep-check log has ever gone unfilled for a shift because a busy room meant someone forgot to mark it down, not because the check itself was skipped.

jobs.name: Safety Equipment Operator Certification Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns before an operator's certification for safety-sensitive equipment (forklift, overhead crane, powered industrial truck, etc.) expires. Use this if an uncertified operator has ever kept running equipment for weeks because nobody was tracking cert expiry dates against the roster.

jobs.name: Safety Equipment Inspection Check
jobs.description: Checks safety equipment (AEDs, fire extinguishers, first-aid kits) against their required inspection or expiry dates and flags anything overdue. Use this if an AED battery or first-aid kit has ever quietly expired without anyone noticing until an emergency made it obvious — distinct from the daily cleaning log, this tracks periodic safety-compliance inspections rather than day-to-day tidiness tasks.

jobs.name: Facility Safety Equipment Inspection Log Check
jobs.description: Checks that fire extinguishers, first-aid kits, and gate/latch hardware around the boarding, daycare, and grooming areas each have a logged inspection within the required interval, and flags anything overdue. Use this if a routine safety inspection has ever quietly lapsed until an insurance or licensing visit caught it.

jobs.name: Health & Safety Inspection Due Reminder
jobs.description: Warns before a health department, board-of-cosmetology, or fire/safety inspection is expected, based on your jurisdiction's typical interval. Use this if an inspector has ever shown up to a treatment room that wasn't ready because nobody was tracking when the last inspection happened.

jobs.name: Safety Stock Buffer Erosion Check
jobs.description: Looks at how often a SKU has dipped below its safety stock line over a trailing window, not just whether it's below it right now, and flags SKUs breaching it repeatedly as a sign the buffer itself is set too low. Use this if a "safety" stock level has ever stopped being safe because demand grew but nobody revisited the number, so it kept getting breached quietly instead of ever showing up on a single-point low-stock check.

jobs.name: Salary Band Compression Check
jobs.description: Flags cases where a newer or shorter-tenured employee's pay is at or above a longer-tenured peer's pay within the same role. Use this if a market-rate new hire has ever been paid more than a veteran on the same team doing the same job, and it only became a retention problem after the veteran found out from a coworker.

jobs.name: Sales Collateral Staleness Check
jobs.description: Checks which version of sales decks, one-pagers, and battlecards reps are actually attaching to outbound emails or logging on CRM activity, and flags reps still sending a deprecated or outdated version. Use this if marketing ships a new deck or pricing sheet and you want to know who never switched over to it.

jobs.name: Sales Per Square Foot Tracker
jobs.description: Calculates each store's sales-per-square-foot for the period and flags stores falling below a benchmark. Use this if underperforming store footprints have ever gone unnoticed until an annual real-estate review instead of getting flagged while there was still time to act.

jobs.name: Sales Tax Nexus Threshold Check
jobs.description: Adds up your cumulative sales revenue by state over the rolling period each state uses, and flags any state getting close to its economic-nexus threshold for requiring sales-tax registration. Use this if you sell across state lines and don't want to find out you owe back taxes and penalties because nobody noticed a state's revenue threshold was crossed.

jobs.name: SBOM Dependency Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares your current software bill of materials against the last snapshot and flags any package that was added or removed, regardless of whether it has a known vulnerability. Use this if you want to notice an unexpected new dependency show up in a build the same week it lands, instead of only hearing about it later from a vulnerability scanner.

jobs.name: Schema Markup Validation Check
jobs.description: Checks published pages' structured-data markup (JSON-LD/schema.org) for syntax errors, missing required fields, and deprecated types, separate from meta tags like title and description. Use this if you rely on rich results (star ratings, FAQ snippets, breadcrumbs, product info) in search and want to know before Google silently stops showing them.

jobs.name: School Bus Route On-Time Check
jobs.description: Reviews bus route arrival data and flags routes that are consistently running late. Use this if a route has ever drifted later and later over weeks with only individual parent complaints, never a pattern anyone actually looked at.

jobs.name: Scope Creep / Change Order Check
jobs.description: Compares logged work and time entries against the line items in a client's original statement of work, and flags work that doesn't map to any SOW line item and has no approved change order on file. Use this if your team has ever done extra work for a client "as a favor" that was never formally scoped, quoted, or billed.

jobs.name: Scrap and Waste Rate Watch
jobs.description: Tracks scrapped material as a percentage of total material consumed and flags it when it runs above target. Use this if scrap has ever crept up gradually until it showed up as a surprise hit to material cost at month-end.

jobs.name: Screen Time Check
jobs.description: Checks today's screen time against a goal and tells you if you're over. Use this if you're trying to cut down on screen time but never actually look at the stats your phone/laptop already collects.

jobs.name: Prescription (Script) Queue Aging Check
jobs.description: Scans the pharmacy's incoming prescription queue export and flags any script that's been sitting unfilled longer than your target turnaround time. Use this if a prescription has ever gotten buried in the queue during a busy shift and a patient showed up before it was ready.

jobs.name: SDS Chemical Safety Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks your Safety Data Sheet (SDS) log for chemicals currently in use and flags any that are missing or older than your refresh window. Use this if you've ever failed (or worried about failing) an OSHA-style walkthrough because a chemical on the truck didn't have a current SDS on file.

jobs.name: Seasonal Boarding Waitlist Review
jobs.description: During peak boarding seasons (holidays, summer), reviews the waitlist against openings created by cancellations and suggests who to contact next, in what order. Use this if you've ever had a boarding slot open up during a busy season and let it sit empty while the waitlist went uncontacted.

jobs.name: Seasonal Color-Rotation Planting Reminder
jobs.description: Checks each commercial client's contracted seasonal color rotation (spring/summer/fall/winter annuals) against the last planting date and flags any bed that's overdue for the next rotation. Use this if a property manager has ever complained that last season's flowers were still dead in the beds when the new season started.

jobs.name: Seasonal Deep-Clean Upsell Reminder
jobs.description: Flags recurring clients who haven't had a deep-clean or seasonal add-on service in over a set number of months (or have none on record) and drafts a friendly upsell message offering to schedule one. Use this if you've ever realized months after the fact that a regular client was never offered a seasonal deep clean, leaving revenue on the table.

jobs.name: Seasonal Mini-Session Promo Reminder
jobs.description: Flags past clients who haven't booked a seasonal mini-session in over a set number of months and drafts a promo outreach message inviting them back. Use this if a seasonal mini-session slot has ever gone unbooked because past clients were never reminded it was that time of year again.

jobs.name: Seasonal Package Promo Reminder
jobs.description: Looks ahead at your historically slow months and reminds you when it's time to launch a seasonal package or promo before the slow stretch hits. Use this if a slow month has ever crept up on you and the "spring detox package" promo went out two weeks too late to matter.

jobs.name: Seasonal Staffing Coverage Check
jobs.description: Compares scheduled labor hours against a forecasted seasonal-peak staffing plan and flags stores that are under-scheduled. Use this if a store has ever gone into a holiday or back-to-school rush understaffed because the seasonal plan and the actual schedule quietly drifted apart.

jobs.name: Seasonal Stock Build-Up Pacing Check
jobs.description: Compares current stock levels for seasonal items against a build-up target curve ahead of a known peak date, and flags items falling behind pace or running ahead of it. Use this if you've ever hit peak season either short on a hero item or sitting on far too much of it, because build-up progress wasn't checked until it was too late to correct.

jobs.name: Seasonal Vehicle Readiness Check
jobs.description: Reviews the fleet ahead of winter or summer and flags vehicles missing seasonal prep items like winter tires, coolant/antifreeze levels, battery load tests, or AC service. Use this if a vehicle has ever failed to start on the first cold morning of the year, or overheated in a summer heat wave, because seasonal prep only happened after something went wrong.

jobs.name: Seat Utilization Upsell Check
jobs.description: Flags accounts that are using most or all of their purchased seats, a strong signal they're about to hit a limit. Use this if you've ever found out an account outgrew its plan only after they complained about being locked out of adding a new user.

jobs.name: Second Shooter & Assistant Payment Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks payments owed to second shooters, assistants, and other contractors per booking and flags any still unpaid past your studio's payment terms. Use this if a second shooter has ever had to chase you for their cut of a wedding weeks after the shoot because nobody was tracking contractor payouts alongside client invoices.

jobs.name: Committed Secrets Scan
jobs.description: Scans a repo for accidentally committed API keys, tokens, and private keys. Use this if you want a safety net for the "oops, committed a key" mistake everyone makes eventually.

jobs.name: Security Awareness Training Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks your security-awareness training records for employees whose required course is past due with no completion on file, and flags them. Use this if you want everyone to actually finish the annual security training on schedule instead of it quietly sliding to "whenever I get to it."

jobs.name: Security Camera Outage Check
jobs.description: Checks the facility's security camera heartbeat or status logs for any camera that has stopped reporting in, and flags it as offline. Use this if you want to know about a gap in security camera coverage right away instead of finding out only after an incident, when it's too late to fix the blind spot.

jobs.name: Security Deposit Return Deadline Check
jobs.description: Flags move-outs where the statutory deadline to return the security deposit (or an itemized deduction statement) is approaching or has passed. Use this if a deposit has ever gone back late and triggered a penalty claim or small-claims dispute because nobody was tracking the move-out date against the legal return window.

jobs.name: Security Log Retention Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks that your security log exports (SIEM, CloudTrail, audit-trail dumps) have a continuous daily file for every day in your required retention window and flags any missing day. Use this if you've ever needed logs from three months ago for an investigation or audit and found a silent export-job gap right in the middle of the window.

jobs.name: Self-Checkout Error Rate Check
jobs.description: Checks self-checkout lane transaction logs for how often a transaction needs an error override or an attendant to step in, and flags any lane or time period where that rate climbs above a normal threshold. Use this if you want to catch a malfunctioning scale, a scanner going out of calibration, or a confusing prompt flow before it slows down every customer at that lane.

jobs.name: Self-Serve Deflection Rate Watch
jobs.description: Tracks the ratio of help center article views to new support tickets created and flags it when self-service deflection is dropping. Use this if customers have ever quietly stopped finding answers on their own and started filing tickets instead, without anyone noticing until ticket volume itself already spiked.

jobs.name: Senior Pet Wellness Recall Tracker
jobs.description: Finds senior pets (past a configurable age threshold) who are overdue for a semi-annual senior wellness exam or bloodwork panel and drafts outreach. Use this if an older pet has ever gone a full year between visits when twice-yearly senior screening would have caught a treatable condition early — distinct from pet-vaccine-due-reminder.yaml, which tracks vaccine due dates rather than age-based wellness screening cadence.

jobs.name: SEO Meta Tag Check
jobs.description: Checks a list of pages for missing title, meta description, and Open Graph tags. Use this if pages have ever shipped without basic SEO/social-preview tags because nobody double-checked.

jobs.name: SEO Keyword Rank Drop Watch
jobs.description: Checks a tracked keyword's search ranking and flags a real drop. Use this if a page has ever slipped off page one and nobody noticed until organic traffic was already down for weeks.

jobs.name: Septic Tank Pump Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to have your septic tank pumped based on how long it's been since the last service. Use this if you've ever had a slow drain or backup because pumping got pushed off a year (or three) past when it should've happened.

jobs.name: Service Appointment No-Show Tracker
jobs.description: Checks today's service appointment schedule partway through the day and flags customers who booked a slot but never checked in, so the bay can be reopened to a walk-in instead of sitting empty. Use this if a bay has ever sat idle all morning because a no-show was never noticed until the tech asked what happened to their 9 o'clock.

jobs.name: Service Award Milestone Tracker
jobs.description: Checks the employee roster against your tenure-milestone schedule (5/10/15/20 years, etc.) and flags upcoming or overdue work anniversaries that qualify for a service award, so the gift or bonus actually gets ordered in time. Use this if a 10-year anniversary has ever passed with no award because nobody cross-checked hire dates against the award tiers until the employee mentioned it themselves.

jobs.name: Service Bay Utilization Check
jobs.description: Checks each service bay's scheduled hours against its available hours for the day and flags bays running well under or over target utilization. Use this if a shop has ever had techs standing around on one side of the floor while the other side is double-booked, and nobody noticed until the day was already gone.

jobs.name: Prepaid Service Package Credit Expiry Check
jobs.description: Scans prepaid boarding, daycare, or grooming package balances for clients with unused credits whose expiry date is approaching or has passed. Use this if a client has ever bought a 10-visit daycare pack, used three, and let the rest quietly expire because nobody nudged them to book before the window closed.

jobs.name: Service Ticket Churn Risk Review
jobs.description: Reviews customers with repeated service tickets in a recent window and drafts a churn-risk summary with recommended outreach. Use this if a customer has ever quietly churned after their third outage ticket because nobody connected the dots between separate complaints.

jobs.name: Session No-Show Pattern Tracker
jobs.description: Counts no-shows and late cancellations per member over a rolling window and flags anyone crossing a repeat-offender threshold, whether it's personal-training sessions or booked classes. Use this if a member has ever quietly racked up a dozen no-show bookings that blocked other members from that same slot, without anyone tallying the pattern.

jobs.name: Settlement Payment Schedule Tracker
jobs.description: Checks scheduled settlement agreement installment payments — both owed and owed to you — and flags anything due soon or missed. Use this if a settlement installment has ever been paid late (risking default terms kicking back in) or received late without anyone noticing until the next reconciliation.

jobs.name: Sewer Overflow Report Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds compliance staff of the regulatory reporting deadline for a sanitary sewer overflow (SSO) that has already been logged, since most jurisdictions require a written report within a fixed number of hours or days after the event. Use this if your utility has SSO events on record and needs to make sure the required regulatory report actually gets filed on time, not to detect overflows in the first place.

jobs.name: Shift Handoff Report
jobs.description: Pulls the outgoing shift's production, downtime, and open-issue notes and drafts a handoff summary for the incoming shift lead. Use this if an incoming shift has ever started blind because the handoff was a rushed hallway conversation instead of something written down.

jobs.name: Warehouse Shift Headcount Coverage Check
jobs.description: Compares scheduled headcount against required headcount per shift and flags gaps before the shift starts. Use this if a shift has ever started three people short with no time left to call in coverage, because the staffing gap wasn't checked until people were already clocking in.

jobs.name: Shipment Delay Watch
jobs.description: Checks a shipment's tracking status and flags it if it hasn't moved in a while. Use this if a stuck shipment has ever gone unnoticed until a customer asked where their order was.

jobs.name: Shipping Delay Check
jobs.description: Checks shipped orders against their expected delivery date and flags anything running late. Use this if a customer has ever emailed asking "where's my order" before you had any idea it was already late.

jobs.name: Shop Supply & Consumables Reorder Check
jobs.description: Checks bulk shop consumables (shop towels, degreaser, disposable gloves, oil dry, bulk fluids) against reorder thresholds and flags anything running low. Use this if a tech has ever had to stop mid-job because the shop ran out of a supply nobody tracks as closely as billable parts.

jobs.name: Podcast Show Notes Publish Lag Check
jobs.description: Flags episodes that published without show notes (links, timestamps, summary) still missing after a grace period. Use this if listeners have ever asked for a link or timestamp you mentioned in an episode that never made it into the show notes.

jobs.name: Shutoff Moratorium Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks scheduled and recently executed disconnection/shutoff actions against the active regulatory or seasonal moratorium window (such as a winter heating moratorium) and flags any that fall inside a protected period. Use this if a utility has ever had a shutoff go out during a moratorium and turn into a compliance violation and a bad news story.

jobs.name: Side-Project Learning Log Staleness Check
jobs.description: Flags when you haven't written a new entry in your side-project learning log for too long. Use this if you keep notes on what you're learning while building something on the side, but let the notes go stale once life gets busy.

jobs.name: Sign-On Bonus Clawback Tracker
jobs.description: Checks employees who received a sign-on bonus against their repayment commitment period and flags anyone who left before it was satisfied and still shows an uncollected clawback. Use this if an employee has ever left early with an unpaid sign-on-bonus clawback that nobody flagged to finance before the exit was fully processed.

jobs.name: Silver-Medalist Re-engagement Tracker
jobs.description: Matches strong runner-up candidates who were rejected in the past for fit-of-role reasons (not for-cause) against newly open reqs in the same role family, so they get a re-engagement outreach instead of being forgotten. Use this if a great candidate you passed on for one role has ever gone silent for months when a near-identical role opened up right after.

jobs.name: Single-Line Account Rounding Opportunity Check
jobs.description: Scans the client book for policyholders who only carry one line of business with the agency and surfaces them as cross-sell/account-rounding candidates, drafting a short outreach note for the top prospects. Use this if you've ever realized a client with only an auto policy has been shopping their homeowners coverage elsewhere for years because no one ever asked.

jobs.name: Site Search Zero-Results Query Watch
jobs.description: Scans your on-site search log for queries customers typed often that returned zero results, and lists them ranked by how many people hit the dead end. Use this if you've ever discovered — months late — that hundreds of shoppers searched for a product you actually sell, just under a name your catalog didn't recognize.

jobs.name: Sitemap Freshness Check
jobs.description: Checks that your sitemap.xml was actually regenerated recently and isn't quietly stuck on an old snapshot. Use this if your sitemap is generated by a build step that's ever silently failed or skipped.

jobs.name: SIU Fraud Referral Tracker
jobs.description: Checks claims referred to the Special Investigations Unit for suspected fraud and flags any referral that hasn't been triaged or closed within the target window. Use this if a fraud-flagged claim has ever sat in an SIU queue for months with no documented outcome.

jobs.name: Skill-Based Queue Coverage Check
jobs.description: Checks each specialty product-area queue (billing, security, a specific product line) against the agents currently scheduled and rostered with that skill tag, and flags a queue with tickets waiting but nobody qualified on shift. Use this if a specialty ticket has ever sat untouched not because agents were busy, but because none of the agents on shift that hour actually had the skill tag to take it.

jobs.name: Skill Roadmap Progress Check
jobs.description: Reads a checklist file of skill-tree/roadmap items (e.g. a learning roadmap for a new discipline) and reports how many are checked off vs. still open. Use this if you've ever downloaded one of those big "become a X" roadmap images and never looked at it again.

jobs.name: Skip-Level Meeting Reminder
jobs.description: Flags direct reports of your reports who haven't had a skip-level 1:1 with you in a while. Use this if you've ever realized someone two levels down had gone half a year without ever talking to you directly.

jobs.name: SKU Barcode Data Quality Check
jobs.description: Scans your product/SKU export for missing barcodes, duplicate barcodes assigned to more than one SKU, and barcodes with an invalid length or checksum. Use this if a scan has ever failed at receiving or checkout because a barcode was blank, reused, or malformed, and nobody caught it until it was in front of a customer.

jobs.name: SKU Rationalization Candidate Check
jobs.description: Scans sales history for SKUs that have sat with stock on hand and no meaningful sales for a long stretch, and drafts a ranked list of discontinuation candidates with the dollar value they're tying up. Use this if a SKU has ever kept getting reordered out of habit long after it effectively stopped selling, quietly eating warehouse space and cash.

jobs.name: SKU Without Primary Supplier Check
jobs.description: Flags active SKUs that have no primary supplier assigned in the procurement system, which blocks automatic reordering and forces a manual scramble when stock runs low. Use this if a reorder has ever stalled because a SKU was sellable but nobody had linked it to a vendor to actually buy more from.

jobs.name: SLA Breach Warning
jobs.description: Flags open tickets that are about to breach their SLA, before they actually do. Use this if a ticket has ever blown past its SLA with zero warning because the only check was after the fact.

jobs.name: SLA Response-Time Breach Monitor
jobs.description: Checks open service tickets against the response-time commitment tied to their priority level and flags any that have already breached, or are about to. Use this if a premium-support customer has ever waited hours for a first response on an issue you promised a 30-minute turnaround on.

jobs.name: SLA Uptime Breach Tracker
jobs.description: Compares each customer's measured monthly uptime percentage against their contracted SLA and flags anyone below threshold. Use this if you've ever missed an SLA credit obligation because nobody totaled up the downtime minutes until the customer's lawyer did.

jobs.name: Sleep Schedule Consistency Check
jobs.description: Reviews logged bedtime and wake-time data for the past week and flags a week with unusually high variance in sleep timing. Use this if you suspect your sleep schedule has been drifting all over the place but haven't actually looked at the numbers.

jobs.name: Slotting Velocity Review Check
jobs.description: Reviews SKU pick-frequency data against current storage locations and flags fast-movers stuck in slow-to-reach slots (or slow-movers hogging prime golden-zone real estate). Use this if pickers have ever walked past empty golden-zone slots to reach a high-velocity SKU stashed in the back corner because the slotting plan was never revisited after demand shifted.

jobs.name: Smart Contract Upgrade/Deprecation Watch
jobs.description: Watches a tracked smart contract's on-chain events and any linked project announcements for upgrades, migrations, or deprecation notices. Use this if a protocol you depend on has ever migrated to a new contract address and you found out only after something broke.

jobs.name: Smoke Detector Battery Check Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to test/replace smoke detector batteries on a schedule. Use this if the only time you think about smoke detectors is when one starts chirping at 3am.

jobs.name: Snow Removal Contract Activation Threshold Check
jobs.description: Checks the forecast against your snow-removal contract trigger (snowfall total or temperature) and flags whether crews should be activated for tomorrow. Use this if you've ever had a client dispute a snow-removal invoice because it wasn't clear the contracted trigger threshold was actually met.

jobs.name: SOC 2 Evidence Collection Reminder
jobs.description: Walks through the standard control areas a SOC 2 (or similar framework) audit expects evidence for, checks what's already collected and dated for this period, and flags what's still missing. Use this if evidence gathering has ever turned into a last-minute scramble the week the auditor actually asks for it instead of being kept current throughout the period.

jobs.name: Social Media Posting Cadence Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks the social media content calendar for gaps where no post is scheduled within the expected posting cadence for a channel. Use this if a social account has ever gone quiet for days because nobody noticed the scheduling queue ran dry.

jobs.name: Social Mentions Watch
jobs.description: Scans for recent mentions of your brand, product, or repo and summarizes them. Use this if you want to catch a complaint or bug report on social media before it turns into a bigger problem.

jobs.name: Soil Moisture Sensor Threshold Alert
jobs.description: Reads current soil moisture sensor readings per field/zone and alerts when any zone drops below a dry threshold or rises above a saturated threshold. Use this if you have in-field moisture probes or telemetry and want an automatic alert instead of checking the dashboard yourself every day.

jobs.name: Sourcing Channel Effectiveness Check
jobs.description: Compares how many hires each sourcing channel (job boards, referrals, agencies, outbound) actually produces against what you're spending or investing in it, and flags channels that aren't pulling their weight. Use this if you've kept renewing a job board subscription or paying an agency out of habit without checking whether it's still converting to hires.

jobs.name: SOW Deliverable Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Looks ahead at deliverables listed in client statements of work (SOWs) and flags the ones due soon so account and project staff don't miss a contractual milestone. Use this if a deliverable date has ever slipped past because it was buried in a signed SOW nobody checked back on.

jobs.name: Spa Equipment Maintenance Due Check
jobs.description: Tracks facial steamers, massage tables, hot stone warmers, and other equipment against their maintenance interval and flags anything overdue. Use this if a facial steamer has ever broken down mid-treatment because nobody was tracking when it was last serviced.

jobs.name: Spaced Repetition Deck Staleness Check
jobs.description: Checks an exported spaced-repetition app stats file (e.g. from Anki) and warns if your overdue-card count has been climbing, meaning your review habit has slipped even if you haven't fully stopped. Use this if you run a real Anki-style deck (not just the simple CSV in daily-flashcard-review) and want an early warning before the backlog snowballs.

jobs.name: Spay/Neuter Post-Op Follow-Up Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks which spay/neuter patients are due for their post-op recheck (incision check, suture removal) and haven't had one logged. Use this if a pet has ever developed an incision complication that would have been caught at a recheck nobody scheduled or confirmed happened.

jobs.name: Speaker Confirmation Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks the speaker/presenter list against each person's confirm-by date and flags anyone who hasn't confirmed yet. Use this if an event has ever gotten close with a session slot still unconfirmed and nobody noticed until the program had to go to print.

jobs.name: Special Education Initial Evaluation Timeline Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks students referred for an initial special education evaluation against the legally required evaluation-completion deadline and flags any approaching or past it. Use this if an initial evaluation has ever slipped past its statutory timeline (commonly 60 days from parental consent) because it wasn't tracked separately from the annual IEP review calendar.

jobs.name: Veterinary Specialist Referral Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Checks outbound referrals to veterinary specialists (cardiology, oncology, orthopedic surgery, etc.) that haven't been scheduled or completed within a set window and flags them for follow-up. Use this if a pet has ever been referred out for a serious condition and the primary clinic never confirmed the owner actually followed through and got the specialist appointment.

jobs.name: Spectrum License Renewal Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks your FCC (or other regulator) spectrum license expiration dates and warns when a license is coming up for renewal. Use this if a license has ever lapsed, or nearly lapsed, because the renewal filing window closed while nobody was watching the calendar.

jobs.name: Podcast Sponsor Ad-Read Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks the sponsor read that actually aired in a published episode's transcript against the contracted word count and required disclosure phrase. Use this if a sponsor has ever come back after an episode went live saying the read was too short or missing the "paid partnership" disclosure they contracted for.

jobs.name: Sponsor Deliverable Fulfillment Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews what each event sponsor was promised (logo placement, booth space, stage mentions, attendee list, social posts) against what's actually been delivered, and flags gaps before the sponsor notices. Use this if a sponsor has ever emailed asking where their logo was, and you didn't have a good answer.

jobs.name: Podcast Sponsor Deliverable Tracker
jobs.description: Flags sponsor deliverables (read, mention, social post) coming due. Use this if you've ever had a sponsor follow up asking where their promised mention was.

jobs.name: Podcast Sponsor Category Exclusivity Conflict Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming sponsor bookings for two sponsors in the same product category airing too close together. Use this if you've ever signed a mattress company for one episode and a competing mattress company for the next, breaking an exclusivity clause neither sponsor should have had to discover on their own.

jobs.name: Sponsorship Deliverable Tracker
jobs.description: Flags brand-deal deliverables (a video, post, story, or link placement) coming due across whatever platforms you post on. Use this if a sponsor has ever had to ask where their promised content was because the deadline only lived in an email thread from weeks ago.

jobs.name: Spot Rate Opportunity Watch
jobs.description: Checks the current spot market rate for a lane against your contracted rate and flags it when spot is cheap enough to be worth booking outside the contract. Use this if you've ever kept paying a stale contracted rate on a lane while the spot market quietly dropped well below it.

jobs.name: Spray Application Window Check
jobs.description: Checks wind speed and rain-free window in the forecast to tell you whether conditions are safe for pesticide, herbicide, or fertilizer spraying today. Use this if you've ever sprayed on a day that turned out too windy and dealt with drift complaints or wasted product.

jobs.name: Spring Startup Contract Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Checks your client contract list for seasonal spring startup service (irrigation turn-on, first mow, bed cleanup) whose renewal date is approaching and flags the ones that haven't been confirmed yet. Use this if a client has ever assumed they were renewed and you found out in April they'd switched to a competitor.

jobs.name: Sprinkler System Season Turn-On/Winterize Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you when it's almost time to turn on your irrigation system for the season or winterize/blow it out before the first freeze. Use this if you've ever cracked a sprinkler line because you forgot to blow it out before winter, or started the season late on a dead lawn.

jobs.name: SSL Certificate Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks how many days are left before a website's SSL certificate expires. Use this if you run a site and want a warning before the padlock breaks and visitors start seeing browser security errors.

jobs.name: Stablecoin Peg Deviation Watch
jobs.description: Checks a stablecoin's market price against its $1 peg and alerts when it drifts beyond your threshold. Use this if you've ever held a "stable" balance through a depeg event because nothing was watching the price.

jobs.name: Staff Annual Training Hours Tracking Check
jobs.description: Checks each staff member's completed continuing-education hours for the year against your licensing body's required annual minimum and warns before their renewal deadline if they're short. Use this if a staff member has ever discovered close to license renewal that they hadn't logged enough required training hours for the year — distinct from staff-certification-expiry-check, which tracks specific certifications like CPR expiring, not an ongoing annual hours requirement.

jobs.name: Staff Background Check Recertification Check
jobs.description: Checks each staff member's background check / fingerprint clearance against your licensing body's required recertification interval and warns before it lapses. Use this if a staff member's clearance has ever quietly expired while they kept working, because the CPR/first-aid certification tracker doesn't cover it — this is a separate, longer-cycle clearance, not a skills certification.

jobs.name: Staff CPR/First-Aid Certification Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks direct-care staff CPR and first-aid certifications for ones expiring soon and flags the staff members who would fall out of compliance. Use this if you want to catch a lapsed CPR or first-aid card before a shift is staffed by someone who isn't currently certified.

jobs.name: Childcare Staff Certification Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks staff CPR/first-aid and other required childcare certifications and warns before any expire. Use this if a licensing inspection has ever been the first place a lapsed certification got noticed, instead of catching it with time to renew.

jobs.name: Staff-to-Child Ratio Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks each classroom/group's staff-to-child ratio for the day against your licensing requirement and flags anything out of compliance. Use this if a ratio has ever slipped out of compliance mid-shift because someone called in sick and nobody recalculated the numbers.

jobs.name: Staff CME Credit Tracking
jobs.description: Checks each clinician's continuing medical education (CME) credit hours completed against what's required by their cycle end date and warns before anyone falls short. Use this if a provider has ever discovered close to renewal that they were short on CME hours needed to keep their license active — distinct from license-credential-expiry-check, which tracks the license's own expiry date rather than the ongoing education requirement to renew it.

jobs.name: Staff Performance Review Due Date Check
jobs.description: Checks each staff member's last performance review date against your center's review cycle and flags anyone due or overdue. Use this if a staff review has ever slipped a year or more because nobody was tracking review dates outside of whenever a director happened to remember — distinct from staff-annual-training-hours-tracking-check, which tracks licensing-required continuing-education hours rather than an internal HR performance review.

jobs.name: Staff Pet First-Aid Certification Expiry Check
jobs.description: Scans your staff roster for pet first-aid certifications that have expired or are expiring soon. Use this if you've ever discovered during a scheduling crunch that the only certified staff member on shift had let their certification lapse.

jobs.name: Staff Shift Coverage Gap Check
jobs.description: Compares the published shift schedule against the minimum staffing level required per shift (front desk, trainers on the floor, class instructors) and flags any shift left under-covered. Use this if the front desk has ever been left unstaffed during open hours because a shift-swap request fell through and nobody caught the resulting gap.

jobs.name: Staff Shift Schedule Coverage Check
jobs.description: Checks the published staff schedule for the coming days against each shift's required staff count (based on your ratio requirement for that classroom) and flags any shift left under-covered. Use this if a shift has ever gone understaffed because a call-out or an unfilled opening was never checked against the roster ahead of time — distinct from staff-child-ratio-compliance-check, which checks today's actual headcount in real time, and enrollment-capacity-ratio-forecast-check, which projects weeks-ahead enrollment growth rather than checking the already-published shift roster.

jobs.name: Staff-to-Resident Ratio Compliance Check
jobs.description: Compares the number of staff scheduled for each shift against the resident census for that unit and flags any shift falling below the regulatory-minimum staff-to-resident ratio. Use this if you want to catch understaffed shifts before they happen instead of finding out after a bad shift already occurred.

jobs.name: Staffing Agency License and Bond Renewal Check
jobs.description: Tracks state staffing-agency licenses and surety bonds the agency holds in each operating state and flags any approaching their renewal deadline. Use this if the agency has ever operated in a state past its license renewal date without anyone realizing it had lapsed.

jobs.name: Staging vs Production Config Diff
jobs.description: Diffs environment variable keys between staging and production and flags mismatches. Use this if staging and prod have ever quietly drifted apart until a deploy broke only in one of them.

jobs.name: Staking Reward Claim Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to check and claim accumulated staking rewards for a tracked position on a set cadence, and flags if unclaimed rewards have built up past a threshold. Use this if you've ever left staking rewards sitting unclaimed for months because there was no prompt to go check.

jobs.name: Stale Deal Nudge
jobs.description: Finds open pipeline deals nobody's touched in a while. Use this if deals have ever quietly died in "in progress" because follow-up only happens when someone remembers.

jobs.name: Stale Dependency PR Nudge
jobs.description: Lists open dependency-bump pull requests (from Dependabot/Renovate) that have been sitting for a while. Use this if automated PRs pile up and quietly go stale instead of getting merged or closed.

jobs.name: Stale Inventory Reservation Release Check
jobs.description: Flags inventory reservations still holding stock against an order that's already cancelled or expired, which quietly locks that stock away from everyone else. Use this if a customer has ever been told an item is out of stock when it was really just sitting reserved against an order that fell through weeks ago and never got released.

jobs.name: Stale Post Audit
jobs.description: Flags published posts that haven't been touched in a long time, as candidates for a refresh. Use this if old content quietly rots (dead screenshots, outdated advice) while still ranking and getting traffic.

jobs.name: Stale Todo Sweep
jobs.description: Finds TODO/FIXME comments in your codebase that have sat untouched for a long time, so you can decide whether to fix, ticket, or delete them. Use this if TODO comments in this repo have basically become permanent decor.

jobs.name: Standardized Test Proctor Certification Tracker
jobs.description: Checks which staff assigned to proctor an upcoming standardized test still need to complete required test-security/proctor training or certification, and flags them before test day. Use this if a test has ever had to be rescheduled or invalidated because a proctor in the room wasn't actually certified to administer it.

jobs.name: Standardized Test Registration Deadline Check
jobs.description: Warns before the registration cutoff for a standardized test (state assessment, AP, SAT, etc.). Use this if a student has ever missed the window to register for a test because the deadline landed during a busy stretch of the term and nobody flagged it in advance.

jobs.name: State Compliance Poster/Notice Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks your per-location labor-law poster and notice inventory for postings that haven't been reviewed in a while, so a new state or federal notice release doesn't sit unposted at a work site or remote-hub mailing address. Use this if a required break-room poster or state notice has ever gone stale for months because nobody was tracking posting/update dates location by location.

jobs.name: State Survey Readiness Checklist Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews a facility's self-audit checklist across the areas state surveyors typically inspect (posted staffing, life-safety, kitchen sanitation, medication storage, resident rights postings, and similar) and summarizes which items are unresolved and how urgent each one is. Use this if you want a standing rehearsal for an unannounced state survey instead of a scramble the week you hear one might be coming.

jobs.name: Sterile Compounding Environmental Monitoring Check
jobs.description: Reviews the cleanroom's USP 797 environmental monitoring log (viable air sampling, surface sampling, pressure differentials) for missed sampling dates or results over the action level. Use this if an out-of-range air or surface sample has ever sat in the log for days before anyone connected it to a compounding hold, or a scheduled sampling date has ever been skipped during a busy week.

jobs.name: Storage Capacity Warning Check
jobs.description: Checks available storage capacity across the studio's local drives and mounted NAS volumes against a warning threshold. Use this if you've ever had a shoot import fail mid-busy-season because nobody noticed the drive was almost full.

jobs.name: Storage-in-Transit Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks customer shipments held in storage-in-transit against their contracted free-storage window and flags any approaching or past expiry, since that's when extra storage billing kicks in. Use this if a customer's belongings have ever sat in storage-in-transit past their free window without anyone billing for it or telling the customer.

jobs.name: Store Associate Commission Calculation Error Check
jobs.description: Compares calculated sales-associate commission payouts against the underlying sales transactions they're supposed to be based on, and flags any associate whose payout doesn't match what the commission rate and sales total say it should be. Use this if you pay commission on sales and want to catch calculation errors before payroll runs instead of after associates notice a short (or suspiciously large) check.

jobs.name: Store Climate Control Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks the temperature and humidity readings logged by in-store sensors against the safe ranges required for climate-sensitive merchandise like cosmetics, chocolate, or supplements. Use this if your store carries goods that spoil, melt, or degrade outside a specific temperature/humidity band and you want to catch an HVAC problem before it ruins inventory.

jobs.name: Store Closing Checklist Compliance Check
