jobs.description: Reviews logged closing checklist completions and flags stores or shifts that skipped required steps, rather than just reminding staff of the checklist. Use this if a store has ever opened the next morning to a safe left unlocked, alarm not set, or cash not dropped because closing execution was never actually checked afterward.

jobs.name: Store Opening Checklist Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds the opening shift of the standard opening checklist every day, not just when a manager happens to be on site to run it from memory. Use this if the store has ever opened late, or opened with something missed (lights, POS not booted, signage not out), because the checklist lived only in one person's head.

jobs.name: Store Listing Review Score Watch
jobs.description: Checks your game's rating trend on the app/game store it's listed on and flags a sudden drop, which is often the first public sign of a broken patch. Use this if your store rating has ever slid a full star before anyone on the team saw the reviews causing it.

jobs.name: Storefront SSL & Domain Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks your storefront's SSL certificate and domain registration expiry dates and flags anything expiring soon. Use this if your store has ever gone down — or thrown a scary browser security warning at checkout — because an SSL cert or domain renewal quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Storm-Damage Cleanup Response-Time Check
jobs.description: Checks open storm-damage cleanup requests (downed limbs, fence damage, flooded beds) against your response-time target and flags any that are still unresolved past that window. Use this if a storm-damage request has ever sat open for a week while the client called around asking why nobody had come out yet.

jobs.name: Stormwater (MS4) Permit Report Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Checks the required reports and permit conditions under your municipality's stormwater discharge (MS4/NPDES) permit against their due dates and flags anything coming up. Use this if a required stormwater annual report or minimum-control-measure milestone has ever nearly been missed because it lived in one engineer's calendar instead of a shared tracker.

jobs.name: Stream Schedule Prep Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you before a scheduled stream and checks that your streaming software/overlays are up to date. Use this if you've ever gone live late because you were still fighting an OBS update mid-countdown.

jobs.name: Study Group Session Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you the day before your recurring study group meets and can help you draft a quick recap of what to bring or review. Use this if you're in a study group for a cert, language, or course and have ever shown up (or forgotten to show up) without having looked at the material since last time.

jobs.name: Subcontractor Insurance (COI) Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks tracked subcontractor certificates of insurance and warns before any expire. Use this if a sub has ever kept working on site after their COI lapsed, leaving the general contractor exposed if something went wrong.

jobs.name: Subcontractor NDA Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks NDAs and vendor agreements for freelancers and subcontractors currently staffed on client work, and flags anyone whose agreement is expiring soon or missing entirely. Use this if your agency leans on freelancers or subcontractors for client projects and you've ever discovered after the fact that someone was doing billable client work without a signed NDA on file.

jobs.name: Subcontractor Pay Application Approval Tracker
jobs.description: Flags subcontractor pay applications (AIA G702/G703-style draw requests) that are still waiting on GC or owner approval past the normal turnaround, separate from the retainage that eventually gets held back on approved amounts. Use this if a sub has ever gone weeks without payment because their draw request just sat unreviewed in someone's queue.

jobs.name: Submittal / Shop Drawing Review Check
jobs.description: Reviews the submittal log for shop drawings, product data, and samples sitting past their review due date, and spot-checks whether returned reviews actually addressed the spec section they were submitted against. Use this if a submittal has ever come back "approved" from a quick rubber stamp that missed a spec conflict, only to surface as a costly field problem later.

jobs.name: Subpoena Response Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Checks received subpoenas and other third-party legal document requests against their response deadline, and flags ones approaching that deadline. Use this if you want a safety net for incoming subpoenas specifically, separate from active-litigation court dates already covered elsewhere.

jobs.name: Subrogation Recovery Tracker
jobs.description: Checks open subrogation files against at-fault third parties and flags ones with no recovery activity in a while, so pursuit doesn't quietly stall until the statute of limitations closes the door. Use this if a recoverable claim has ever gone unpursued long enough to lose the chance at reimbursement entirely.

jobs.name: Subscriber Churn Spike Check
jobs.description: Compares this period's newsletter or magazine unsubscribe count against the trailing average and flags it if it's spiked well above normal. Use this if churn has ever quietly crept up after a content or pricing change and nobody noticed until subscriber counts had already dropped a lot.

jobs.name: Subscriber/Follower Churn Watch
jobs.description: Checks your channel's subscriber or follower count trend and flags a meaningful drop so you can investigate before it becomes a pattern. Use this if you've ever noticed a slow bleed of subscribers only after checking your dashboard months later.

jobs.name: Podcast Subscriber Milestone Pace Check
jobs.description: Compares your current subscriber/follower count against the pace needed to hit a milestone goal by its target date and flags if you're falling behind. Use this if you've ever set a "10k subscribers by year end" goal and only checked in on it after it was already out of reach.

jobs.name: Subscription Audit
jobs.description: Flags recurring subscriptions you haven't actually used in a while. Use this if you suspect you're paying for things you forgot to cancel.

jobs.name: Subscription Pause/Skip Churn Risk Check
jobs.description: Reviews active, currently-paying subscribers for a pattern of repeated cycle skips or pauses and drafts retention outreach for the highest-risk ones. Use this if a subscriber has ever cancelled outright after quietly skipping three cycles in a row, with nobody on your side noticing the pattern until the cancellation email arrived.

jobs.name: Subscription Price Hike Watch
jobs.description: Checks a tracked subscription's current price against the last price you recorded and flags any increase. Use this if a service has ever quietly raised its price and you only noticed months later scrolling through a bank statement.

jobs.name: Substitute Teacher Fill Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Compares substitute requests against how many were actually filled and flags days or schools with a low fill rate. Use this if classes have ever gone uncovered because nobody was tracking whether sub requests were actually getting filled.

jobs.name: Succession Planning Gap Check
jobs.description: Checks a list of critical roles against your succession-planning tracker and flags roles with no named ready-now or ready-soon successor. Use this if a critical leader has ever left, or nearly left, and only then did anyone realize there was no succession plan on file for that role.

jobs.name: Sudo Usage Audit
jobs.description: Reports new sudo commands run since the last check. Use this if you want to notice unexpected privilege escalation on a shared or internet-facing server.

jobs.name: Sump Pump Test Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to test your sump pump by pouring water into the pit based on how long it's been since the last test. Use this if you've ever found out your sump pump had seized up only after a storm flooded the basement.

jobs.name: Supplier Compliance Chargeback Tracker
jobs.description: Checks chargebacks issued to suppliers for compliance violations, such as late shipments, mislabeling, or bad packaging, and flags the ones still waiting on a dispute or resolution past a set number of days. Use this if chargebacks tend to sit open indefinitely and you want a nudge before a supplier relationship or your own books are affected by an unresolved claim.

jobs.name: Supplier Cost Increase Impact Check
jobs.description: Compares the unit cost on each new purchase order against the SKU's previous cost and flags increases past a threshold, so a margin hit gets noticed before hundreds of units are already reordered at the higher price. Use this if a supplier has ever raised prices quietly and it only got noticed when someone reviewed margins weeks later.

jobs.name: Supplier Lead Time Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares each supplier's recent delivery lead time against their historical baseline and flags suppliers who have started shipping noticeably slower. Use this if a reorder point has ever gone stale because a supplier quietly started taking longer to deliver than they used to.

jobs.name: Supplier On-Time Delivery Performance Watch
jobs.description: Tracks a supplier's on-time delivery rate over recent orders and flags it when performance drops below target. Use this if a supplier's reliability has ever quietly slipped for months before it showed up as a production delay bad enough to notice.

jobs.name: Supplier Price Increase Watch
jobs.description: Compares this week's supplier invoice prices against your reference cost sheet and flags ingredients that jumped more than a set percentage. Use this if a supplier has ever quietly raised prices for months before anyone noticed the food cost creeping up.

jobs.name: Supplier Quality PPM Watch
jobs.description: Calculates each supplier's defect rate in parts-per-million from incoming inspection records and flags anyone above target. Use this if a supplier's defective parts have ever slipped through in small enough numbers each month that no one noticed the trend until a batch got bad enough to stop the line.

jobs.name: Supply Low-Stock Reorder Check
jobs.description: Checks cleaning supply inventory (chemicals, paper products, equipment consumables) against each item's reorder threshold and lists what needs to be reordered. Use this if a crew has ever shown up to a job without enough glass cleaner or trash bags because nobody noticed the stockroom was running low.

jobs.name: Support Headcount vs. Volume Ratio Check
jobs.description: Checks whether the ratio of active support agents to incoming ticket volume has drifted away from your target, as a structural staffing signal rather than a day-to-day workload one. Use this if ticket volume has ever grown for months before anyone connected it back to "we should have hired an agent two quarters ago."

jobs.name: Surgery Prep Check
jobs.description: Checks tomorrow's scheduled surgeries for missing pre-op bloodwork or signed consent forms. Use this if a surgery has ever had to be rescheduled the morning of because consent wasn't signed or bloodwork hadn't been run, and nobody checked the night before.

jobs.name: Surgical Schedule/OR Utilization Check
jobs.description: Calculates how much of tomorrow's surgical suite time is booked versus open, so scheduling can fill gaps or flag overbooking. Use this if the OR has ever sat half-empty on a weekday because nobody was watching utilization, or double-booked because two procedures landed in the same block — distinct from surgery-prep-check.yaml, which checks individual case readiness (bloodwork/consent) rather than schedule utilization.

jobs.name: Table Turnover Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Analyzes seating and table-clear timestamps to calculate average table turnover time by section, day, and shift, and flags where tables are sitting occupied well past the typical dining window. Use this if you suspect one section or server is quietly slowing down the whole dining room's throughput on busy nights.

jobs.name: Talent Model Release Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks signed model/talent releases that are time-limited (e.g. scoped to a fixed term for commercial or stock use) against their renewal or expiry date and flags any coming up within a notice window. Use this if you've ever kept using a photo or clip commercially past the date its model release actually authorized, putting you or a client at legal risk.

jobs.name: Task Overdue Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks your task/todo tracker for tasks past their due date and buckets them by how many days overdue they are. Use this if overdue tasks tend to pile up unnoticed until a stakeholder asks why something still isn't done.

jobs.name: Tax Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you ahead of upcoming tax deadlines you've listed. Use this if quarterly estimated payments or annual filing dates have ever snuck up on you.

jobs.name: Tax-Loss Harvesting Review
jobs.description: Checks your holdings for unrealized losses worth considering for tax-loss harvesting before year-end. Use this if you've ever realized in December that a position had been sitting at a loss all year and you never did anything about it for tax purposes.

jobs.name: Teacher Certification Expiry Tracker
jobs.description: Checks teaching certifications and endorsements against their renewal dates and flags anything expiring soon. Use this if a teacher has ever had their state license lapse mid-year because the renewal deadline wasn't on anyone's radar until an audit or licensing-board notice.

jobs.name: Teacher Professional Development Hours Compliance Tracker
jobs.description: Checks each teacher's logged professional development hours against the minimum required for the current cycle and flags anyone on pace to fall short before the deadline. Use this if a teacher has ever discovered close to the deadline that they hadn't logged enough PD hours for the year, separate from their state teaching license actually expiring.

jobs.name: Team Anniversary Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you about teammates' birthdays and work anniversaries coming up this week. Use this if you've ever felt bad realizing a work anniversary passed with zero acknowledgment.

jobs.name: Team Decision Log Follow-up Check
jobs.description: Checks a running log of team decisions and flags any that have no owner assigned, or that have sat open past a target window without being resolved. Use this if a decision has ever been made out loud in a meeting, wound up in nobody's notes with nobody clearly on the hook for it, and then quietly got re-litigated a month later because nobody remembered it had "already been decided."

jobs.name: Team Meeting Load Audit
jobs.description: Reviews the past week's calendar exports for your team and flags anyone whose meeting hours crossed a threshold, so heavy meeting weeks get noticed instead of just becoming the norm. Use this if you manage a team and suspect meetings are quietly eating half of someone's week but nobody's actually added it up.

jobs.name: Team Morale/Event Budget Pace Check
jobs.description: Compares how much of your team's discretionary morale/event/swag budget has been spent against how far through the budget period you are, and flags it if spending is running well ahead of or well behind that pace. Use this if a team fun budget has ever gone completely unused until someone scrambled to spend it in the last week of the year, or run dry by month six with nothing left for the rest of the period.

jobs.name: Team Offboarding Knowledge Transfer Tracker
jobs.description: Checks handoff tasks for a departing team member against their last day and flags anything still open as it approaches. Use this if someone has ever left the team and taken undocumented context with them — a credential nobody knew about, a process only they ran — because knowledge transfer got squeezed out by exit paperwork and a farewell lunch.

jobs.name: Team Offsite Planning Checklist
jobs.description: Checks a running offsite-planning checklist and flags any task (venue, catering, budget approval, agenda) that's still open as the event date closes in. Use this if an offsite has ever come together in a scramble because nobody was tracking which logistics were still unresolved until a week out.

jobs.name: Team OKR Check-in Reminder
jobs.description: Checks your team's OKRs for key results that haven't had a progress update in a while and reminds you to check in before the quarter ends. Use this if OKRs have ever gone untouched for six weeks and then gotten a rushed "80% confident" update the day before the quarterly review.

jobs.name: Team Recognition Gap Check
jobs.description: Scans a team recognition/kudos log and flags anyone who hasn't received public recognition in a while. Use this if praise on your team tends to cluster on the same few loud wins while quieter, steady contributors go months without ever being acknowledged.

jobs.name: Team Retro Follow-up Tracker
jobs.description: Checks action items from past team retros and flags the ones still marked open past their target date. Use this if your retros have ever produced a great list of action items that nobody looked at again until the next retro.

jobs.name: Team Doc & Runbook Staleness Check
jobs.description: Checks your team's process docs and runbooks (onboarding guide, on-call runbook, escalation policy) against their last-reviewed date and flags anything overdue for a refresh. Use this if a runbook has ever sent someone down a dead process during an incident because it hadn't been touched since a reorg two years ago.

jobs.name: Team Skills Directory Staleness Check
jobs.description: Checks your team's skills/expertise directory against each entry's last-confirmed date and flags anything overdue for a recheck. Use this if you've ever pinged someone as "the expert on X" only to learn they moved teams, forgot that tool, or never actually owned it, because the directory nobody kept up to date.

jobs.name: Recurring Team Survey Nudge
jobs.description: Checks who on the team hasn't responded to the current engagement or pulse survey and sends a nudge before it closes. Use this if a team survey has ever closed with a 40% response rate because nobody chased the stragglers until it was too late to fix it.

jobs.name: Tech ETA No-Show Check
jobs.description: Checks today's dispatch log for jobs where the technician's promised arrival window has passed with no check-in logged. Use this if a customer has ever called asking where the tech is before dispatch even noticed the appointment was running late.

jobs.name: Tech License & Certification Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks technician licenses and certifications (EPA 608, journeyman electrician, plumbing license) against their expiration date and flags any expiring soon. Use this if a tech has ever been pulled off a job, or a permit rejected, because their certification quietly lapsed without anyone tracking the renewal date.

jobs.name: Technician Daily Route Optimization Check
jobs.description: Flags technicians whose route log shows a lot of backtracking — a high average number of miles driven between consecutive stops — which usually means the day's jobs got scheduled in the order they were booked rather than by geography. Use this if techs have ever burned an extra hour driving across town and back because two nearby jobs got split across the morning and afternoon.

jobs.name: Technician Overtime Hours Check
jobs.description: Totals each technician's logged hours for the week and flags anyone over your overtime threshold, so payroll surprises and burnout don't sneak up on you. Use this if a labor budget has ever blown past plan because overtime only got noticed when the payroll run came back higher than expected.

jobs.name: Telehealth Session No-Show/Tech-Failure Check
jobs.description: Reviews recent telehealth appointments for no-shows and technical-failure disconnects, and flags patients hitting either problem repeatedly. Use this if a telehealth visit has ever quietly failed to happen — patient never joined, or the call dropped and was never rebooked — with nobody tracking it the way an in-person no-show would normally get tracked.

jobs.name: Telematics Device Connectivity Check
jobs.description: Checks when each vehicle's telematics/GPS device last reported in and flags any that have gone silent longer than expected. Use this if a vehicle has ever quietly stopped sending location or engine data for days — unplugged device, dead device battery, blown fuse — before anyone noticed the data just stopped.

jobs.name: Temp-to-Perm Conversion Fee Tracking Reminder
jobs.description: Reviews recently converted temp-to-perm placements and confirms the conversion fee owed by the client has been invoiced, factoring in any fee reduction that applies as the worker's temp tenure lengthens. Use this if a client has ever hired a temp worker permanently and the conversion fee slipped through without being billed.

jobs.name: Temp Worker Onboarding Paperwork Completeness Check
jobs.description: Checks newly placed temp workers against a required-document checklist (I-9, W-4, direct deposit, client-specific forms) and flags anyone starting an assignment with paperwork still missing. Use this if a worker has ever shown up on their first day at a client site with onboarding paperwork incomplete.

jobs.name: Tenant Application Review Backlog Check
jobs.description: Flags rental applications that have been sitting in review too long without a decision. Use this if a good applicant has ever gone with a different landlord because your screening process sat on their application for a week before anyone looked at it.

jobs.name: Tenant Lease Agreement Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Looks through fixed-term storage unit rental agreements and lists the ones due to renew or expire within the next several days, so staff can reach out before a tenant's contract lapses. Use this if your facility uses fixed-term lease agreements (not simple month-to-month rentals) and has ever had a tenant's agreement quietly expire without anyone following up.

jobs.name: Tenant Renters Insurance Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks tenants required by their lease to carry renters insurance against their certificate's expiration date and flags anyone lapsed or about to lapse. Use this if a tenant's coverage has ever quietly expired mid-lease, leaving the landlord exposed on a liability claim the lease was supposed to cover.

jobs.name: Terraform Drift Check
jobs.description: Runs a Terraform plan and flags it if there's drift between your state and actual infrastructure. Use this if you've ever had someone click around in a cloud console and quietly break parity with your IaC.

jobs.name: Territory Coverage Gap Check
jobs.description: Flags target accounts that have no assigned rep, or have an assigned rep but no logged activity in a long time. Use this if an account has ever gone completely unworked for months simply because it fell between territory reassignments and nobody noticed the gap.

jobs.name: Textbook Inventory Shortage Check
jobs.description: Compares textbook/material stock counts against enrolled class sizes and flags courses that are short. Use this if a class has ever started the term with more students than available textbooks because nobody checked inventory against the roster ahead of time.

jobs.name: Therapist/Stylist Utilization Rate Check
jobs.description: Calculates each staff member's booked-vs-available hours for the past week and flags anyone below a utilization threshold. Use this if you've ever noticed one therapist standing around all afternoon while another is double-booked, and wanted a number instead of a gut feeling.

jobs.name: Thin Content Word Count Check
jobs.description: Crawls published pages and counts body-text words, flagging any page below a minimum word-count threshold as likely "thin content" that may not fully answer a searcher's question. Use this if you publish a mix of long and short pages and want an early warning before search engines deprioritize the short ones for looking under-developed.

jobs.name: Thumbnail A/B Test Performance Check
jobs.description: Compares click-through rate between thumbnail variants on a video and flags a clear winner (or a test that's still too close to call). Use this if you've ever run a thumbnail test and forgotten to check back until the platform already auto-picked one for you.

jobs.name: Support Ticket Backlog Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks how many open support tickets have sat unanswered past your SLA window. Use this if tickets have ever quietly aged past their SLA because the backlog view wasn't checked that day.

jobs.name: Ticket Refund/Cancellation Deadline Enforcement Check
jobs.description: Reviews pending refund or cancellation requests and flags any that have passed your stated refund window, so policy gets applied consistently instead of case-by-case under pressure. Use this if you've ever approved a late refund because it was easier than checking the date, then had to explain why someone else's later request got denied.

jobs.name: Ticket Reopened Rate Watch
jobs.description: Checks what percentage of closed tickets get reopened and flags it when the rate climbs — a quality signal that's different from SLA or backlog size. Use this if tickets have ever been closed to hit a metric and quietly bounced right back, without anyone tracking the reopen rate itself.

jobs.name: Event Ticket Sales Pace Check
jobs.description: Compares tickets sold so far against a target sales curve for how close the event is, and flags it if sales are running behind pace. Use this if a ticketed event has ever ended up under-sold because nobody noticed sales were lagging until it was too late to push a promotion.

jobs.name: Ticket Tag Hygiene Check
jobs.description: Checks what percentage of recently closed tickets are missing a category/topic tag and flags it when too many go untagged. Use this if your "top ticket reasons" report has ever been useless because half the tickets closed that month were never categorized in the first place.

jobs.name: Timekeeper Billable Hours Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks attorneys and paralegals against their weekly timesheet submission and minimum billable-hour targets, and flags anyone missing or short. Use this if unbilled time has ever quietly leaked out of a matter because a timekeeper fell behind on entering hours and nobody caught it before the billing cycle closed.

jobs.name: Timesheet Submission Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks which staff have not submitted their timesheet for the prior billing period and lists them out. Use this if your agency bills client work off logged hours and a missing timesheet has ever meant revenue that quietly never got invoiced.

jobs.name: Timezone Meeting Conflict Check
jobs.description: Checks tomorrow's meetings against a remote teammate's working hours and flags any that fall outside them. Use this if a meeting has ever gotten scheduled at 11pm for someone across the world without anyone realizing.

jobs.name: Tire Wear & Replacement Check
jobs.description: Checks tread depth readings against a safe minimum and flags tires approaching replacement. Use this if a fleet vehicle has ever failed a roadside inspection, or blown a tire on the road, because tread wear was only checked at annual service instead of tracked between visits.

jobs.name: Title I Compliance Documentation Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews the required Title I documentation (schoolwide plan updates, parent involvement policy, annual parent notification letters, right-to- know teacher-qualification notices) and flags anything missing or past its required date. Use this if a Title I document has ever gone missing or late until a program monitoring visit or audit surfaced the gap.

jobs.name: Title Metadata Completeness Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming titles for missing catalog metadata — subtitle, BISAC category code, page count, or cover image file — that retailers and distributors require before a title can be listed for sale. Use this if a title has ever gone up for preorder with a missing cover file or blank BISAC code, which can get a listing rejected or buried by a retailer.

jobs.name: TLS Certificate Chain Validation Check
jobs.description: Checks that a TLS endpoint serves a complete, trusted certificate chain from leaf to a trusted root, catching problems like a missing intermediate certificate that expiration-only checks won't see. Use this if a service has ever worked fine in one browser or client but failed TLS validation in another because the server wasn't sending the full chain.

jobs.name: Weak TLS Cipher/Protocol Check
jobs.description: Checks a host for weak TLS protocol versions or ciphers still enabled. Use this if a legacy protocol has ever stayed enabled for "just in case" long after every client that needed it was gone.

jobs.name: Token Approval Allowance Audit
jobs.description: Checks a wallet's active ERC-20 token spending approvals for unlimited or unusually broad allowances granted to contracts, especially ones you no longer use. Use this if you've ever approved a dapp for "unlimited" spending to save a click and forgotten to revoke it once you stopped using the dapp.

jobs.name: Token Unlock/Vesting Watch
jobs.description: Checks for upcoming token unlock or vesting cliff dates for a project you're tracking and warns before a large unlock hits. Use this if a token has ever dropped sharply right after an unlock you didn't see coming.

jobs.name: Toll & Parking Violation Tracker
jobs.description: Flags unpaid tolls and parking citations against fleet vehicles before they escalate into late fees, registration holds, or collections. Use this if a parking ticket has ever turned into a much bigger bill because it sat unnoticed until a renewal got blocked.

jobs.name: Tooling and Die Wear Check
jobs.description: Tracks cycle counts against a tool or die's rated life and flags it when it's approaching end-of-life. Use this if a worn die has ever kept running past its rated cycle count until it started producing bad parts nobody traced back to the tooling.

jobs.name: Podcast Topic Cannibalization Check
jobs.description: Reviews your upcoming episode lineup for two episodes covering nearly the same topic too close together. Use this if you've ever published an episode only to realize it covers almost the same ground as one from a few weeks earlier, splitting listener interest and search relevance between them instead of building on it.

jobs.name: Tournament Registration Deadline Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a tournament's registration window closes. Use this if you've ever missed signing up for a tournament because the deadline passed while you were heads-down practicing instead of checking dates.

jobs.name: Tower/Site Lease Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Checks tower and equipment site lease agreements for upcoming renewal or termination-notice deadlines and warns with enough lead time to act. Use this if a site lease has ever auto-renewed at a bad rate, or a landlord notice window closed unnoticed, because nobody was tracking lease dates across dozens of sites.

jobs.name: Trade-In Appraisal Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares trade-in vehicles' initial appraised value against their actual wholesale/auction sale price once sold, and flags appraisers or vehicle categories with a consistent gap. Use this if trade-in appraisals have ever quietly run high (or low) for months before anyone lined them up against what the cars actually brought at auction.

jobs.name: Trademark Infringement Watch
jobs.description: Searches for new trademark applications, domain registrations, and marketplace listings that look like they could infringe on your registered marks, and summarizes anything worth a closer look. Use this if you've ever found out about a confusingly similar competitor mark or copycat domain months after it started causing customer confusion, instead of when it first appeared.

jobs.name: Trademark Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a trademark registration's renewal deadline. Use this if you've ever let a trademark lapse simply because the renewal date wasn't on anyone's calendar.

jobs.name: Trainer Certification Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks trainer and instructor certifications (personal training cert, CPR/AED, group fitness credentials) against their expiry dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if a trainer has ever kept training clients on an expired certification because nobody was tracking renewal dates across the whole staff roster.

jobs.name: Trainer Session Package Expiry Check
jobs.description: Flags members with a paid personal-training session package that's expiring soon with sessions still unused. Use this if a client has ever paid for ten sessions, used three, and let the rest expire because nobody nudged them to book before the window closed.

jobs.name: Transcript Publish Lag Check
jobs.description: Flags episodes that published without a transcript still missing after a grace period. Use this if you've ever promised accessible, searchable transcripts but had episodes quietly sit for weeks without one.

jobs.name: Transformer Load Threshold Alert
jobs.description: Checks recent load readings on distribution transformers against each unit's nameplate capacity and flags any running hot enough that peak summer or winter demand could push them into overload. Use this if you'd rather schedule a transformer upgrade or load-shift in advance than find out about an overload from a burned-out unit and an outage call.

jobs.name: Transit Cost-per-Mbps Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares each upstream transit provider's current effective cost per Mbps against a target ceiling and flags providers drifting above market rate. Use this if you've ever kept paying above-market transit rates for months because nobody recalculated cost-per-Mbps after the last capacity upgrade or committed-rate change.

jobs.name: Trash & Recycling Pickup Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you the evening before your scheduled trash or recycling pickup day so the bins actually make it to the curb. Use this if you've ever missed a pickup because the day snuck up on you and the bins sat full for another week.

jobs.name: Travel Fee Quote Follow-Up
jobs.description: Flags destination/travel shoot quotes that include a travel fee estimate and haven't converted into a booking within a set number of days, and drafts a follow-up message. Use this if a destination wedding or travel shoot quote has ever gone quiet after the client saw the travel fee line item, with nobody circling back to address it.

jobs.name: Travel Insurance Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you if you have an upcoming trip with no travel insurance policy covering it, or a policy expiring before the trip ends. Use this if you've ever booked a trip and only thought about insurance the night before.

jobs.name: Treatment Room / Table Double-Booking Check
jobs.description: Scans your room schedule for two bookings assigned to the same room or table with overlapping times. Use this if a client has ever arrived for a facial only to find someone already on the table because two bookings landed on the same room by mistake.

jobs.name: Tree-Trimming Utility-Line Clearance Check
jobs.description: Reviews jobs on the upcoming tree-trimming schedule that are flagged as near overhead utility lines and checks whether a utility clearance notification or permit has been filed, drafting the notification if it's missing. Use this if a crew has ever started trimming near a power line without the utility company having been notified first.

jobs.name: Trial Expiring Nudge
jobs.description: Finds trial users about to expire who haven't upgraded yet, and can draft the nudge email. Use this if trial-to-paid conversion nudges only happen when someone remembers to send them.

jobs.name: Trial-to-Paid Conversion Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Computes the trial-to-paid conversion rate for recently-ended trial cohorts and can summarize what's changed if the rate moves. Use this if trial conversion rate is a number that only gets calculated by hand once a quarter for a board deck, instead of being watched continuously.

jobs.name: Trip Budget vs. Actual Spend Check
jobs.description: Compares your logged trip spending so far against your planned budget and warns you if you're on pace to overrun it. Use this if you've ever come home from a trip and only discovered the damage when the credit card statement arrived.

jobs.name: Trip Departure Weather Check
jobs.description: Checks the weather forecast for your destination in the days leading up to departure so you can adjust packing or plans. Use this if you've ever landed somewhere freezing (or pouring rain) with a suitcase full of the wrong clothes.

jobs.name: Trip Expense Receipt Collection Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you daily during a business trip to photograph and log receipts before they get lost or thrown away. Use this if you've ever come home from a work trip and had to reconstruct a week of receipts from memory for the expense report.

jobs.name: Trip Itinerary Date Conflict Check
jobs.description: Scans a list of your trip bookings (flights, hotels, cars) for overlapping or impossible date ranges. Use this if you've ever booked a hotel for the wrong week and only noticed it overlapped a different trip after the fact.

jobs.name: Missing Truck Weight Ticket Check
jobs.description: Checks completed weight-based moves (not binding-estimate jobs) for a required tare/gross weight ticket on file and flags any that are missing one. Use this if a weight-based move has ever been billed out before the scale ticket actually made it into the file, which leaves you unable to prove the charged weight if a customer disputes the bill.

jobs.name: Trusted Traveler Program Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a trusted-traveler membership (like TSA PreCheck or Global Entry) expires. Use this if you've ever gotten stuck in the regular security line because your membership quietly lapsed months earlier.

jobs.name: Tuition Payment Late Check
jobs.description: Flags families whose tuition payment is overdue past the grace period. Use this if a late payment has ever gone unnoticed for weeks because nobody was cross-checking the payment ledger against who'd actually paid.

jobs.name: Tuition Payment Plan Delinquency Check
jobs.description: Checks tuition installment plans against their due dates and flags accounts that have missed a payment. Use this if a family has ever fallen behind on a payment plan for weeks before anyone in the office noticed and followed up.

jobs.name: Tuition Reimbursement Submission Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before your employer's tuition/education reimbursement submission deadline for a completed course. Use this if you've ever finished a course your company would reimburse and then missed the paperwork window and paid out of pocket for nothing.

jobs.name: Unassigned Ticket Check
jobs.description: Flags open tickets that have sat unassigned to any agent longer than a threshold. Use this if a ticket has ever fallen through the cracks simply because nobody claimed it, not because anyone was overloaded.

jobs.name: Unclaimed Property Escheatment Check
jobs.description: Checks stale uncashed checks and unclaimed credit balances against how long each owner's state gives you before the money must be reported and remitted to the state (escheatment), and flags items approaching that deadline. Use this if you've ever had old uncashed checks or credit balances sit around long enough to become a compliance and penalty risk.

jobs.name: Underwriting Queue SLA Monitor
jobs.description: Checks pending underwriting submissions against the target turnaround-time SLA and flags any that are approaching or past it. Use this if a broker submission has ever sat in an underwriter's queue for weeks with no decision because nobody was watching the clock.

jobs.name: AWS Unencrypted Storage Volume Check
jobs.description: Checks your AWS EBS volumes and RDS instances for ones without encryption at rest enabled and flags them. Use this if a volume or database has ever been spun up quickly without encryption because it wasn't the default at the time and nobody circled back to fix it.

jobs.name: Unfilled Order Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags open client job orders that still have zero candidates submitted, ranked by how long they've been sitting open. Use this if an order has ever gone stale because it fell to the bottom of a recruiter's queue and nobody noticed no one had been submitted yet.

jobs.name: Unit Auction Listing Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Checks units that are scheduled for a lien auction and reminds staff of the deadline to publish the legally-required public notice before the auction date. Use this if you want to make sure the notice always goes out on time, since missing that deadline can force you to reschedule (or cancel) the whole auction.

jobs.name: Unit of Measure Conversion Mismatch Check
jobs.description: Compares each SKU's purchase-to-stocking unit conversion factor (e.g. units per case) as recorded in two systems and flags any SKU where they disagree. Use this if a receiving quantity or on-hand count has ever come out wrong because one system thought a case held 24 units and the other thought it held 12, with nothing ever raising an error about it.

jobs.name: Unit Size Waitlist Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks the waitlist for people wanting a specific storage unit size and flags anyone who has been waiting longer than expected without a matching unit opening up. Use this if you keep a waitlist for popular unit sizes and want to catch people who are stuck waiting too long, so staff can follow up or offer them a different size instead of losing the customer.

jobs.name: Unit Turnover Cleaning Backlog Check
jobs.description: Looks at units that were recently vacated and flags any that haven't been cleaned and marked ready-to-rent within your target turnaround time. Use this if empty units sometimes sit unrentable longer than they should because cleaning fell through the cracks, and you want a backlog list instead of finding out from a lost sale.

jobs.name: Unpaid Invoice Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks invoices issued after completed jobs against their due date and flags any going unpaid past your collection threshold. Use this if cash has ever gotten tight because completed jobs sat uncollected for weeks with nobody following up on payment.

jobs.name: Unresolved Callback Tracker
jobs.description: Flags customer callbacks (a return visit for the same issue within the warranty window) that are still open past a set number of days. Use this if a rework job has ever slipped through the cracks and the customer had to call a second time to get it actually fixed.

jobs.name: Unsigned Encounter Note Check
jobs.description: Checks completed patient encounters for clinical notes that still haven't been signed/closed by the provider and flags anything past a reasonable turnaround. Use this if a chart has ever stayed open for weeks after the visit because a note sat unsigned in a provider's queue, which can hold up billing and leaves the record legally incomplete.

jobs.name: Unused Streaming Subscription Check
jobs.description: Compares your personal streaming and app subscriptions against actual usage logs and flags any you haven't touched in a while as cancellation candidates. Use this if you suspect you're paying for a few apps you forgot you even have.

jobs.name: Upload Cadence Consistency Check
jobs.description: Looks at your actual upload history and flags when the gaps between posts have been drifting longer than your normal rhythm — even if nothing's technically overdue yet. Use this if your posting pace has ever crept from weekly to "whenever" without any single missed post ever standing out on its own.

jobs.name: Room Upsell and Upgrade Conversion Tracker
jobs.description: Analyzes offered room upgrades and add-on upsells (early check-in, view upgrade, breakfast package) against how many guests accepted, broken down by channel and shift. Use this if front desk upsell offers have ever quietly tapered off because nobody was tracking whether the team was actually still asking.

jobs.name: Uptime Ping Check
jobs.description: Pings a URL on a schedule and flags it if it stops responding. Use this if you want a basic "is my site down" alert without paying for a monitoring service.

jobs.name: Client Usage License Expiry Check
jobs.description: Tracks time-limited commercial usage licenses you've granted clients for photos or video (e.g. a one-year ad-campaign license) and flags any approaching expiry. Use this if a commercial client has ever kept running your images in their marketing past the license window you actually sold them, without anyone offering a renewal first.

jobs.name: Usage Rights & License Expiration Check
jobs.description: Checks licensed creative assets — stock photos, video, music, or fonts used in client work — for usage-rights terms nearing their expiration date, and flags the ones that need renewal or replacement soon. Use this if the agency has ever kept using a licensed asset in live client work past its rights window without realizing it.

jobs.name: Content Usage Rights Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks how long a brand or licensee is allowed to keep using content you sold/granted usage rights for (whitelisting, paid ads, resyndication) and flags anything expiring soon. Use this if a brand has ever kept running your face in their paid ads months after your usage-rights window actually ended.

jobs.name: USDA Report Release Reminder
jobs.description: Checks for upcoming USDA NASS/WASDE report releases (Crop Progress, Grain Stocks, WASDE, and similar) relevant to a tracked commodity within the next few days, so you know a market-moving report is about to drop. Use this if you've ever been caught off guard by a price swing right after a report you didn't know was coming.

jobs.name: Used Vehicle Inventory Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks used vehicle inventory against days-on-lot and flags anything past your reconditioning or pricing review threshold. Use this if a used car has ever sat on the lot for two months quietly losing value before anyone noticed it needed a price cut.

jobs.name: Utility Bill Anomaly Check
jobs.description: Compares each newly logged utility bill against your recent average for that utility and flags a reading that spikes well beyond normal. Use this if a bill has ever jumped because of a hidden leak or a device left running, and you only found out once the bill arrived.

jobs.name: Utility Bill-Back Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares submetered tenant utility charges against the property's master utility bill and flags a mismatch beyond a set tolerance. Use this if tenant bill-backs have ever quietly drifted from the actual master bill, either undercharging the owner or overcharging tenants.

jobs.name: Vacant Unit Marketing Listing Check
jobs.description: Compares currently vacant, rent-ready units against what's actually posted on the facility's online listing or marketing site, and flags units that are ready to rent but aren't listed yet. Use this if empty units have ever sat unrented longer than they should because someone forgot to add them to the website after they were cleaned and made ready.

jobs.name: Vaccine Fridge Cold-Chain Temperature Log Check
jobs.description: Scans today's logged vaccine refrigerator temperature readings and flags any reading outside the safe cold-chain range. Use this if a vaccine fridge has ever drifted out of range for hours unnoticed, putting an entire batch of vaccine inventory at risk of no longer being viable — distinct from medication-inventory-expiry-check.yaml, which tracks expiry dates rather than whether storage temperature was actually maintained.

jobs.name: Valet and Parking Incident Log Check
jobs.description: Scans the valet/parking incident log for entries still open past your target response window, and immediately flags any theft or injury report regardless of age. Use this if a scratched bumper or a missing car has ever sat in a notebook for days before anyone escalated it to the guest or insurance.

jobs.name: Validator Uptime & Slashing Risk Watch
jobs.description: Checks a staked validator's recent attestation/block performance and any slashing or penalty events via a public explorer, and flags degrading uptime before it costs real rewards or triggers a slash. Use this if you run or delegate to a validator and have ever found out about a missed- attestation streak or a slashing event only after checking weeks later.

jobs.name: Van/Tool Inventory Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares a truck's expected tool and equipment list against the count from its last physical audit or scan, and flags any mismatches. Use this if a specialty tool or piece of diagnostic equipment has ever gone missing from a van for weeks before anyone noticed it wasn't there.

jobs.name: Vegetation Management Clearance Check
jobs.description: Scans the vegetation-management tracking system for power line right-of-way segments where tree/brush clearance has fallen below the required distance or the last trim date is overdue for its cycle, and lists them ordered by how overdue they are. Use this if a utility has ever had an outage or wildfire ignition traced back to a tree limb nobody scheduled a trim crew for in time.

jobs.name: Vehicle Decommission & Disposal Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews vehicles marked for retirement and checks whether every decommission step — telematics and fuel card deactivation, plate surrender, final odometer capture, insurance removal, title transfer — actually got done before the vehicle left the fleet. Use this if a retired vehicle has ever kept racking up insurance premiums or fuel card charges for months because nobody formally took it off the books.

jobs.name: Vehicle Emissions/Smog Test Due Check
jobs.description: Checks fleet vehicles against their state emissions or smog test due dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if a vehicle has ever failed a registration renewal because its separate emissions certification quietly expired and nobody was tracking it apart from the registration itself.

jobs.name: Vehicle Extended Warranty/Service Contract Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks each vehicle's extended warranty or service contract against its expiry date (by calendar date or mileage) and warns before coverage runs out. Use this if a repair bill has ever come out of pocket that would have been covered, because nobody noticed the warranty had already lapsed by date or mileage.

jobs.name: Vehicle Idle Time Check
jobs.description: Checks each vehicle's daily engine idle time against a threshold and flags the ones burning excess fuel sitting still. Use this if a telematics report has ever shown a surprise fuel bill and nobody could tell how much of it came from vehicles just left running.

jobs.name: Vehicle State/DOT Inspection Due Check
jobs.description: Checks fleet vehicles against their state or DOT inspection due dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if a vehicle has ever gotten pulled off a job by an inspector because its inspection sticker quietly expired — separate from routine maintenance or registration renewal.

jobs.name: Fleet Vehicle Maintenance Due Check
jobs.description: Flags fleet vehicles due for scheduled maintenance by date or mileage. Use this if a fleet vehicle has ever broken down on a job because its service interval quietly passed.

jobs.name: Finished Vehicle Pickup Reminder
jobs.description: Flags vehicles marked ready for pickup that the customer hasn't collected yet, so the lot doesn't fill up with finished cars nobody's chasing. Use this if a completed car has ever sat in the lot for a week because the "ready" call was made once and then forgotten.

jobs.name: Vehicle Pool Scheduling Conflict Check
jobs.description: Scans upcoming pool vehicle reservations for double-bookings and flags overlaps before two employees show up for the same vehicle. Use this if a pool vehicle has ever been double-booked because reservations were tracked in a shared calendar or spreadsheet with no overlap check.

jobs.name: Fleet Vehicle Registration Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a fleet vehicle's registration expires. Use this if a vehicle has ever gotten pulled over, or failed a job site check-in, because its registration quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Personal Vehicle Registration Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you of an upcoming registration renewal deadline for your personal car so plates and tags don't lapse. Use this if you've ever gotten a late fee, or worse a ticket, because the registration sticker expired before you got around to renewing it.

jobs.name: Vehicle Total Cost of Ownership Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews each vehicle's running cost per mile (fuel, maintenance, insurance, depreciation) against a threshold and flags vehicles that have quietly become more expensive to keep than to replace. Use this if an aging vehicle has ever stayed on the road years past the point it made financial sense.

jobs.name: Vehicle Title & Lien Document Tracker
jobs.description: Checks each vehicle's title and lien paperwork status and flags loans that were paid off without the lien release being recorded, or titles that were never filed after purchase. Use this if a vehicle has ever been ready to sell or trade in but got stuck for weeks because nobody could locate a clean title or lien release letter.

jobs.name: Vehicle Utilization Rate Check
jobs.description: Flags fleet vehicles running well below or above a target utilization rate (miles or days driven per period). Use this if a vehicle has ever sat mostly idle in a lot racking up lease and insurance costs while another vehicle got run into the ground.

jobs.name: Vendor Certificate of Insurance Expiration Check
jobs.description: Checks the certificates of insurance on file for freelancers, production vendors, and subcontractors doing on-site or client-facing work, and flags anyone whose coverage is expiring soon or missing entirely. Use this if a freelance photographer or production crew has ever shown up to a client shoot on a certificate of insurance that had already quietly lapsed, leaving the agency exposed if something went wrong. Distinct from subcontractor-nda-compliance-check, which tracks signed NDAs and vendor agreements, not liability insurance coverage.

jobs.name: Vendor Certificate of Insurance Expiry Tracker
jobs.description: Checks certificates of insurance you've collected from vendors and contractors and warns before any expire, so a lapsed COI doesn't sit unnoticed in the file. Use this if a vendor's insurance has ever lapsed mid-contract and nobody found out until a claim needed it.

jobs.name: Vendor Early-Pay Discount Tracker
jobs.description: Flags vendor invoices with an early-payment discount (like "2/10 net 30") whose discount window is about to close. Use this if you've ever paid a bill on the regular due date and only afterward realized you could've saved a couple percent by paying ten days earlier.

jobs.name: Vendor/Subcontractor Invoice Approval Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks vendor and subcontractor invoices sitting in an "awaiting approval" queue and flags any that have been waiting longer than the target turnaround, regardless of whether they're due yet. Use this if a vendor invoice has ever sat unreviewed in someone's inbox for weeks, not because it wasn't due, but because nobody was watching the approval queue itself. Distinct from freelancer-contractor-payment-reminder, which tracks invoices already approved and counting down to their due date.

jobs.name: Event Vendor Payment Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a vendor deposit or balance payment for an event is due. Use this if a vendor has ever threatened to cancel because a payment deadline slipped past unnoticed.

jobs.name: Vendor Security Review Recertification Check
jobs.description: Checks how long it's been since each third-party vendor's security review was last completed and flags any past your recertification window. Use this if a vendor's SOC 2 report or security questionnaire has ever sat unreviewed for years after the initial onboarding check because nobody was tracking the review date.

jobs.name: Vendor W-9 Missing Check
jobs.description: Checks vendors paid over the reportable threshold so far this year for a W-9 (or equivalent tax form) on file, and flags any that are missing one. Use this if you've ever scrambled in January to chase down tax forms for 1099 filing because nobody confirmed the paperwork was collected when the vendor first crossed the payment threshold.

jobs.name: Venue Capacity / Fire-Code Compliance Check
jobs.description: Compares confirmed attendee count against the venue's legal occupancy limit and flags it before you're over. Use this if you've ever added "just a few more" invitees without checking whether the room's fire-code capacity could actually hold them.

jobs.name: Veterinary Staff CE Credit Tracking
jobs.description: Reviews each veterinarian and licensed vet tech's continuing education (CE) credit hours against what their state board requires by license renewal, and flags anyone on track to fall short. Use this if a provider has ever discovered close to renewal that they were short on RACE-approved CE hours needed to keep their license active — distinct from dvm-license-dea-registration-expiry-check.yaml, which tracks the license's own expiry date rather than the ongoing education requirement to renew it.

jobs.name: Video Ad Completion Rate Watch
jobs.description: Checks the view-through and completion rate of running video ads against a baseline and flags a meaningful drop. Use this if a video ad has ever quietly stopped holding attention (creative fatigue or a targeting problem) while spend kept flowing because nobody was watching completion rate specifically, as opposed to general clicks.

jobs.name: Video Transcript Missing Check
jobs.description: Scans pages containing embedded video for a linked transcript or a captions/subtitles track, and flags videos where neither is found. Use this if you publish video content and want to catch accessibility gaps and missed opportunities for search engines to index the video's spoken content as text.

jobs.name: VIP Ticket Priority Check
jobs.description: Checks that open tickets from your VIP or high-value customer segment are actually flagged priority and within their tighter response window. Use this if a top-tier account has ever waited in the same queue as everyone else because the VIP tag didn't make it into the ticket.

jobs.name: VIP Tier Reclassification Check
jobs.description: Checks each customer's year-to-date spend against your VIP tier thresholds and flags anyone due to move up or down a tier, drafting a short outreach note for new upgrades. Use this if a top customer has ever crossed your VIP spend threshold months ago and never got the perks (or the acknowledgment) because nobody was tracking tier crossings.

jobs.name: Visa/Residency Document Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a visa, residency permit, or similar document expires. Use this if you're living or working abroad and a document deadline has ever crept up on you.

jobs.name: Visual Merchandising Compliance Check
jobs.description: Reviews store-front and window display photos against the current visual merchandising directive and flags stores that haven't executed it. Use this if a seasonal window or entrance display has ever stayed up stale for weeks after corporate sent the new directive.

jobs.name: VoIP Call Quality (MOS Score) Degradation Check
jobs.description: Checks recent VoIP call quality samples (MOS scores) per trunk or route and flags any averaging below an acceptable threshold. Use this if customers have ever complained about choppy or garbled calls on a route for days before anyone noticed the MOS scores had quietly dropped.

jobs.name: Volunteer Background Check Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks volunteer background-check/clearance expiration dates and flags anyone whose clearance is about to lapse before their next scheduled shift. Use this if a volunteer has ever worked a shift with clients or minors on an expired background check because renewal dates weren't tracked centrally.

jobs.name: Volunteer Hours Shortfall Check
jobs.description: Compares logged volunteer hours against a program's target and flags a shortfall. Use this if a program has ever fallen behind on a grant's volunteer-hour commitment without anyone noticing until the report was due.

jobs.name: Volunteer/Staff Shift Confirmation Reminder
jobs.description: Flags individually assigned event shifts that a staffer or volunteer hasn't confirmed yet, as their shift date gets close. Use this if a shift has ever gone unstaffed on the day because the person assigned to it never actually confirmed they'd show up, and nobody checked until they didn't.

jobs.name: VPN Access Recertification Check
jobs.description: Compares every active VPN access grant against the date it was last reviewed or recertified, then flags any grant that has gone past the periodic review window. Use this if you want to make sure someone regularly double-checks who still needs VPN access, instead of grants silently living on forever once approved.

jobs.name: WAF Rule Change Watch
jobs.description: Diffs your current WAF rules against a saved baseline and flags drift. Use this if a WAF rule has ever been loosened "just for testing" and never put back.

jobs.name: Waiting Room Time Check
jobs.description: Compares each day's logged check-in-to-roomed times against a target wait time and flags days or providers running consistently long. Use this if patient wait times have ever crept up gradually — a schedule template that's too tight, a provider consistently running behind — without anyone noticing until it started showing up as complaints.

jobs.name: Waitlist-to-Seated Conversion Check
jobs.description: Analyzes waitlist app data to see what share of people who joined the waitlist actually got seated versus walked away, and whether quoted wait times matched reality. Use this if you suspect an overly optimistic quoted wait time is quietly driving guests to leave before their table is ready.

jobs.name: Waitlist-to-Confirmed Conversion Outreach
jobs.description: Drafts outreach to people on an event waitlist when spots open up from cancellations, so seats don't sit empty while people who wanted in never find out. Use this if an event has ever had a waitlist and empty seats at the same time because nobody got around to reaching out.

jobs.name: Waitlist Unit Availability Match Check
jobs.description: Compares the self-storage facility's unit waitlist against units that were just vacated, and flags any waitlisted prospect whose requested size or type now has a match. Use this if prospects who asked to be notified about a specific unit size sometimes miss out because staff advertised the unit publicly before checking the waitlist first.

jobs.name: Wake-up Call Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks today's logged wake-up call requests and flags any that are past their requested time without being marked completed. Use this if a guest has ever missed a flight because a wake-up call was logged at the front desk but never actually placed.

jobs.name: Walk-In Cooler Temperature Log Check
jobs.description: Scans today's logged cooler/freezer temperature readings and flags any that fall outside the safe range. Use this if an out-of-range reading has ever sat unnoticed in a paper log until a health inspector found it.

jobs.name: Dog Walker / Pet Sitter Route Conflict Check
jobs.description: Scans today's dog-walking or pet-sitting visit schedule for any walker or sitter booked onto two visits that overlap, or booked back-to-back with too little travel time between addresses. Use this if a walker has ever shown up late (or had to rush a visit) because the schedule quietly double-booked them or left no buffer between two stops.

jobs.name: Wallet Balance Watch
jobs.description: Checks a public wallet address's balance and alerts if it drops below a threshold, without needing any private key or exchange API access. Use this if you've ever wanted a heads-up when a hot wallet's gas/funding balance ran low.

jobs.name: Warehouse Damage Write-Off Review
jobs.description: Reviews inventory damaged inside the facility during handling (dropped in putaway, forklift contact, racking collapse) and flags cases pending a write-off decision, along with any recurring cause worth fixing. Use this if damaged inventory has ever sat on a "to be reviewed" pallet for weeks because nobody owned the write-off decision.

jobs.name: Warehouse Near-Miss & Incident Rate Watch
jobs.description: Reviews the safety incident log for a trend in near-misses and minor injuries on the warehouse floor against a rolling benchmark, and looks for a common thread (location, shift, equipment) before it becomes a serious injury. Use this if near-misses have ever piled up in the log unread until a lost-time injury made someone finally go looking for a pattern that was there the whole time.

jobs.name: Warehouse Space Utilization Check
jobs.description: Reviews storage location occupancy against total capacity by zone and flags zones running near overflow or sitting oddly empty. Use this if a zone has ever hit effective capacity without warning, forcing overflow pallets into aisles because nobody was watching utilization trend toward full.

jobs.name: Warehouse Storage Capacity Check
jobs.description: Checks the moving company's warehouse or storage-in-transit facility utilization against its total capacity and flags any facility approaching full. Use this if you've ever accepted a new storage booking only to find out at drop-off that the warehouse had no room left for it.

jobs.name: Warehouse Transfer Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags inter-location stock transfers that shipped but haven't been marked received after a set number of days, a sign a shipment is stuck, lost, or just never logged in. Use this if a transfer has ever quietly vanished between two locations because nobody was tracking how long it had been in transit.

jobs.name: Warranty Claim Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks open warranty claims against the manufacturer's submission deadline and flags any about to expire unfiled. Use this if a claim has ever gone unpaid because it was submitted a day past the manufacturer's filing window.

jobs.name: Warranty Claim Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks open equipment warranty claims (HVAC units, water heaters, appliances) against the manufacturer's filing deadline and flags any about to lapse unfiled. Use this if a claim has ever been denied because it was submitted a day after the manufacturer's window closed.

jobs.name: Warranty Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before an appliance or product warranty expires. Use this if you've ever discovered a warranty lapsed the week before whatever it covered broke.

jobs.name: Watchlist Price Target Alert
jobs.description: Checks a stock on your watchlist against a price target and alerts when it crosses the level you set. Use this if you're waiting for a stock to hit a buy or sell price and don't want to keep checking it manually.

jobs.name: Water Heater Flush Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to flush sediment out of your water heater tank based on how long it's been since the last flush. Use this if you've ever noticed banging noises or slower hot water because sediment had been building up for years.

jobs.name: Water Intake Reminder
jobs.description: Nudges you to drink water a few times a day toward a daily goal. Use this if you sit at a desk all day and forget to drink water until you've got a headache.

jobs.name: Water Quality Sample Due Reminder
jobs.description: Checks the regulatory sampling schedule for required water-quality tests (such as bacteriological or lead & copper sampling) and reminds compliance staff which sampling events are coming due soon. Use this if a water utility has ever missed a required sampling window and had to explain the gap to a regulator.

jobs.name: Water Rights / Well Permit Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Checks a list of water rights and well permits against their expiration dates and warns before any lapse, so your irrigation isn't running on an expired permit. Use this if you've ever discovered a permit had lapsed only when an inspector or neighbor pointed it out.

jobs.name: Water Softener Salt Check Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to check and refill your water softener's salt level based on how long it's been since the last check. Use this if you've ever let the brine tank run dry and ended up with hard water again without noticing for weeks.

jobs.name: Wave/Batch Picking Efficiency Check
jobs.description: Checks completed picking waves against a target completion time and flags waves that ran long. Use this if a wave has ever spilled past its window and pushed the whole outbound schedule back before anyone noticed the wave itself, not the individual pickers, was the problem.

jobs.name: Weather Delay Impact Log
jobs.description: Reviews logged weather delay days against the project's schedule float and flags when accumulated weather delays threaten a milestone, plus checks whether the delay documentation is complete enough to support a time-extension claim later. Use this if a weather delay claim has ever been rejected because the daily documentation didn't clearly tie the weather to lost work.

jobs.name: Weather-Delay Rescheduling Check
jobs.description: Checks tomorrow's forecast against your rain/wind thresholds and, if the route would need to be delayed, lists which scheduled stops need to be pushed to the next available day. Use this if a crew has ever headed out into a downpour because nobody checked the forecast before route assignments went out.

jobs.name: Frost/Freeze Risk Alert
jobs.description: Checks the forecast for your fields and warns if frost or freeze temperatures are coming, so you have time to cover crops or run frost-protection irrigation. Use this if a surprise cold snap has ever cost you a harvest.

jobs.name: Webhook Delivery Failure Check
jobs.description: Checks recent outgoing webhook delivery logs for a spike in failed deliveries and flags it so someone can investigate whether the problem is on your side or the receiving endpoint's side. Use this if downstream integrations depend on your webhooks arriving and silent delivery failures have ever gone unnoticed for days.

jobs.name: Webinar Attendance Reminder
jobs.description: Checks a list of webinars/workshops you've registered for and flags any happening soon so you can block the time and prep. Use this if you've ever signed up for a webinar and completely forgotten about it by the time it started.

jobs.name: Webinar Registration/Attendance Check
jobs.description: Checks a webinar's registration count and show-up (attendance) rate against targets, with enough lead time to boost promotion or send reminders. Use this if a webinar has ever gone live to a nearly empty room because registration numbers looked fine on paper but nobody checked the actual show-up rate trend.

jobs.name: Weekly Creator Analytics Digest
jobs.description: Pulls the week's key numbers (views, subscribers/followers gained, top and bottom performing posts, revenue if available) across your platforms into one short summary. Use this if you've ever opened five different analytics dashboards on a Monday just to piece together how last week actually went.

jobs.name: Weekly Priorities Planning Reminder
jobs.description: Sends a Monday-morning reminder to set the week's top 3 priorities before the week gets away from you. Use this if you've noticed weeks slipping by reactively, with no clear sense of what actually mattered most until Friday.

jobs.name: Weekly Progress Report
jobs.description: Rolls up a week's worth of commits and progress into a short report you can hand to your team. Use this if you dread writing the Friday status update from scratch every week.

jobs.name: Welcome Email Drip Check
jobs.description: Checks that everyone who signed up recently actually received the welcome email, and flags anyone who fell through the cracks. Use this if a welcome-email automation has ever silently failed for a batch of new users and nobody noticed until support tickets started asking "where's my onboarding email?"

jobs.name: Whale Transaction Watch
jobs.description: Checks a tracked wallet address for outgoing or incoming transactions above a size threshold since the last check, and summarizes them. Use this if you follow a "whale" wallet, project treasury, or exchange hot wallet and want a heads-up when it moves a large amount instead of refreshing a block explorer all day.

jobs.name: Whistleblower/Ethics Complaint SLA Check
jobs.description: Checks open whistleblower or ethics hotline complaints against your internal acknowledgment and investigation SLA, prioritizes them by severity, and drafts a status note for the compliance officer. Use this if a whistleblower complaint has ever sat unacknowledged past your own policy's response window because it wasn't visible outside one investigator's queue.

jobs.name: Wifi Bandwidth Utilization Alert
jobs.description: Checks how much of your network's total bandwidth capacity is being used during peak hours and flags when usage is trending toward saturation. Use this if members have ever started complaining about slow wifi before anyone on staff noticed the network was creeping toward its limit.

jobs.name: Will-Call Bin Aging Check
jobs.description: Scans filled prescriptions still sitting in the will-call bin and flags any that have gone unpicked-up past your store's return-to-stock window. Use this if the will-call bin has ever quietly filled up with old prescriptions that should have been returned to stock weeks ago.

jobs.name: Win-Back Reactivation Campaign Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks how canceled customers targeted by a win-back campaign are responding, and can draft the next outreach touch for non-responders. Use this if a win-back campaign has ever gone out once and then nobody followed up with the customers who didn't respond.

jobs.name: Wishlist Abandonment Check
jobs.description: Checks customer wishlists for items that have sat untouched for a while and drafts a nudge email when there's a real reason to reach out — a price drop or the item is back in stock — instead of a generic "you still want this?" reminder. Use this if you've ever had a wishlist feature that quietly collects intent and never converts any of it back into a sale.

jobs.name: WMS Integration Error Queue Check
jobs.description: Scans the warehouse management system's integration error queue (failed order imports, ASN mismatches, inventory sync failures) and flags anything sitting unresolved past a target age. Use this if a failed inbound order sync has ever sat quietly in an error queue for days while the warehouse floor had no idea the order even existed.

jobs.name: Work Order Backlog Check
jobs.description: Counts open production work orders that have sat unstarted or unfinished past their planned completion date. Use this if a work order has ever quietly aged for weeks in the queue while everyone assumed someone else had picked it up.

jobs.name: Worker Safety Training Expiry Check Per Assignment Type
jobs.description: Checks each active temp worker's required safety training (forklift, OSHA 10, site-specific inductions, etc.) against what their current assignment type requires and flags anyone whose certification has expired or is about to. Use this if a worker has ever been sent to a warehouse or industrial site with an expired safety certification and it only surfaced during a client audit.

jobs.name: Workers' Comp Audit Premium True-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks policyholders due for their annual workers' compensation payroll audit and flags any whose actual-payroll true-up hasn't been completed or invoiced within the target window after the policy period ends. Use this if an audit premium true-up has ever gone unbilled for so long that the additional premium became hard to collect or the policyholder forgot why they suddenly owed money.

jobs.name: Workers' Comp Certificate Expiry Check Per Client Site
jobs.description: Checks the agency's workers' compensation certificate of insurance on file for each client site and flags any expiring soon or already lapsed. Use this if a client has ever demanded a current COI on short notice and the agency scrambled to find out whether theirs had lapsed.

jobs.name: Workers' Comp Claim Status Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Reviews open workers' compensation claims for injured temp workers and drafts a status-check follow-up for any claim that hasn't been updated recently. Use this if an open workers' comp claim has ever sat untouched for weeks because nobody was assigned to keep checking on it.

jobs.name: Workers' Comp Claim Status Check
jobs.description: Checks open workers' compensation claims with the carrier and flags ones that have gone quiet or are approaching an expected return-to-work date with no update. Use this if an injured employee's claim has ever stalled with the carrier for weeks with nobody at the company noticing or following up.

jobs.name: Yard Trailer Detention Watch
jobs.description: Checks trailers currently parked in the facility's own yard against their free-time window and flags any at risk of detention charges. Use this if a trailer has ever sat in the yard so long that a detention invoice showed up before anyone realized it was still parked out there.

jobs.name: Yield Farming APY Comparison
jobs.description: Checks current APY across a shortlist of DeFi pools/vaults for a given asset and reports which one is currently paying best, so you're not leaving yield on the table in a pool that quietly dropped its rate. Use this if you've ever parked funds in a farm and never checked whether a better rate showed up elsewhere.

jobs.name: YouTube Clip Repurposing Draft
jobs.description: Checks for a newly published long-form video and drafts a shortlist of moments worth cutting into shorts/clips for other platforms. Use this if a video has ever gone up and just sat there as one long upload instead of becoming five pieces of content.
